| | Patriot,

---
Yesterday, I was officially hit with a gag order requested by the Biden Administration.
---
_And TODAY marks the_ __FINAL__ ____WEEK__ _of the RINO plot to end the MAGA movement and return to the old establishment GOP..._

---
Wouldn’t it be nice if I could focus ALL of my time on beating Crooked Joe now that my First Amendment rights have been ripped to shreds?

---
But sadly, Disloyal Republicans are playing right into the crooked tyrant’s hands as they continue to form an implicit alliance with Biden to try and beat me.

---
While all of these many nefarious, backstabbing forces have consolidated to try and bring me down, grassroots donors like _YOU_ have saved the day time and time again by ensuring that we have all the resources we need to prevail against these never-ending attacks.

---
_Just take a look at this headline from NBC on the recent release of 3rd Quarter Fundraising Reports filed with the Federal Election Commission:_
---
**“Eyes on 2024: Trump tops rivals in fundraising”**
---
And so – during the FINAL WEEK of the RINO plot against us – I’m turning to the people who have helped us withstand every attack so far: my grassroots donors like YOU.
---
While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA!
---
And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs.
---
Now, let’s do it again!
---
_(But if you’re doing poorly right now due to all of the many villains destroying our country, please do not even think about donating. I mean it!)_
---

name: Mike Feuer
subject: Islamophobia has no place here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I shared my thoughts about the rise in Islamophobia and antisemitism – and how we can respond – in a new video.

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71744021/433119425/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.10.17_B1_2ndVideo_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDFjZGY0NjgtNGM2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fxjgN0hvUgZMAIEsF_TnM5aB5CBZ226qU4jGl8LA2yg=&emci=f402c790-436d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=01cdf468-4c6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) | Friend, In this perilous moment, antisemitism and Islamophobia are escalating throughout the world. No one should be targeted for violence because of what they look like or how they worship. I am heartbroken over the murder of Wadea Al-Fayoume, a six-year-old Palestinian-American boy in Illinois who was stabbed to death by his landlord in an apparent hate crime. **I shared my thoughts about the rise in Islamophobia and antisemitism – and how we can respond – in a new video. Please take a few minutes to watch and share it clean_body: I shared my thoughts about the rise in Islamophobia and antisemitism – and how we can respond – in a new video. Mike Feuer for Congress | Friend, In this perilous moment, antisemitism and Islamophobia are escalating throughout the world. No one should be targeted for violence because of what they look like or how they worship. I am heartbroken over the murder of Wadea Al-Fayoume, a six-year-old Palestinian-American boy in Illinois who was stabbed to death by his landlord in an apparent hate crime. I shared my thoughts about the rise in Islamophobia and antisemitism – and how we can respond – in a new video. Please take a few minutes to watch and share it on, , , or → Now it's more important than ever that we stand up for each other and recognize our common humanity. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71744039/433121850/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.17_b1_tc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDI2OWY0ZS00ZDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEra1d3j4RkBld9KRBBj2AEHDxSBzYkoXc2aTth7H4=)
Hi Peter,

Republicans in the U.S. House of Representatives are in complete disarray, unable to elect a Speaker of the House with just one month until government funding lapses. It has never been more clear that we need real leadership in Congress. Democrats like Yadira Caraveo will put people above politics, and MAGA Republicans like Jim Jordan have not and will not.

Yadira came to Congress to help working families on the issues that matter - like safeguarding abortion access, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and protecting the environment - but Republican dysfunction is distracting from the legislation we need.

We are fighting tooth and nail to keep Colorado’s 8th Congressional District blue and preserve American Democracy. Yadira cannot do it alone. Republicans are spending an enormous amount of money on negative ads, and last year she won by less than 1%. Yadira needs your support to win.

**[Can you chip in to give Yadira’s campaign the tools to protect this seat and protect Americans from the MAGA Republicans’ radical agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71744040/433121851/537837852?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.17_b1_tc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDI2OWY0ZS00ZDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YoEra1d3j4RkBld9KRBBj2AEHDxSBzYkoXc2aTth7H4=)**

body:

Derek —

We have some disturbing news: Donald Trump went on Fox News talking head
Brian Kilmeade’s radio program to talk about the “strength” House
Republicans need to solve their Speaker debacle — and to attack Adam.

As Trump put it:

“We need tremendous strength both inside and out because we have radical left
lunatics like Nancy Pelosi and Schiff and all these crazy people that are so bad
for our country. And they've got to fight them off and they've got to fight the
outside world”

Republicans can’t even elect a House Speaker, yet they are desperate to
distract from their own ineptitude by blaming Democratic leaders like Adam
and Nancy Pelosi while inflaming themselves with Trump’s calls for
“strength.”

Strength is a functioning legislative branch with a working House of
Representatives.

Strength is passing legislation to fund our government and avert the
looming shutdown that is mere weeks away.

Strength is building a grassroots movement, united by a shared love and
regard for our country, to keep making progress for every American.

Strength is being able to govern, and not have pure chaos.

So while Trump might say the House GOP needs more strength, Democrats
already have it. And we know that with your support, Adam will have the
strength and support to respond to Trump’s attacks and take this movement
to the Senate.

Rush $3 to Adam’s Senate campaign to help us respond: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Republicans can’t even elect a House Speaker, yet they are desperate to distract from their own ineptitude by blaming Democratic leaders like Adam and Nancy Pelosi while inflaming themselves with Trump’s calls for “strength.” Strength is a functioning legislative branch with a working House of Representatives. Strength is passing legislation to fund our government and avert the looming shutdown that is mere weeks away. Strength is building a grassroots movement, united by a shared love and regard for our country, to keep making progress for every American. Strength is being able to govern, and not have pure chaos. So while Trump might say the House GOP needs more strength, Democrats already have it. And we know that with your support, Adam will have the strength and support to respond to Trump’s attacks and take this movement to the Senate. [ ]Please, chip in $3 to help respond to Trump’s latest attack and show him just how strong Adam’s team of supporters is. body:
you’ve been handpicked to sign >>
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries Stands Strong with Unified Caucus as GOP Civil War Intensifies** Listen, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats while the MAGA mob has spent the entire year ripping itself to pieces.

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!**[**We’re hand-delivering this letter to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=6&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=7&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=8&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even ousting their own Speaker!**

While they’re busy waging a civil war, you’ve stood strong for the American people, our democracy, and President Biden’s groundbreaking agenda.

**Your continued strength gives me hope that Democrats can take back the House in 2024 and end the MAGA circus for good.**

**We’re so grateful to have you leading the way!** [**That’s why today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 5 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=9&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=10&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55359?t=11&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11309%2E878179%2EnzvV0s)

We've just put together our OFFICIAL [**October Republican Platform Audit,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2152e3a55f934f5e9c17f172962a7b54&_e=QRXsN0xz1iWykYWGwbJaxKuD179gaQ_okFAf9MOEgvRZFHFTAo1xA94y3tqRJvcLuBtEqvvie_N8Dl8PTNkbaVD1ThAIodjQ5ZmLHvzeGQtcfCZEex_HkH8dx2kW9TVMi-MBaVUcludeMcf70HCeDFMHhDrXnmRXwBSZ6mbvhkAy2cfzZkgB3lBfMXAoSo3yALBfP1Dd-qZ4scPP8qC41_RCoL-3PGV5I1-CrHJ8ydQWUBEkIMapxXlfgEmkdUa9EYxVGa_eX61nIsxm_yFfmtvscyZnkbBAlnNzfza7w8xvrfrMxxI7EOMXN-40_uELwoqne9CRdWAsLRNU4wxEluQTN8rBniOsH3PEcpzyri27W91u_b5j2BB8KpkEWa8mO4EJQXeWyZWRy-nwX6Jn2WYoYyejMj0SO-JShRrhSgXkEO_iut8xmBejbH5V8gyP-EdsDeozGkOrFhVw7SBMNbcm2HBIxZA4eKlAigNgcxU%3D) and we need you to weigh in NOW.

_Will you answer a few quick questions for us?_

[YES, I WILL >>
](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2152e3a55f934f5e9c17f172962a7b54&_e=QRXsN0xz1iWykYWGwbJaxKuD179gaQ_okFAf9MOEgvRZFHFTAo1xA94y3tqRJvcLuBtEqvvie_N8Dl8PTNkbaVD1ThAIodjQ5ZmLHvzeGQtcfCZEex_HkH8dx2kW9TVMi-MBaVUcludeMcf70HCeDFMHhDrXnmRXwBSZ6mbvhkAy2cfzZkgB3lBfMXAoSo3yALBfP1Dd-qZ4scPP8qC41_RCoL-3PGV5I1-CrHJ8ydQWUBEkIMapxXlfgEmkdUa9EYxVGa_eX61nIsxm_yFfmtvscyZnkbBAlnNzfza7w8xvrfrMxxI7EOMXN-40_uELwoqne9CRdWAsLRNU4wxElrVP48Zd1e1UCu2D7tgz4m_A1PcTXOT0urrUb-JX_YAHKhyeFbLfnIg10f-JinWPh4DyQpYhT1BySP2a25bZe0oRnS-mcZQGrlPHJ1VWHRWOwS057qlvra8zuVsu3wRbpimW4aYnMBCTIEhduxajxgA%3D)

With everything going wrong in our country, there's no doubt we have to change course.

But we want to hear from YOU on the most crucial next steps in charting the course for the GOP's future.

_
* Do you believe that parents should have a greater say in the education of their children?
* Should the Republican candidates for President commit to investigating the Biden family for their alleged corruption?
* Which Republican candidate would have your vote if elections were held today?
_

Make no mistake, your responses will be instrumental in shaping our strategy to reclaim the White House, flip the Senate, and strengthen our House Majority.

body:

We need your help to get this video in front of California voters, to show them Katie is the candidate who will truly stand up to corporations and special interests and get things done for working people. **Just $15 can help reach around 500 voters through an ad like this one.** [**Can you pitch in $15, $30, or $45 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231017-2?refcode=EMAM17_2_ADV_20231017_V1_F&refcode2=31621_3422442_DrucKG&akid=31621%2E3422442%2EDrucKG)

name: Rob Bonta, CA Attorney General
subject: I’m standing on the shoulders of giants.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5]Hi folks – I’m Rob Bonta and like many Americans I stand here today on the shoulders of giants. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5]
I’m the son of leaders in the farmworkers’ movement and a child of California’s Filipino American community, growing up as it joined forces with our LGBTQI+, Latino, and Black allies during the watershed 1977 International Hotel protests.
Seeing how those without power and wealth can be cheated by those with both lit a fire for justice that still burns in me today.
That’s why I’m reaching out: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5] Right now, well-funded MAGA Republicans are working to roll back the progress I’ve spent my career fighting for – in workers’ rights, LGBTQI+ rights, gun safety, and more.
So this November, I’m proud to be joining the [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5] California Democratic Party’s 2023 State Endorsing Convention [https://cdpconvention.org/] as we rally support for the Democrats who will be taking on the GOP next fall. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5]
It’s up to us to take action so we can stop the MAGA-right’s dangerous agenda.
But we can’t fight this fight without grassroots Californians by our side – we need your support. Will you make a generous donation right now to ensure that the California Democratic Party has the resources needed to elect forward-thinking Democrats and defend our progressive gains next fall? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5]
CHIP IN $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=5]
CHIP IN $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=10] CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=25]
CHIP IN $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=50] CHIP IN $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-october23-email?&refcode=EM_FR_101723_B1_45D &amount=50]California has long been a leader in the fight for progress, and we’re not going to stop now. Together, we will protect the values and rights we hold dear today and every day, and we will fight to advance these rights across the country.
Onward,
Rob Bonta
Attorney General
State of California

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=footer&amount=5]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=fmR%2F%2BxrKT3%2BXgtXPt4VF8bs9xZUsfXMnXVqUS9xfPUUUOpf7CGdZN4PV%2Fbiu0S6MRJy6Pe5jLSuTiWeRk0M6fZRFnfJefIpZ8cee3Tap7dEBpGkM5wFFts1EdW4xl2eYXoH%2F6pOEQo6iM8a03oI0SqLbvTF46orJrHWy01ob1gXLO6x4PbGKlOqdnS3wCJCPdkyH726BJf10Jixp1ognu3wOLWc0XQuuG0oEFTv56tkyItpTZfKybjTrIhAjSTM%2BMdx%2FV4l1uTAJrtR2ToZUXuqaXd1wbEZsg31M%2BoSo50JHvzp8A5DhdFsRMeChtH%2FXVqWHcuk5fJogbfg5Sc6FkRM9Z5YNnhSQeYp9C978M%2FWbqi2faTcMX%2FOod2wm445haeYwdAGIExDddkxP%2BPNl2PEMyw90byb%2B9lehpwnAq7w%3D .
https://www.facebook.com/cadems/ [https://www.facebook.com/cadems/] https://twitter.com/ca_dem [https://twitter.com/ca_dem] https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats/ [https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats/] https://www.cadem.org/?utm_source=Email%20footer [https://www.cadem.org/?utm_source=Email%20footer]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: ZERO BAIL in California?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3cd1114b30&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, _Why has the state of California now become synonymous with crime and chaos?_

Because of stories like this one...

**FIRST** – In 2020, 56% of voters here REJECTED a statewide ballot initiative that would have done away with cash bail altogether. Folks had common sense and knew that this would just lead to even more crime on our streets.

**THEN** – Radical, soft-on-crime Democrat lawmakers shoved this measure down our throats anyway. They ignored the will of voters to pass legislation that jeopardized our safety!

**NOW** – A new “Zero Bail” policy has just gone into effect right here in Southern California...

**And the numbers PROVE that this is going to mean even more crime on our streets. Democrat politicians are literally _choosing_ to put their constituents in harm’s way. _That’s seriously where we’re at!_**

[So I’m running to END soft-on-crime Democrat rule in a critical U.S. House seat here in Southern California. Will you help me FLIP this very winnable seat by chipping in any amount to my campaign?](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a8cf61013e&e=8a657725d1)

After they just put _criminals_ before innocent, law-abiding citizens... We need to beat these radical Democrats everywhere we can.
---
| [SUPPORT THE MISSION. CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3cdcbc84c5&e=8a657725d1 "SUPPORT THE MISSION. CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=46754f89fd&e=8a657725d1)
---
| It isn’t just some _“Republican talking point,”_ Peter...

**It is a provable fact that Zero Bail leads to more crime.** We’re talking about 200% more violent crime committed in our state by those who get released under this program – _including a 23-year-old man who recently stabbed his 17-year-old girlfriend to death._

We shouldn’t have to live like this. But change will only come with a change in leadership. So I’m asking everyone reading this to please consider making an urgent investment in our safety today.

[With even just $10, you can help my campaign put up the ad that just might be the reason an undecided Californian decides to vote Republican next election. It may not sound like much – but it really does go a long way toward firing soft-on-crime Democrats at the ballot box.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=fcccc50d22&e=8a657725d1)
---
| [SUPPORT THE MISSION. CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=556717c2b2&e=8a657725d1 "SUPPORT THE MISSION. CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
| Thank you for this crucial support. Let’s keep our communities safe.

For California and America,
Scott Baugh

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Beyond Fossil Fuels Town Hall with Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna TONIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, you're invited!

On Tuesday, Oct. 17th, leading climate champions U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna will join Our Revolution’s LIVE Virtual Town Hall to organize for a world beyond fossil fuels, prevent backyard drilling in California, and fight for environmental justice for all.

Click here to RSVP for this special event! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231017_INV_leekhannatownhall4_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhalldayofinv&t=1011&akid=4800%2E5885482%2E29RHed)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231017_INV_leekhannatownhall4_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhalldayofinv&t=1012&akid=4800%2E5885482%2E29RHed

RSVP HERE! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231017_INV_leekhannatownhall4_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhalldayofinv&t=1013&akid=4800%2E5885482%2E29RHed)

We’ll also hear from Californians whose lives have been directly affected by fossil fuels, and activists working to fend off Big Oil’s attempt to overturn SB1137, which the state legislature passed to ensure all oil and gas drilling is set back at least 3,200 feet from homes, schools, hospitals, nursing homes and more.

We hope you’ll join us at this important LIVE town hall event, which kicks off at 7pm PT/10pm ET on Tuesday, Oct. 17th! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231017_INV_leekhannatownhall4_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhalldayofinv&t=1014&akid=4800%2E5885482%2E29RHed)

The clock is ticking on the climate crisis. Each of the past three years has been the hottest year on record, and fossil fuel production is having horrible impacts on people’s health in real time today.

We need to move beyond fossil fuels before we lose everything. Every day, we witness the terrible evidence of our government’s failure to mount a resistance to fossil fuel corporations. Changing this will take all of us.

RSVP today for Our Revolution’s Beyond Fossil Fuel Town Hall with Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and climate activists around the country! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231017_INV_leekhannatownhall4_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhalldayofinv&t=1015&akid=4800%2E5885482%2E29RHed)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: she's lying
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

President Joe Biden and his pals in the Abortion Lobby want you to believe that late-term abortions virtually never happen – and, when they do, it’s only to save the lives of mothers.
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sydjre-duchtdja-y/)
Planned Parenthood President, Alexis McGill Johnson, recently tweeted that the "term late-term abortion" is completely made up and it's "anti-abortion propaganda."

**She's lying.**

According to the most recent CDC report, more than 40,000 abortions were committed in the second and third trimesters in 2020.

**_Does that sound rare?_**

Why anyone would believe someone who makes their living off of killing babies is beyond me.

But many people do!

Pro-Life Friend, this is exactly why **TOMORROW** , Wednesday, October 18th, _Students for Life Action_ is hosting an **_Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action_** in cities across the country.
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sydjre-duchtdja-j/)
In 23 cities, _Students for Life Action_ staff and volunteers will be participating in **Overpass Outreach** where we will be exposing pro-abortion politicians by flying pro-life messages on some of the most heavily traveled highways in the country.

And along with our **Overpass Outreach** , our team will be hosting a **National Pro-Life Call Night** where volunteers from all over America will be calling Ohio voters and urging them to VOTE NO on _Issue 1_ , which would legalize abortion through all nine months of a pregnancy!

**[So, will you please chip in $75, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me purchase all of our Overpass banners and lunch for all of the amazing people who are helping us expose the Abortion Lobby](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sydjre-duchtdja-i/)?**

This is going to be a huge day, Pro-Life Friend!

In fact, as part of **_Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action_** , I will join Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS) on a panel with _Abortion Survivors Network_ members urging members of Congress to step up and pass the **_Born Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act (S. 204)_**.

Pro-Life Friend, today’s Abortion Lobby is so radical, they don’t even want doctors to provide medical care to little babies who survive abortions.

They want them tossed in the trash!

The LAST thing pro-abortion Democrats like President Joe Biden want is for people to know the truth about what they support.

After all, they’ve seen the polls showing that the vast majority of Americans oppose late-term abortion!

We need to show as many Americans as possible exactly what pro-abortion militants have in store for the future of our country – because we know media elites never will!

That’s why we’re going all out on Wednesday, October 18th, during **_Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action_** to spread the TRUTH about abortion and fight back against the Abortion Lobby’s propaganda.

**[So, please make a generous contribution right away to _Students for Life Action_ so we can ensure we have enough banners and lunch for our students and volunteers during our _Expose Late-Term Abortion Day of Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sydjre-duchtdja-d/).**

I’ll be blunt.

Lives are at stake.

The Abortion Lobby is playing for keeps.

They’ll stoop to anything to hold onto their power to keep butchering babies – because they know that if they don’t, their blood money will run out.

That’s why it’s so important that we fight back.

Your support today will help us mobilize pro-lifers and ramp up pressure on weak-kneed “pro-life” politicians who refuse to lift a finger to save babies.

Thank you for your prayers and support for our team.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sydjre-026154D2-duchtdja-h) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sydjre-duchtdja-k/)
**

**
---

body:

Friend,

Just a couple of days ago, we launched our most exciting contest yet! We've got free flights, free tickets to the next presidential debate, and a free 3-night stay in Miami for you and a guest to win! Have you seen any of our announcements about it yet? If not, you can enter here!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ecbad7225460105f75cb35a6e3aed9e0cea4d01063346378f336c99b941577a37d97dd55547c41952662d4975206a290342fe43d840e9357d0a6fbf6dfab3fe6
Enter the contest today

This debate is right here in Florida, and we expect Ron DeSantis to deliver another win on his home turf.

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ecbad7225460105f75cb35a6e3aed9e0cea4d01063346378f336c99b941577a37d97dd55547c41952662d4975206a290342fe43d840e9357d0a6fbf6dfab3fe6

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: The latest Ron DeSantis response to Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=44170a1bbd5bcaaace0c37daa852d77dfc7d44d7991f6357c3c0640757df21f0d125211d8bbca4215f5bef399c9e62aa9f4f4cdc2429b3756390f528bd88c7176029fee2d4f7e075baa7220b53b1ea99

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e1ba328045a8c3ce363872532dddb1cd40feefeaf780dc804b85a6c334b023b13e8e741c58c7608acff787c0f8670c92038f8a140b52f7088

Friend,

We're back with your latest update on every action Governor Ron DeSantis is taking to save Americans, support Israelis, and fend off the atrocities of the Iran-backed Hamas terrorists.

Sunday night: The first DeSantis Airways plane full of Americans landed safely home in the United States.

Knowing that Joe Biden would fail to take action while hundreds of Americans were stuck in harm's way in Israel, Ron DeSantis did whatever it took to put Americans first and bring home hundreds of families and kids.

"We made a difference. And we've got more coming. So, this is the first plane load was about 270. We're going to have another plane load with probably several hundred, and maybe even a third." — Governor Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e8a0e68dd152464c0f39c058d16fe583ba5a78d83ecfce45515dfb49025f5e7277813b5a4833b7806f061de415f434dfe6175c3da2b6a53ee

On refusing to accept Gaza refugees: While some Republicans have taken the opposite stance, Ron DeSantis has been very clear: our country will NOT import refugees with a proven toxic, anti-American ideology who are taught to commit acts of terror in elementary schools.

"The one searing image I remember from September 11 was Palestinian Arabs cheering in the streets that the twin towers had come down... I just remember that so much, so vividly. Now you have a situation where you have tens of thousands of people taking to the streets of places like San Francisco cheering this on, but it shows you, we've got to be careful about who we're letting into this country." — Governor Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e1ba328045a8c3ce363872532dddb1cd40feefeaf780dc804b85a6c334b023b13e8e741c58c7608acff787c0f8670c92038f8a140b52f7088

Ron DeSantis is not backing down. He knows that nothing matters more than protecting the American people and taking action to shut our border to people full of hate for our country.

All we have to say is "not under a DeSantis presidency."

We'll continue to keep you updated on Governor Ron DeSantis' strong response to the ensuing crisis in our allied state of Israel. In the meantime,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e1ba328045a8c3ce363872532dddb1cd40feefeaf780dc804b85a6c334b023b13e8e741c58c7608acff787c0f8670c92038f8a140b52f7088
please click below if you'd like to chip in to support our campaign.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e58bbd818334248cccab37d6f9790839bf98a6843adce5e7d5bf8a3391557aeecf78000cc133175bd73d6559c74bacee767ecdbf9e55f5d59
Support the campaign with a $30 donation

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e676aa737795352ca2ec3fff62ba49e0e9f1b0b98d41a05514ef039a327725260555f14f04079ebb7ebfb93dae4464253c858359103818f05

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e148b0cb83b559f549872b11c9c31689b404cc772903686e986051691d975f218500959efc9d560e9f95797974ce473a86d7d6cf09dcef25f
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331eaa7ff1306ec485369a489bed313ef2a2256c7b9242dc2ffb0b2d06536ebd804660c501dea3619d9b95feeb651f80248c96331b628fa38f58
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e1ba328045a8c3ce363872532dddb1cd40feefeaf780dc804b85a6c334b023b13e8e741c58c7608acff787c0f8670c92038f8a140b52f7088

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d9108b3de42f331e1ba328045a8c3ce363872532dddb1cd40feefeaf780dc804b85a6c334b023b13e8e741c58c7608acff787c0f8670c92038f8a140b52f7088

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Knowing that Joe Biden would fail to take action while hundreds of Americans were stuck in harm's way in Israel, Ron DeSantis did whatever it took to put Americans first and bring home hundreds of families and kids. "We made a difference. And we've got more coming. So, this is the first plane load was about 270. We're going to have another plane load with probably several hundred, and maybe even a third." — Governor Ron DeSantis On refusing to accept Gaza refugees: While some Republicans have taken the opposite stance, Ron DeSantis has been very clear: our country will NOT import refugees with a proven toxic, anti-American ideology who are taught to commit acts of terror in elementary schools. "The one searing image I remember from September 11 was Palestinian Arabs cheering in the streets that the twin towers had come down... I just remember that so much, so vividly. Now you have a situation where you have tens of thousands of people taking to the streets of places like San Francisco cheering this on, but it shows you, we've got to be careful about who we're letting into this country." — Governor Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis is not backing down. He knows that nothing matters more than protecting the American people and taking action to shut our border to people full of hate for our country. All we have to say is "not under a DeSantis presidency." We'll continue to keep you updated on Governor Ron DeSantis' strong response to the ensuing crisis in our allied state of Israel. In the meantime, please click below if you'd like to chip in to support our campaign. Support the campaign with a $30 donation In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. ## Jordan Falls 20 Votes Short
The House plans t[o vote again today for Speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8NbETwwGAGhi7e0rWjRcIjvBSbyKaO-u-rZO52p9Ppk76v83yOVGm9fcYFQ89tjtdOB85KCjUK0LPhKWREQM0xKOud1XoEx0uQMmanQMuLuqicpNYpa2PAIFiEPHAKIEErqUbpB2P8yTtQFn224EZlrGdGYqLettO90doL5vrbDtxO17bwGkrvj53pDwYTg6kXLFTra2Mwlbbgis_9HX92ZDAZGLwfjHh3sT8wfuMm7rSIe9tSXMXROopKB4rrixJvrxffQno8qVbarWNG3pZIbwjv__v4CwAA__8-G2Cl) after Rep. Jim Jordan fell 20 votes short in the first ballot. Those were 20 GOP votes, with the 212 Democrats voting as a bloc for their leader, Hakeem Jeffries. This is the second Speaker election in 100 years to require multiple ballots, with the first being the election of ousted Speaker Kevin McCarthy in January. McCarthy failed by 19 votes on the first ballot and required 15 ballots overall to win. Today's vote is scheduled for 11 a.m. ET. If Jordan fails, [other potential candidates include](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGStCAQBOCnwQxLBhQJDP7EbP_0QmtWBmUXxQJc697-yosv7U6-7q_H9EAf_L78x42G4uKEc_EfmkTDRc9BTqqygyMCkhUNojO6k7IHXa1D79qZenLatGCRWpiVQiWN0g6e0onKD9CAFI3oG9MqZWqjQXRkXAe6F6ozTDVkfYmpfkW_l5Vc-I4fSvUctyoMaylHZvIfg5HBeF1XnegslPLd30lMwTIYz8xgXDHZ4HfiiY7zGfyMO3_5jb9isrjzDd-U-ZLwyc_M13hm4vkgfFPKfMEPBX5j-b1bMxirNNjj8iH43GmmmmVDH35d5e-bfgIAAP__Xy1pLw) Tom Emmer, the No. 3 House Republican, and Patrick McHenry, who's the current interim speaker.
## First Bionic Hand Shows Promise
A Swedish woman who was the first to receive a [robotic limb integrated via electrodes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzci4DC2B4ZIn7LlWztagM_xVZizMErapb-9aufO7_LqebvP90CZyuN_2NG3leeQGj1x1krqURqYbbf4FdEgdOi1mwYHMJqh2zyCtS5FHY3rncE4qjD0aQnRqoBDjB15owxopUc19dZOl2kw2uG0OjOM2rpJWIULNa6Xd6bSNlzzJz-xXhLvXfZba8cp4CrMTZjbgXxk_EnC3F68hyIjJt7xlCvVs8kD68lFNpYVE9ITZayBikxcWuWccZGRuFCSWyiLHKF34EAYEHD9EnBt-NEE_OuqX44X5UynG4RVjz1Q_j1qfwN9BwAA__8FnmcW) with her nervous and skeletal systems can now accomplish 80% of the tasks she could previously perform and even feel sensations in the artificial limb. The woman lost her right hand in a farming accident and was implanted with [a new human-machine interface](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp_G3q7Fn20YGLpkS9eOFoFLuJUNkSFBffsqnbt9-s5ydL6u29XRTvn-6Q60LZbN-UYv3DgDrkHITY3BRkSBckTLF7MuUmqxjsnqyKQIN-2iRhb4zUs-x8Cl5sbPYtEjWcGE5IxrZmalzGRWwRc0cRGr5moxg2IYqJVz-i6UW8K4_5QXnpMvx7jb1NqjDvJjEJdBXHrvUw7t9YaDuFRPmD2-V8dANUEvh8vQqSW4UcnkIbkc4MS7o1xBM4jP7BuVDO-_Yq4IJUIrT59AKa1no8bThkenfae6rINi98PR_ufT_s_zGwAA___hz2au) into her residual bone, nerves, and muscle in December 2018. She controls the hand with her mind. Her progress marks the first successful long-term integration of a bionic hand into a patient with a below-elbow amputation. She posted [a three-minute video last week telling her story](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAUAL8GtljwwGAGhlatt2TNaGF4xFQ4pA6x5b-v3DnrnXTSXc_D2aWc7reLm9HWWAbna1px4OzEuxOIQdJgIyKgoGi5MloJ0YGmk-XoGRoXpHeO6TaOBmFEDCpqiMILmiwwEJzxjplWStMYDVyhiQp0x6UyRDIMqZal-SnpXieMeS8rLo0vM812qvXxJOKDQE-g37at2curvkY8_EFc9RMR_UrE1379DO38eynumy42PLaUc3oqTSS7zS7l_2R9f_gXAAD__zH_Ud4).
## Hunting 'Paradise' Hits Market at Record Price
A sprawling 1,225-acre hunting ranch is for sale in Deer Park, Alabama for the asking price of $12.5 million. It comes with a 20,000-square-foot lodge complete with a trophy room, gym, movie theater, walk-in gun safe, and commercial-grade kitchen. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGnwQwLWkYkILjEbC690EJspG9RpoAZd95-azfe_A_--v7dl7ujROf-1x1oW8iL841euEjB5cRhWFS32YAIOHRo5Wj0OAwT6C5aJTevbsqEDaVSWgYlvA5idUKAcLB2ZEHAIIWchLkpZXqjQY5owgh6kmo0TAncqOXS_890toghvfMLS-_z0SUbW3tUNvxhMDOYr-vqQ_5cn5VOrPW7YTAnCljbOyGD2SW3usPx-DwbnTsv7vSRSxCCO1-w8kit8sOVD2y8oM9l45H22BW7PS5KieqomRL74Sj9PLTfSb4CAAD__zvXY2o). The property is meant for hunting and fishing enthusiasts. Outside are two 12-acre stocked fishing lakes and a duck pond. The ranch has deer, turkey, dove, quail, and ducks on more than 800 enclosed acres, along with 13 shooting houses and ladder stands. At $12.5 million, the lodge is nearly three times the price of any other home in its county. You can [see the full property listing here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNiPf2Rg8eOjClq4dkRMfcI3ByDih-fuqmbs-veHpfV3Gi-fI2_zpV3JlSqO_FX7SCFJAL1CNug5uIkJSNTkwtjNK9djVizMaJ5o8aW2vgFet0PoWutaixGDQ1-xQogIJvbSt1raxHYIhOxnsetDGVlpS4JJy8514KwtN8ZWelJtbWuvollL2o1IfFQ4VDud5NtFv4ZrTnfIajz-rwmHPaadcXhUOAK3WAG_IK4nlsRXeZrH77AMfJE4ui4iPn0d-iZjCTCL6Ox11dmE_OUY-TFdpOa-e4zui_P_kNwAA__8jqmMs) in case you're interested.

Those were 20 GOP votes, with the 212 Democrats voting as a bloc for their leader, Hakeem Jeffries. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 18, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1867, the United States bought Alaska from the Russian Empire and claimed the territory for America. The price was $7.2 million, or less than 2 cents an acre. . Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . The Flyover wouldn't land in your inbox without support from great sponsors like . If you'd like to help us keep taking off, ! | Jordan Falls 20 Votes Short The House plans t after Rep. Jim Jordan fell 20 votes short in the first ballot. Those were 20 GOP votes, with the 212 Democrats voting as a bloc for their leader, Hakeem Jeffries. This is the second Speaker election in 100 years to require multiple ballots, with the first being the election of ousted Speaker Kevin McCarthy in January. McCarthy failed by 19 votes on the first ballot and required 15 ballots overall to win. Today's vote is scheduled for 11 a.m. ET. If Jordan fails, Tom Emmer, the No. 3 House Republican, and Patrick McHenry, who's the current interim speaker. First Bionic Hand Shows Promise A Swedish woman who was the first to receive a with her nervous and skeletal systems can now accomplish 80% of the tasks she could previously perform and even feel sensations in the artificial limb. The woman lost her right hand in a farming accident and was implanted with into her residual bone, nerves, and muscle in December 2018. She controls the hand with her mind. Her progress marks the first successful long-term integration of a bionic hand into a patient with a below-elbow amputation. She posted . Hunting 'Paradise' Hits Market at Record Price A sprawling 1,225-acre hunting ranch is for sale in Deer Park, Alabama for the asking price of $12.5 million. It comes with a 20,000-square-foot lodge complete with a trophy room, gym, movie theater, walk-in gun safe, and commercial-grade kitchen. . The property is meant for hunting and fishing enthusiasts. Outside are two 12-acre stocked fishing lakes and a duck pond. The ranch has deer, turkey, dove, quail, and ducks on more than 800 enclosed acres, along with 13 shooting houses and ladder stands. At $12.5 million, the lodge is nearly three times the price of any other home in its county. You can in case you're interested. | Support Rep. Jordan for Speaker
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The House will hold another vote today for Speaker. We are close to electing Rep. Jim Jordan; he needs just a few more votes.

Virginia's lone holdout is Rep. Jen Kiggans in the 2nd District. It is disappointing that Rep. Kiggans is having trouble seeing that the majority of Republicans in this country want Rep. Jordan as Speaker of the House.

Please call her office today and urge her to vote for Rep. Jordan (number below).

I believe Rep. Jordan will be an excellent Speaker. He is a Freedom Caucus member who is serving our country well as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Before that, Rep. Jordan showed his ability to stand up to Democrats as Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee. Rep. Jordan has proved to be a true conservative and a careful manager of important congressional committees. I believe he is the best candidate for Speaker.

And another quick thank you to Reps. Bob Good and Ben Cline for voting for Rep. Jordan from the start and for Reps. Rob Wittman and Morgan Griffith for joining them after listening to their constituents.

Please call the office of Rep. Jen Kiggans and let her know Republicans everywhere are supporting Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio for Speaker of the House.

Rep. Jen Kiggans, VA-2
D.C. Office: 202-225-4215
[Email through Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00142cMiz_TDvKx7lVJ0RnZ2PwgOuRY6ma7JaGVU-_NSvGu0J_i7cNHcovwQ4UfCiEVT726LAuzLeqAr8WjUIpvwUBDJC_JjHx1wEQvfKYKRBKze_LQhfbSN4h32ps1AAzDBKwfFT4ezpxKj-5ygxgabHANfkdXJVBs&c=4Y39LzDMp-WpITTiWPNtv8j545vv5mgZfu9UnP8LhDyDhZasmUMC8w==&ch=45XIYdqW6g4V87iTqDwCzG14Qb6VLmSom2bWs0bZpNb6kwOn_s_QTA==)

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Christine Drazan
subject: Oregon education is under attack again
body:
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-r/) **Friend, last month, the Oregon State Board of Education introduced a proposal to suspend graduation standards that measure students' ability to read, write, and do math.** In response to widespread public opposition, the Board temporarily withdrew the proposal from their agenda. **However, now the proposal is back on their agenda for their upcoming meeting this Thursday, October 19.**[_**We can't stop now. Join me in urging them to permanently remove this misguided proposal from consideration.**_](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-y/) I know you agree that our students deserve rigorous standards to ensure they are well-prepared for the challenges of the real world -- to allow them to achieve their hopes and dreams for a bright future. [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-j/) What is even more concerning is the [dismissive attitude displayed by the Board Chair](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-t/) toward concerned parents and community members who oppose the suspension of these critical graduation standards. She has labeled those who hold valid concerns as engaging in "misinformation," "bigotry," and "racism."**This response to genuine stakeholder concerns about the weakening of education standards, set by the board, is disrespectful and troubling.** The Board's decision to reinstate this proposal is especially alarming given unanimous opposition in submitted testimony to the proposal from the public. [PROTECT OUR STUDENTS' FUTURES](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-i/) Friend, we cannot allow our education system's standards to be watered down. Our children's future and the future of our community hangs in the balance. [_**There is still time for us to stop them. Take action today by contacting the Oregon State Board of Education. We need all comments to be received before their meeting on October 19**_](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-d/)\--so please do your part today. Join me in support of high standards-- and a bright future for our kids. [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-h/) We can't do this without you. Please join us. It's time to tell the bureaucrats to put our kids ahead of their political agendas. Thank you for your support. Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-o/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-b/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-n/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-p/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-pkhhix-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-x) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pkhhix-dihkkhuuli-m/)
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: The situation is dire for monarch butterflies, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **The future is looking dire for monarchs. Don’t let Bayer-Monsanto wreak havoc on these butterflies and our planet. Make your $27 gift now. ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056953?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As you read this, monarch butterflies are embarking on their annual 2,500 mile migration. They’re heading to their wintering grounds. But to be honest, we’re worried. Last year, **the presence of Eastern monarchs in their Mexican wintering grounds DROPPED 22%. **
I wish I could say the outlook is better this year. But instead, I’m reaching out to you for help. If Big Pesticide corporations like Bayer-Monsanto don’t rein in Roundup production, monarchs face a bleak future. That’s because Roundup’s main ingredient -- glyphosate -- is harming monarch butterflies. [**We need Roundup out of our farming system if monarch butterflies are going to survive. Donate $27 today and fight for monarchs and the planet before we lose these precious pollinators forever. **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056957?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Glyphosate is the most widely used pesticide in the world. And it’s decimating a vital plant for monarch survival -- milkweed. Milkweed is the _**only source of food**_ for monarch caterpillars. And it’s also the only plant monarchs lay their eggs on. So with glyphosate killing milkweed, many monarchs don’t have a way to reproduce!
We’re seeing the impacts, Friend. **Monarch butterflies are at risk of extinction.** Some estimates show population declines of up to 95% since the 1990s. But the good news is that it’s not too late to save them. With help from generous supporters like you, we can give monarchs a fighting chance against greedy corporations like Bayer-Monsanto. Will you join Friends of the Earth in our fight to protect monarchs and the planet?
**Don't let the pesticide industry drive monarchs to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056953?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
A recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides -- **one-third with levels deadly to monarchs.** Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed, and their first meal may be their last.
As it stands, Roundup usage shows no signs of slowing. _**The use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup increased by over 2,600% from 1987 to 2016.**_ And as a result, milkweed plants are being virtually wiped out across the country.
But Bayer-Monsanto doesn’t seem concerned about harming butterflies as long as it gets its payday. What’s worse -- the corporation _knows how dangerous its product is._ It’s even gone so far as to MANIPULATE science to keep Roundup stocked and selling. And it’s lying to consumers, too.
That’s right, Friend. The dangers of glyphosate reach beyond monarch butterflies. Glyphosate has been linked to severe health concerns, like hormone disruption, shortened pregnancy, and even cancer. And it might surprise you to learn that **children are the most AT RISK!** Glyphosate is found in many foods, and it is being sprayed on lawns, gardens, and parks. Children playing outdoors are being exposed to this toxic chemical.
Bayer-Monsanto can’t get away with this. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late. How long will we let the pesticide industry operate this way, putting people, pollinators, and the planet in harm’s way?
**The pesticide industry can’t get away with the damage it’s doing. Rush your $27 donation now to stand up for monarchs and the planet! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056953?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
At Friends of the Earth, we are taking the fight to Congress, the Biden administration, and corporations. We’re advocating for our elected leaders to pass the Saving America’s Pollinators Act and to ban the use of key toxic pesticides. We’re pushing for monarchs to be listed and receive full protections under the Endangered Species Act. And we’re demanding retailers like Home Depot and Lowe’s stop selling Roundup in their stores and online.
In short, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet.
When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Young monarch butterflies don’t have a safe food source, and they’re dying soon after hatching. Meanwhile, monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs in the first place. Monarch populations are in freefall --**the time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save. **
With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch butterfly on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 14 people in your area today that will make a membership contribution today to help protect monarchs, people, and the planet?
**Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect monarchs, people, and our planet. Donate $27 to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056953?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2056956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Chair Ben Wikler, Wisconsin Democrats
subject: Republicans are attempting to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is our last stand for democracy.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te892d19f-9247-4faa-9678-f597441d173e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. I asked Blue Amp Action if we could reach out about the democracy emergency happening right now in Wisconsin. We’ll be honest. When we won the most important election of 2023 and flipped our Supreme Court progressive, we knew Republicans wouldn’t stop there. Now, Wisconsin Republicans are attempting to impeach, convict, and remove newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz from the Supreme Court. [We’re going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the WisDems and Blue Amp Action but let me first tell you why.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c68e66c-398f-4c39-9626-fa29051b46b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3393259b-7613-4315-85ec-1bf2820cbbd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2020, Wisconsin came the closest of any state to overturning presidential election results. A single vote on the Court stopped Republicans from overturning President Biden’s victory in Wisconsin and handing the whole election to Trump. In 2024, Republicans could try again—and without Justice Protasiewicz on the bench, their next effort to thwart democracy could be successful. The risk is too high—we must stop this threat now before it goes any further. This impeachment threat is a desperate, unconstitutional, unprecedented, and obscene power grab attacking Wisconsin voters, the courts, and our democracy. If Republicans pull this off, we know they’ll attempt to do the same in states like yours. If we want to stop this desperate attack, set an example that Democrats will protect the will of voters, and hold off Republicans’ undemocratic power grab for 2024, then we need to win this fight in Wisconsin now. There is no other option. This is our last stand for democracy. [That’s I’m asking you to chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us win this fight and protect our democracy. Are you in? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T361151e5-329f-4564-baa6-2658398ae20c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td484212a-09c3-4d25-b1d4-6102c497af82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for your support, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

Protesters in Lebanon demonstrated Tuesday outside of the U.S. Embassy
in response to an explosion in Gaza, according to Reuters. The
terrorist organization Hezbollah called for “a day of unprecedented
anger” after an explosion in Gaza that Hamas officials claimed killed
roughly 500 people, and was due to an Israeli missile strike,
according to Reuters.

Dem Gov Launches Nonprofit Aimed At Codifying Abortion Nationwide

Democratic Gov. J.B. Pritzker of Illinois launched a nonprofit
Wednesday in an effort to fight “extremism” and push pro-abortion
legislation across the country, according to an announcement on
YouTube. The 501(c)(4) nonprofit, Think Big America, is a spinoff of
Pritzker’s 2018 campaign slogan “Think Big” and is focused on
pro-abortion advocacy following the overturn of Roe v. Wade in June
2022, according to Politico.

‘Your Visa Should Be Yanked’: Marco Rubio Calls For Deporting Hamas Supporters From US
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdd7rsq0o7c38v91dq0vg0d6qs2fk38tln26vto8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdgm4pr2clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kugn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7khg6f930suiffdbiemhn9djk6mj71dtle6ojb8hl6mif8ctmmkojb9dk69r3fdd2elp39dtlkoq33cdmemhjfcjlk4qj0ttie5qb7dplk2q3bd1memj7as3geup72t9iepqq6cjnmmqqatjnk8iv0

‘Your Visa Should Be Yanked’: Marco Rubio Calls For Deporting Hamas
Supporters From US

Republican Sen. Marco Rubio of Florida said Tuesday Hamas supporters’
visas “should be yanked” by the federal government, citing
anti-terrorism laws. Demonstrations across the United States and
around the world featured speakers praising Hamas for an Oct, 7
terrorist attack on multiple locations in southern Israel that killed
over 1,400 people, including at least two dozen Americans.

body:
We are at a crucial moment in the 2023 election cycle! Ballots will be on their way this week, and voters across our state will begin to receive them in the mail. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62376225:WljcqTiHN:m:1:2610672541:C648B0AE0A513B0DB048E006ED665A36:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We are at a crucial moment in the 2023 election cycle! Ballots will be on their way this week, and voters across our state will begin to receive them in the mail. Now, more than ever, it's essential that we ensure voters have access to accurate and unbiased information beyond what they may hear from mainstream media sources. Unfortunately, the mainstream media has demonstrated an all-too-obvious bias, often operating as a communications arm of the Democrat party. We believe in the power of informed voters. That's why we are reaching out to you for your support. **_[Your generous contribution to Shift WA will help us provide more voters with the insights they need to make informed decisions about their local elections.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62376226:WljcqTiHN:m:1:2610672541:C648B0AE0A513B0DB048E006ED665A36:r)_** **_[Your donation of $100, $50, or even $25 will make a significant impact, allowing us to reach more people and provide them with the information they deserve.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62376226:WljcqTiHN:m:1:2610672541:C648B0AE0A513B0DB048E006ED665A36:r)_** Please donate now and help support transparent elections in our state. Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62376227:WljcqTiHN:m:1:2610672541:C648B0AE0A513B0DB048E006ED665A36:r)

Peter,

**_We were outraised by more than $2 million last quarter. When I asked for help to catch up to my Democrat opponent, we raised just $5,000_**.

By now you’ve likely heard that my Democrat opponent’s campaign raised $2 million more than my own in the 3rd quarter.

While money doesn’t always necessarily translate into support for a candidate, having cash on hand helps win elections that determine the future of our country.

**[When my team and I found out that we’d been outraised by more than $2 million](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=60429a19dc744b72973d5ee9002d29f1&_e=lnRZGkbfHfjyFHjSfCmk_5h32zCaw6xrgqUoxRvkvu6hMBy7btE9CbYtObrPYC4xxn0WP_wbMvSHMraE6gkQ_uXxJfrKFV-_dxJ5mW9xFHDToGzMpbGfnrIBSZFTdRoXjZu7RJgVsMP_xLU_nQPJc1iwlBy1OcY5zhhykmtX56z_lWBHlLyK1D3i7JpOMOfiIiSoM8fOEWR2R7dTlbZ9By185GtwyFT6KQg0qs9hdULu4e1axc_iGJEHYAuJbJbWSpvq8GSWqJ16GNixsKTEqhIK3VTo70F2IpiUx75loJgyy1t1ScDGc3Vky4RGr2Aa5tY5bkWnHA9fsqP7WyJU4KkeeZSi21glF2okQedJuKZVSnimVq3VDAeu7V43l43XWzw9uFQTQp4PaX7y4PixUjHiUsOnjzfSZL_DfZvOf0Q%3D)** , we got right to work on outraising my DC career politician opponent over the next three months.

name: =?utf-8?b?8J+TnSBTSUdOIE9OIFt2aWEgTWFsYW1lZCBIUV0=?=
subject: The government shutdown can still happen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Team –

Congress only has until November 17th to pass another funding bill or the government will shut down – _and extreme House GOP members are laser-focused on blocking another deal._

[](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/125?t=1&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)
**We cannot allow this to happen:** [_Tell Congress to reach a long-term agreement to keep the government open by signing our petition right away! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/125?t=2&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

[SIGN ON: We need 10,000 signatures by midnight tonight!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=3&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

Congress cannot keep kicking the can down the road.

A shutdown would result in furloughs for federal workers deemed non-essential and programs like Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, veterans’ benefits, federal law enforcement, and could experience interruptions.

And more extreme House GOP members are dead-set on tanking any chance of a long-term deal.

**Please Friend, act now before agencies and programs are shut down due to political in-fighting:** [_Sign our petition and tell Congress to get a deal done now!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/125?t=4&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=5&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

A government shutdown will affect all of us.

We need to make sure Congress hears us loud and clear.

Thank you for taking action,
Malamed HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=514%2E8507%2E-OUKZn)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6diut1v9a4uh72kgmh9ojhd1j5ttgrepq1mfhl8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdgmeo34sjh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ribk4l69ehv3672qcj9lroud61mg4gkr6qcfao_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdgmeo34sjh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj0omj50h7c4j4t60bkj85obloocvkkl1i6sdth8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdgmeo34sjh2bs)**
