name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Something the pundits miss…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This race isn’t just about beating Kari Lake. It is about taking back Kyrsten Sinema’s seat.
#

You won’t see this in the reporting, Peter.
You won’t see it in a press release.
You won’t see it just about anywhere.
But the fact is, with close to $11 million in the bank and at least a few dozen GOP billionaires behind her, Kyrsten Sinema is still someone who can shape this Arizona Senate campaign.
She’s played spoiler in the Senate a thousand times on the minimum wage, on voting rights, on reproductive health care. She literally gave working people a theatrical thumbs down on a vote for a living wage and gave the Biden administration the middle finger.
And if she peels off enough votes — with her billionaire GOP donors — she could steal this race from Ruben and hand it to the MAGA Queen Kari Lake.
That’s why this race isn’t just about beating Kari Lake. It is about taking back Kyrsten Sinema’s seat.
[**And that’s why we are asking for $3. $3 to win in Arizona. $3 to hold the Senate. $3 or whatever you can afford to donate, but please: Chip it in today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231018-1&t=1&akid=1343%2E734936%2EPab1Ps)

Together we can beat Sinema and Lake. But it’s going to take a strong team to do it.

Ruben Gallego for Arizona

*
If

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I’m concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
After being outraised by my Democrat opponent last quarter, by more than $2 million, I had hoped for a stronger response to my call for help. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_t=vRDaFlLIowrf0FscdcMN-csm8NW-D1s_iDLOArEIZXO1jik_YTD6CQVYhvs7C3UzNrZbcpjFU45lTpqqZfgYz1N1DG_rFJIbiTGEwDiRvo8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_t=vRDaFlLIowrf0FscdcMN-csm8NW-D1s_iDLOArEIZXO1jik_YTD6CQVYhvs7C3UzNrZbcpjFU45lTpqqZfgYz1N1DG_rFJIbiTGEwDiRvo8%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_e=vGV8FFeulVMq2KcaMSbrlK3sMeWH3DHwC32dU2EXrLH2-mhbSAdGVEMK3SpmL-SntChZiBG-2zLDSiq01ubAfcak68_7JhUG2cVZywF8D5ilX3qvjYCQ4sq2GPkE6oktC2zVeqz7jXbjVHFyUNddrsUFv-B7HWYOA-vKPyrssaVF5t7y7IdC_EhH_aOT5pbSlkGn2euaRaPerZC3hoODekaZpXI8pBIBmUke5s49PzvA8e21hYPiHPgCYGpTuyVEBnHorP18sIuW1US4bu9E6rf3YmV8rYIiGyC_2DFBlNPmLVjq2-y2XX2XCQgw7jXW8GUfstDnR-nHUYbtt72w2whzpc0hwsA-2z1Ywe1gE47WLZ-pmwPzo5qNVQ3QaMvTmJ-YeIVYSGy0H5lgUJNVeA3UxB-f9pWdL7XLyoeLRWU%3D)

Peter,

**_We were outraised by more than $2 million last quarter. When I asked for help to catch up to my Democrat opponent, we raised just $5,000_**.

By now you’ve likely heard that my Democrat opponent’s campaign raised $2 million more than my own in the 3rd quarter.

While money doesn’t always necessarily translate into support for a candidate, having cash on hand helps win elections that determine the future of our country.

**[When my team and I found out that we’d been outraised by more than $2 million](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_e=vGV8FFeulVMq2KcaMSbrlK3sMeWH3DHwC32dU2EXrLH2-mhbSAdGVEMK3SpmL-SntChZiBG-2zLDSiq01ubAfcak68_7JhUG2cVZywF8D5ilX3qvjYCQ4sq2GPkE6oktC2zVeqz7jXbjVHFyUNddrsUFv-B7HWYOA-vKPyrssaVF5t7y7IdC_EhH_aOT5pbSlkGn2euaRaPerZC3hoODekaZpXI8pBIBmUke5s49PzvA8e21hYPiHPgCYGpTuyVEBnHorP18sIuW1US4bu9E6jqUwaGaUXD-JIsN0L4QES2W5VEoMExHZmZ2TaQ1JeRD1C-6tCizFZvUlqhYJJfIWkxiCEh35XfGkTb6l8nBOBP1Tqypjaza1Dp2k5rNGv0iqAvKum-xaq6xLZ48rxqe29ipAZbHITeaxrZlYU5L0F0%3D)** , we got right to work on outraising my DC career politician opponent over the next three months.

**Despite the fact that my race here in Montana is going to be the one that decides whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate majority, we brought in just $5,089.**

[**SEND A SECURE DONATION TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_e=vGV8FFeulVMq2KcaMSbrlK3sMeWH3DHwC32dU2EXrLH2-mhbSAdGVEMK3SpmL-SntChZiBG-2zLDSiq01ubAfcak68_7JhUG2cVZywF8D5ilX3qvjYCQ4sq2GPkE6oktC2zVeqz7jXbjVHFyUNddrsUFv-B7HWYOA-vKPyrssaVF5t7y7IdC_EhH_aOT5pbSlkGn2euaRaPerZC3hoODekaZpXI8pBIBmUke5s49PzvA8e21hYPiHPgCYGpTuyVEBnHorP18sIuW1US4bu9E6iF-tnDv1nyeBS3El0gV4VXvB90XfTCRm8JxUa_9ZEp8M4KV4nTMtT0GQE-Wx6QqrrbwcZ6s2RwGkF-GVL09GC12NqXSFfTWeJa0xKSIpm_-e3xClFVxUXlzd_XAavuEbYXoY3rHmGjUBxrU3b9grqA%3D)
**Let me be clear:** I know that the election is more than a year away and you’re being asked by countless candidates to donate to their causes, **[but there is no more important race on the horizon right now than this one](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5cdac7d9cd43489c970c0bbfe2074334&_e=vGV8FFeulVMq2KcaMSbrlK3sMeWH3DHwC32dU2EXrLH2-mhbSAdGVEMK3SpmL-SntChZiBG-2zLDSiq01ubAfcak68_7JhUG2cVZywF8D5ilX3qvjYCQ4sq2GPkE6oktC2zVeqz7jXbjVHFyUNddrsUFv-B7HWYOA-vKPyrssaVF5t7y7IdC_EhH_aOT5pbSlkGn2euaRaPerZC3hoODekaZpXI8pBIBmUke5s49PzvA8e21hYPiHPgCYGpTuyVEBnHorP18sIuW1US4bu9E6qJvyq6LAGOO58l4QGqBSr4kL5ZHTmFg3lVh1yjTh7Ly4z9gDbrj_uz-PmLqUmJ_rnq6v_ef3OI7R8xiqmcosbmLArXD6bWEaHw-3nBtzUwjkVV_qxv82p28xWY7Bxji7_e0tFDKLnDtwVaqHy4nZ-A%3D)**.

To save America’s future, we must beat Jon Tester and flip the Senate majority. But I’ll be blunt with you - **it’s going to be tough to compete when we’re only raising $5,000 in a week**.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Jim Jordan is 17 votes away from being Speaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Breaking news: Jim Jordan, founder of the Freedom Caucus and one of the most extreme Republicans in Congress, narrowly missed being elected Speaker of the House – marking the final takeover of the Republican Party by far-right extremists.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=736%2E135344%2Ez9t-YK)

Breaking news: Jim Jordan, founder of the Freedom Caucus and one of the most extreme Republicans in Congress, narrowly missed being elected Speaker of the House – marking the final takeover of the Republican Party by far-right extremists.
Let us be clear: Not having a Speaker is bad for the country and for our democracy. Without a Speaker, everything comes to a halt. It means we can’t pass legislation or conduct the business of working for the American people. So there is real urgency to elect a Speaker and get back to work – but we simply cannot let extremists like Jim Jordan wield the gavel.
**Jim Jordan was Donald Trump’s hand-picked man for the job, because Trump knows Jordan will always push his radical agenda.** Jordan was one of Trump’s most important henchmen in the effort to overturn the results of the 2020 election. He was subpoenaed by the very institution he hopes to lead, but ignored them. He was also the author of the most aggressive nationwide ban on abortion, with zero exceptions for rape, incest or common miscarriage.
By putting forward Jim Jordan Speaker of the House, Republicans have chosen someone far outside what one would typically consider mainstream Republican: He voted to cut Social Security and privatize Medicare. And he has consistently voted against common-sense bipartisan legislation, including the PACT Act, which expanded health care to 3.5 million post-9/11 veterans and even aid to 9/11 victims themselves.
On top of that, Jordan’s priorities are disastrous for Michigan families, specifically: He voted against relief for the auto industry during the financial crisis of 2008, and voted against the Protecting the Right to Organize Act – sweeping legislation that would federally protect organizers rights to organize and form a union, as well as prevent employers from union busting. For our farmers, he had voted against every single Farm Bill that has come up during his time in Congress — quite a record when as Speaker he would have to be relied on to pass this year’s Farm Bill.
Lastly, Jim Jordan just simply doesn’t believe in governing: he has been one of the most ineffective members of Congress – never so much as managing to pass a single bill into law since he was elected almost two decades ago. But make no mistake: As Speaker of the House, Jim Jordan will have the power to push his far-right agenda and lean into the most extreme desires of the Republican party.
**Democrats are willing to find a bipartisan way forward by working across the aisle to reopen the House, but in order to do that, we need a Speaker of the House who is ready to lead. Extremists like Jim Jordan don’t belong in leadership positions.**
[**If you agree that what we need at this moment are principled leaders who will get to work on behalf of the country, then we hope you will make a contribution to Elissa’s campaign for Senate.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231018&t=2&akid=736%2E135344%2Ez9t-YK)**

But make no mistake: As Speaker of the House, Jim Jordan will have the power to push his far-right agenda and lean into the most extreme desires of the Republican party. Democrats are willing to find a bipartisan way forward by working across the aisle to reopen the House, but in order to do that, we need a Speaker of the House who is ready to lead. Extremists like Jim Jordan don’t belong in leadership positions. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Submit Your Socialized Healthcare Ballot
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._BYN1Q4CLaRsVhbYUNUQ)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’m reaching out today with a quick reminder of a hard-hitting message that my team and I continue to share on news media, on Capitol Hill, and online:

**Socialism is the wrong prescription for Americans who want quality, affordable health care.**

If you believe this as I do, please don’t delay in submitting your opinion to be considered in urgent debates over socialized health care and your medical coverage.

You know the facts: that the Left’s extravagant “Medicare for All” plan would rob Americans of their choices, increase healthcare costs and end Medicare as we know it.

If you are frustrated by politicians who think more government is the answer to every problem, and who want to put your healthcare choices in the hands of Washington bureaucrats instead of your own doctor, we need your help today to stand firm against socialized healthcare.

Please use the link below to submit your opinions in our Ballot on Socialized Healthcare:

**[[Submit Your Ballot]](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._MzV6gyrJuqSkTbdp-6VjA)**

The facts make it clear that one-size-fits-all, government-run health care is wrong for America. Heritage is the conscience of conservatives on this key issue — reminding them that they campaigned on promises to fight big government and that they now MUST follow through on their promises to you and all U.S. taxpayers by fighting socialized health care.

To fight socialism, we must expose the costs and dangers of government-rationed health care. So please don’t delay. Submit your ballot today:

**[[Submit Your Ballot]](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-CqRyxkFMfbQ)**

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

subject: Do you have a minute?
body:
I've got 2 important things to share with you

| |

| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znogo56hot7i6sk14hn8r7o3tqkijj0voad16tj0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs)

Friend - can we talk?

There's something I need to share with you.

---
| | [READ MY MESSAGE HERE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zivv4mrdrs0u2de4tlsd2d78q4satodnd75f1bmo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs)
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztl7a7t45ju1702af61ja8hqd8ut9uomv652013o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsgumb1its29as9ae6kjigm98p3snhvp9rm8633o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9pvo73maq1igh8ihii5sflqen0kb3q50n12fe8o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6kfl2gqe19henmf2nb3194l3vefgt76fiva2jag_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjb1uogjr42h658a48n2a9ihl8fd56qe5q78gq58_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3umog9e2id8f4ept0nk3g94njqb37j09fk7en6o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtag2k095u3lt8rgavqt54dsghfpk2sgovks6b0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim8p32c1h2bs)
---

name: Jordan (Team DeSantis)
subject: Up to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=153510133f54cca4fa9bfda594fef51465697f1fe41d829983c76b024a881541ff2244bc6c46e8d72562c55bd7e1e11960dcfaf298e192f73c1f54bcf8dd1bdc1d80602988d0e53a5dd93ce7e1fdaca0

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09f8554d1c8cd8eaa7b912d8e3ecba4915cef3e8c5c57176cce6abb33e079761ab65d3b611e0db4283143cdf75dd71011c48bf64f4bd572451

Hi friend,

Support for our team has come pouring in since we announced the $15 million fundraising haul we were able to achieve last quarter and the plans we're putting into action to win at the Iowa Caucus in January.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09f8554d1c8cd8eaa7b912d8e3ecba4915cef3e8c5c57176cce6abb33e079761ab65d3b611e0db4283143cdf75dd71011c48bf64f4bd572451
Add Your Support

That's right, we're getting more boots on the ground in Iowa, investing in television ads, and watching our momentum explode over all 99 counties of the Hawkeye State!

And it's not just our campaign team that's hitting the trail—it's the whole DeSantis family!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09f8554d1c8cd8eaa7b912d8e3ecba4915cef3e8c5c57176cce6abb33e079761ab65d3b611e0db4283143cdf75dd71011c48bf64f4bd572451

"The years are short, the days are long, and it just goes by in the blink of an eye... and that's why you see [our kids] on the campaign trail with us, because we don't want to miss these opportunities." — Casey DeSantis

EVERYBODY who believes in Ron DeSantis for President is giving everything they've got to make sure our message is everywhere, and it's paying off.

"It does start with Iowa. That's where we're going to make the mark. But we're going to be all-in on all those states. And you know, all those guys, all the chatter that they do, they've been wrong for years. People were chattering about my reelection as governor, saying we weren't running a good campaign, that we were sputtering, and I won the biggest victory that we've ever seen in the state of Florida for a Republican." — Governor Ron DeSantis

We have to make sure we're giving our all from here, too. It's our turn to step up to the plate and make sure no stone is left unturned in the early states.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce096016810fb7b11ed45f555aa84170b20a21b89c8b916c0af757e74e55a45409a3db5fdd963f8a2af66a40a4d8b2b27d4858865b07ce737e6d
Rush in $25 now

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09a989899864637f24d9a417c7735b70e1085c69998a48489dac2d6fdb6919b5646802ec774943db6a4903efdf7f28041d18b6adb678a6da26
Rush in $50 now

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce0906a2d9a1f5cd8e5bfc4885a0e851a7265b06e6d5b65ce60fac75aef1b2687cc90113f330f5989305c6dd17ee9553d65f1fec7d1b8ebf301b
Rush in $75 now

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09e7e857f2999599439ab58df6f672074632ab01039ef41fc4e4c2e601de6ad90f1e023cd47824ef8376712774227dd220178c8fd203f638e2
Rush in $100 now

This is our moment to grow our team and break through to millions of voters across the early states. From now until the first nominating states choose their pick for President, it's an all-out blitz to raise as much money as possible and show the Governor how much support he has across the country.

We need our whole team, whether you've been with us since we launched or if you just joined after witnessing more and more of Joe Biden's failures, to step up NOW to make sure we don't have to slow down.

We won't let the incredible fight Gov. DeSantis displayed go to waste.

In Freedom,

Jordan

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce0989cafa84f88b3c2f82af61ee3421c8bdce46d356f8315273901f1d339dd2d846a0a2cf65b067d8cfcf42f3b75155038d38377b735360dd85
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09f8554d1c8cd8eaa7b912d8e3ecba4915cef3e8c5c57176cce6abb33e079761ab65d3b611e0db4283143cdf75dd71011c48bf64f4bd572451

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf5fbb5622b1ce09f8554d1c8cd8eaa7b912d8e3ecba4915cef3e8c5c57176cce6abb33e079761ab65d3b611e0db4283143cdf75dd71011c48bf64f4bd572451

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Do you have a minute?
body:
I've got 2 important things to share with you

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AJLMVLRYQbTe9VFDXTcXiA&sysid=1)
---

Friend, it's Nikki.

Moment to talk?
| | | [CLICK TO READ MY MESSAGE HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FuQl%2flN1lPIO27W4COQ14g&sysid=1)
---

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AJLMVLRYQbTe9VFDXTcXiA&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t%2fYKP%2b62l4SQ%2bq2NyeUqcQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TCsZgeQ7L1PmgbMahK7Gaw&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rnLTv0dAIWxUcBtjGZ5HHA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rK8%2fsTl9xUUOeRs9I7EwjA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULtdIMbWvTCbS4ZA7QLbiQ&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PqgLdqR9bvRun9XuM0HyNg&sysid=1)

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd0456gtt54r80cpkqfud50vr90bt9g9pne9dn5g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim4o32cjh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrt36tjfv3l4j5r0ijmmo7se51kung6thabm01ho_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim4o32cjh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Box 4217 Hopkins, MN 55343 United States **

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Peter, Since Day One, our campaign has been committed to being transparent with supporters like you about what we need to win next November. And that’s why we’re emailing you now. **It’s as simple as this: If we don’t meet our goals, we will reach fewer voters, host fewer events, and even risk giving our MAGA opponents an advantage ahead of next year.**
But if we DO meet our goals, we will have the resources to maximize our efforts on every front and ensure our best chance of reelecting Joe and Kamala next November.
Believe us when we tell you that grassroots donations of any amount make up the vast majority of our campaign’s funds. Peter, folks like YOU will decide whether or not we can execute a winning campaign over the next year.
[**So we’re asking you directly: Will you please give $25 today? clean_body: We’ll be transparent with you about how our campaign is going. | | | Peter, Since Day One, our campaign has been committed to being transparent with supporters like you about what we need to win next November. And that’s why we’re emailing you now. We’ve made incredible progress since we launched this campaign, but we have to keep our fundraising strong to fund our organizing efforts and digital outreach. Your support also helps us put on in-person events, call and text voters across the country, keep our ads on the air, and more. That’s why meeting our fundraising goals is critical -- especially as we wrap up 2023 and look ahead to 2024, which is why we have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | It’s as simple as this: If we don’t meet our goals, we will reach fewer voters, host fewer events, and even risk giving our MAGA opponents an advantage ahead of next year. But if we DO meet our goals, we will have the resources to maximize our efforts on every front and ensure our best chance of reelecting Joe and Kamala next November. Believe us when we tell you that grassroots donations of any amount make up the vast majority of our campaign’s funds. Peter, folks like YOU will decide whether or not we can execute a winning campaign over the next year. | | We’re so proud of this team. Supporters like you are the backbone of our campaign, and we couldn’t do this without you. Thank you for being on our side. \-- Team Biden-Harris

It’s Tim Kaine. With Election Day just around the corner, I want to tell you why it’s so important we defend our Senate majority and flip the House of Delegates in Virginia this November. Gov. Youngkin and his extreme Republican allies are laser-focused on securing a right-wing trifecta to attack Virginians’ fundamental freedoms – including voting and abortion rights. State Democrats are the only thing standing in their way – your support in this moment is paramount. **This is the first time the entire state legislature has been up for election since the Supreme Court’s devastating decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ – and with polls showing control of the VA legislature within the margin of error, Virginia's status as the sole remaining Southern state without an abortion ban is in jeopardy.** Voters are casting their ballots as you read this, so I’m asking you to make a donation to DLCC PAC – the organization dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures: [Will you pitch in to help fuel state Democrats across the finish line in Virginia and nationwide? $7 could mean the difference between a Democratic win or loss. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgp10wjcIirrjSr9W-mGkwwYb-skHmi0MVu1HChrUTWm-_ERbO_Zgy1-I0rslgu_rYV-IF9zbZGvrFUKOUTKHk3v6_t2i2RSBRMxrOC1ByDTbn4aSPxdrAkdhqarnxJAQTscHCE5A8vTECROOgQul6KrNJlCq7sXBgqbsUoT-E6fElZ0j6-tizuFRYlY65aIllrNIxISaH7iOrQ-HUy4HP1lfj0JWixwXqQ2xn1977aiJFuTadmeeH5dKuzcVXSQ4Ikz5wNMi5rPdsUDmbo75nHt0mZK8YKP6BBx3Wq9DcMg0w44JjLXKCl0ghkYL-UXqbe1ARjF_YauwruU1r3gdJpP7OZheJgKC-3LwF4I4ojL5qxncRiITKa_hHEN7eUgbIFyrVR_4-8qEbYbVFvRqZeHw/40j/CmTGfECfRW65jx0OBKJ2dw/h0/JZB9YVUqqLpEClIVR7p2mHI2UO12GSUdRIi6h6jO5_s) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Over the past year, we’ve watched Democratic-led statehouses defend voting rights, protect reproductive freedom, and take action on climate change. We’ve also watched Republican-controlled legislatures build barriers to the ballot box, attack reproductive rights, and undermine our democratic processes.
**It’s clear that who we elect to state legislatures matters – for the well-being of ourselves, our communities, and our country.**
That’s why I’m asking you to take action today and support state Democrats running in Virginia and all across the country. Representation matters, and it’ll take all of us working together to elect legislators who will make meaningful progress for families everywhere.
[Please, join me in supporting state Democrats in Virginia and beyond – your donation will go directly toward helping elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgp10wjcIirrjSr9W-mGkwwYb-skHmi0MVu1HChrUTWm-_ERbO_Zgy1-I0rslgu_rYV-IF9zbZGvrFUKOUTKHk3v6_t2i2RSBRMxrOC1ByDTbn4aSPxdrAkdhqarnxJAQTscHCE5A8vTECROOgQul6KrNJlCq7sXBgqbsUoT-E6fElTS6bsLoMQvhucgRPXmcLu_LRnPwRtNGNrhgwDXxEgnFZNPb3xXC9tBRKBnnH4OGCDienRAVrZRBM06X96skdAaGAlu6WVxItH9VtFp_iVLhRbRaQo5oAvObdSXo5VAdVPQ-stl_7oEWv96BwxhN3Kpp1qPn78FAoloiQED59dxJ9ylwhm5LnyDuMRnistZSpZ3tMOevUvq0a6p9ZDhjCxeU29iscq2cW9yfd1wLUdXg/40j/CmTGfECfRW65jx0OBKJ2dw/h6/DX3GtcBvluoMXJswfNhqCLoxl0dxo1ts1M4rs8l0Z_I)

clean_body: | | | | | ---|--- It’s Tim Kaine. With Election Day just around the corner, I want to tell you why it’s so important we defend our Senate majority and flip the House of Delegates in Virginia this November. Gov. Youngkin and his extreme Republican allies are laser-focused on securing a right-wing trifecta to attack Virginians’ fundamental freedoms – including voting and abortion rights. State Democrats are the only thing standing in their way – your support in this moment is paramount. This is the first time the entire state legislature has been up for election since the Supreme Court’s devastating decision to overturn Roe v. Wade – and with polls showing control of the VA legislature within the margin of error, Virginia's status as the sole remaining Southern state without an abortion ban is in jeopardy. Voters are casting their ballots as you read this, so I’m asking you to make a donation to DLCC PAC – the organization dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Over the past year, we’ve watched Democratic-led statehouses defend voting rights, protect reproductive freedom, and take action on climate change. We’ve also watched Republican-controlled legislatures build barriers to the ballot box, attack reproductive rights, and undermine our democratic processes. It’s clear that who we elect to state legislatures matters – for the well-being of ourselves, our communities, and our country. That’s why I’m asking you to take action today and support state Democrats running in Virginia and all across the country. Representation matters, and it’ll take all of us working together to elect legislators who will make meaningful progress for families everywhere. I appreciate your support, Tim Tim Kaine U.S. Senator, Virginia Sen. Kaine is only asking for donations to DLCC’s PAC contribution account, in amounts up to $5,000 from individuals, political committees, and other permissible sources under the Federal Election Campaign Act. Team, this is HUGE: According to a recent poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 52 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**

These far-left advocacy groups have been attacking me nonstop since the beginning of the year with false and negative attacks. Their main goal is to defeat me so they can replace me with another rubber stamp for Joe Biden’s failed agenda. But I have never backed down to the radical left – and I won’t start now. Friend, in order to get our ad fund off on the right track, we need to raise $10,000 in the next week. We need your help. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

subject: Tell NBC moderators of the Republican presidential debate to fact-check the candidates in real time >>
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign your name: Tell moderators of the next Republican presidential debate to fact-check the candidates in real time >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T609cc0ac-49a5-4a64-8736-3304a5e7e78f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T372daf58-74da-4068-8f82-e08ede96bb7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The next Republican presidential primary debate will take place on NBC, on November 8. No doubt Trump will skip this one too, but that doesn’t mean there will be any shortage of lies and misinformation from the other candidates on the debate stage. We can most likely count on a ton of BS and conspiracy theories from the likes of Ron DeSantis, Mike Pence, and others, so we need the debate moderators to call out these lies in real time. Boldly, directly, and unambiguously. This is their job. They need to do it. They can't just allow lies to be broadcast on live TV. Add your name now: [Tell moderators of the Republican presidential debate to fact-check the candidates in real time >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bdd165a-22a5-4e18-9169-f788e4122bb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24d7fffd-acca-44f8-91bd-9e6a5fb5b2c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2nfsTSQnWiukf2b0Iy4ySjwM/UTTLeaX57Gy4)
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Dear friend, I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you. Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
---
| [ ](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2nfuMRxIphTz74xK78RTFTss/sfK5NzYTLIMs)
---
| I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith. Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause. Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask — [**will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between No Dem Left Behind and my campaign?**](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2nfwFRTo8g3DZ7JdvIny2DpO/MMNA7a6IKjs2) If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it. I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company. We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school. This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.) While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. **In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.** These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office. And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day. [**If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $20 to split between No Dem Left Behind and my campaign.**](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2nfy8R0JRecS19fxjTASoxlu/PWPTvt-GbRFd)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | | [ Chip in $20](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng01QWokdBgTC2HXdWxbhiQ/2PtVQVa23BYY)
---
| | | [ Chip in $50](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng1uQ3K3bkuvEObLntSORew/mJs7RygotsvH)
---
| | | | [ Chip in $100](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng3nPZpMaK9NGkv9yFxBBbS/SIsPPqH4IQ3y)
---
| | | [ Chip in $250](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng5gP6KfYtNpJ7Ey8cRxvXy/mWnLc4sLtQgf)
---
| | | | [ RUSH $500 >>](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng7ZOcpyXScHLTYmIywkfUU/5at2-UA6_0Ga)
---
| | | [ Other Amount](https://r.news.ruralorganizers.com/mk/cl/f/sh/7nVU1aA2ng9SO9LHW1qjNpsaTLRXPR0/9HV33dSstvlF)
---
| | | | Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause. Shalom.
---
|
---
| Adam
---

---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision (Kari Lake’s launch)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important time of the race so far.
#

Peter -
Kari Lake launched her campaign for the United States Senate.
Besides the day we launched, this is probably the most important time of the race so far.
But hang on a minute. Put that aside for a second. Because right now, I want to talk to you about my decision to run in the first place.
When I made the decision to run for Senate in Arizona, it was to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her vote in the Senate with someone who actually cares about the people of our state.
That was reason enough for me.
But now, Kari Lake is running. The MAGA Queen. Someone who has no problem lying, spreading misinformation — even calling for her supporters to commit violence on behalf of Donald Trump.
I lived through January 6th. I heard the shouts from the mob while I was on the House floor, barricading the doors and helping my colleagues evacuate to safety. I know what Kari Lake means for our democracy.
So now, this campaign is not just about getting another vote in the Senate. It’s not just about our priorities. It still is those things, but it’s about defending our democracy now, too.
And that is a lot of pressure. Trust me... I’m feeling it. I expect you are, too. But you are not alone in this fight. I’m with you, and thousands of others are, too.
Right now, a lot of them are making donations after Kari Lake jumped in the race. They’re hoping that you will join them. Because they know that is how we will win this race.
So please, I am asking you very humbly:
[**Can you contribute $3 to our campaign today? Lots and lots of people adding donations is the only way we’ll hold the Senate. That’s the only way we’ll defend it from Kari Lake.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231018-1-r&t=1&akid=1346%2E734936%2EISXL1j)

Republicans can’t get their act together. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71766752/433206901/1420976906?refcode=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDliMmRmOC1jNjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C96r7ALFqaBLPtUSXfsneIaiK2HoHCP1fRRpCTyz8BM=&emci=7a7410f0-366d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)

House Republicans are in complete disarray. My opponent, Rep. Anthony D’Esposito, and the rest of his caucus wasted another day on Capitol Hill plunging the People’s House into chaos. Not only did they fail to elect a new House Speaker. They attempted to nominate Jim Jordan, of all people — a far-right extremist who led the fight to overturn the 2020 election and hasn’t passed a bill in his 16 years in Congress. To make matters worse, the GOP’s partisan circus show now puts us at 15 days (and counting) without a Speaker. My opponent likes to call himself a “problem solver,” yet he’s wasted time making symbolic throwaway votes for Speaker and caving to every last demand his GOP bosses make of him. The fact is, House Republicans are completely unable to govern. This is a disgrace to our country, and you deserve better. **The dysfunction in the House isn’t just embarrassing for our country — it’s extremely dangerous.** Washington can’t make any progress for the American people or our allies abroad until Republicans get their act together. And to top it off, the government is on the brink of running out of funds in less than a month. **The only solution is for Democrats to take back the House in 2024, and that fight begins right here in New York’s 4th Congressional District.** **_[Democrats need a net gain of five seats to flip the House next year, and experts agree that our district is one of the most likely to flip. With the stakes this high, I have to ask: Can I count on your donation to help me turn this seat blue and elect a majority that will prioritize people over politics?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71766753/433206902/1307708269?refcode=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDliMmRmOC1jNjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C96r7ALFqaBLPtUSXfsneIaiK2HoHCP1fRRpCTyz8BM=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | _[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71766754/433206903/1307708269?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bd9b2df8-c66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDliMmRmOC1jNjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C96r7ALFqaBLPtUSXfsneIaiK2HoHCP1fRRpCTyz8BM=)_

Friend, I'll cut to the chase: **the Biden Administration just proposed a new rule that illegally mandates social, environmental, and race-based regulations for infrastructure projects.** President Biden knows that Congress would NEVER approve his radical climate agenda... which is why he goes around them and entrusts power to unelected bureaucrats who lack any real sense of accountability. Those bureaucrats make decisions based on arbitrary standards, directly harming Virginians' well-being. **Well,****friend****, I won 't stand for that. _[Will you?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2936a1050bff4b63a6f2a2805aca8d10&_e=NbxJ4VQPpT8SXb18yWx2vVJmPhuk8onhftRpFxEWvvdoX4jr6DKzTgjYX7MRxgYVEfxs6kP7n7AS0PAxRGen49Fii9eBwjlIhrefLa3YHj1DFbQwJ25QM7gRyv1yvDqYRFgpYqyH1AmGg8m9taB5pEEe1rozSjW2wyDCJtNMi3OAYDRg0ZdvUuBOih_7RGnlGntIrtnnZmpd2-Z_Q4SbJ2hWvD0G7vVmPGdILfx4xxrC1ckksxGfjzGZE_RvvBI9L90O6myTOpzU6sZdf77NwAvxhXuxQWPuHQ6hkIY4Pl1yLcgBCITU8G2OAoFu9NyPWIuK6sMvEkEj4U-9k0qGp_xmuCMKebM5Q8mzAtV3w1cTo06S42pKEPouiO-hueKHu1_IXidcXOUgMigBxfZD73JcudX7rLCSmIwh9OXYjYpyZCpNYUPP-MVqkrY2TAQBh61Mk4eEkCx0AcoeSsxV7UZyTCXfF7krPaBwKPVbyDY-38sRG5hX3Y4zSi3Y3zfW)_**
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2936a1050bff4b63a6f2a2805aca8d10&_e=NbxJ4VQPpT8SXb18yWx2vVJmPhuk8onhftRpFxEWvvdoX4jr6DKzTgjYX7MRxgYVEfxs6kP7n7AS0PAxRGen49Fii9eBwjlIhrefLa3YHj1DFbQwJ25QM7gRyv1yvDqYRFgpYqyH1AmGg8m9taB5pEEe1rozSjW2wyDCJtNMi3OAYDRg0ZdvUuBOih_7RGnlGntIrtnnZmpd2-Z_Q4SbJ2hWvD0G7vVmPGdILfx4xxrC1ckksxGfjzGZE_RvvBI9L90O6myTOpzU6sZdf77NwAvxhXuxQWPuHQ6hkIY4Pl1yLcgBCITU8G2OAoFu9NyPWIuK6sMvEkEj4U-9k0qGp87CBQrcH_C2UPzFt4j2_pkuGSliIuotXjjfAVx93PwgJ-iZ5OGUnQrR1lxdxVhyeGAmuivrq2zU9YtPDNGFmlfWzA78nZJPkBDzQ7IeO9GQTvUTX4SnBTFv4QBt-pVWIyEspnu8vN2IrO5FU2vH2lo8dj7xccW4Y6NYdsBMvoc2)
---
How bad are these latest regulations? Let me break down what they mean for you:
* **HIGHER PRICES** for your energy
* **MORE** delays for infrastructure projects like housing, roads, and bridges
* _And that 's if they are even built at all! _

In fact, the combination of rising prices and increased red tape will likely _CANCEL many critical infrastructure projects._ I don't need to tell you what that will do to Virginia's economy when our people are ALREADY struggling under crippling inflation. As an American, I'm angry. And as Attorney General, I've already joined with dozens of other state attorneys general to oppose this bureaucratic overreach. **I 'm ready to fight this latest round of President Biden's green tape -- are you with me, friend? If you are, _[donate](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2936a1050bff4b63a6f2a2805aca8d10&_e=NbxJ4VQPpT8SXb18yWx2vVJmPhuk8onhftRpFxEWvvdoX4jr6DKzTgjYX7MRxgYVEfxs6kP7n7AS0PAxRGen49Fii9eBwjlIhrefLa3YHj1DFbQwJ25QM7gRyv1yvDqYRFgpYqyH1AmGg8m9taB5pEEe1rozSjW2wyDCJtNMi3OAYDRg0ZdvUuBOih_7RGnlGntIrtnnZmpd2-Z_Q4SbJ2hWvD0G7vVmPGdILfx4xxrC1ckksxGfjzGZE_RvvBI9L90O6myTOpzU6sZdf77NwAvxhXuxQWPuHQ6hkIY4Pl1yLcgBCITU8G2OAoFu9NyPWIuK6sMvEkEj4U-9k0qGp9MDSZBmLjKbPlNH29CSXU4QJDc5tb8Mz5FOhN1xUzMYn588x-KwySNIaYopwuHeQXFO99FU2-nj_SdZO44NAtLoszlC87Tl4Ht8-uddX0ghyCuMfoKrhFz_WkU6IL9lU9ljLK3OTHQhVhvBmJmuX66ho_oM65PVk1j8ztBhjg7O)_**** now.**

**_President Donald Trump._**

[**NO**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=931ce41805e34f97b8e29ce30e1aedc9&_e=zyl6kcF047iv2L1eQkb3oHoePCSiOMkdy5OndB57dOPEIggvlBSTDmVv1STiSNUd2yrizR5Q1dcFydTPlbnXFKlkd28GiEiH6oTQkNRwvreBIpFFkepsZ6tUGuqG0oT-nJ2DZAt8rVXsSRYz_pZXpOg6VYVOj9Rw-P4HwVeK2J2PwLPKENPiOOfUnubBBxgxhHHByck4jjolL7-rthlzsSZyQBW97KKO-xPGKePxXTleFGRM3TiGjwLB5QnYzcuZcOcj0m_gg6ymDNG8dhaHggr8djazDxbZ93RfvtOOIWw7WYkei31PDlbCR7mtncM__v3h-fpNZAAnAb1zCTgD8zRl1_L6DA87SJuNPwfLzYil6c34mllUGjr6c_M5KwJgHIvyLj0r6IlUUMiLGp3IPQ%3D%3D)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Congress is broken. This is how we fix it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The American people are fed up with dysfunction. So am I. In the midst of horrific wars around the world and a massive affordability crisis at home, Congress can’t govern. It’s not just because the Republicans sabotaged themselves by removing the Speaker, it’s because too many politicians have lost sight of why they are in Washington – to represent We the People in the People’s House.

Right now, politicians are more concerned with scoring points on social media, raising money for their next election, or landing their next job. In other words, they are putting self-interest and special interest ahead of public interest.

What we need is a bold anti-corruption plan that Democrats can run on and implement when we take back Congress to ensure elected officials put people and country first over partisanship. I have created a comprehensive plan, with bipartisan support, that delivers just that.

Sign the petition: We must fix our broken political system. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=+j1frmqQaFgp4WhvhEHyzTkCqIuL1c1FO5rnjHsMoSi3c9zcI4gomZjAFI97HRzBPcq/yaLVK/tkupTWZA9x9k32RhiFlrSH7Xbfrpcf70IPVgA+KEwj3fltlEBQy0JisQi63YChIa9nQbF4YgNMHA==]

[https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1710058048092336561]

My anti-corruption plan will ban all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress; ban members of Congress from trading stocks; enact term limits for members of Congress and Supreme Court Justices; and ban Congress members from ever becoming lobbyists.

It’s time to eliminate corruption, big money and dysfunction from the halls of Congress.

Sign if you agree: We must take action to eradicate corruption in Congress. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=+j1frmqQaFgp4WhvhEHyzTkCqIuL1c1FO5rnjHsMoSi3c9zcI4gomZjAFI97HRzBPcq/yaLVK/tkupTWZA9x9k32RhiFlrSH7Xbfrpcf70IPVgA+KEwj3fltlEBQy0JisQi63YChIa9nQbF4YgNMHA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=+j1frmqQaFgp4WhvhEHyzTkCqIuL1c1FO5rnjHsMoSi3c9zcI4gomZjAFI97HRzBPcq/yaLVK/tkupTWZA9x9k32RhiFlrSH7Xbfrpcf70IPVgA+KEwj3fltlEBQy0JisQi63YChIa9nQbF4YgNMHA==]

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Blue Ohio 2024
subject: The Jim Jordan Agenda →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769058/433215426/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.10.18_b1_bo24_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTNkNmQ3Zi1jYTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6R-UJsjCOGypkeTQOcWHsqY6vjWXrBDnGRaHCwSIuk=)
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Corey Stapleton
subject: U.S. Presidential Candidate Corey Stapleton Bows Out of Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Corey Stapleton for U
body:
Corey Stapleton Bows Out
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | |
#### Former Montana Secretary of State 'Pay It Forward' Optimism, International 'Peace Through Strength' at Odds With Current GOP
---
| [ ](https://6kiy9.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBo1D2jlws24iY9SQV/4-VkovdDJqYK)
---
| **BILLINGS, Mont., October 13, 2023 (Newswire.com):**
---
| Former Montana Secretary of State Corey Stapleton has dropped out of the 2024 Presidential race. The Republican former naval officer and businessman was the first Republican to announce his candidacy in November 2022, with a "Pay it Forward" campaign slogan aimed at balanced budgets, better U.S. education systems, and support for American institutions. Stapleton visited Ukraine earlier this year, expressing American support for Ukraine against the Russian invasion, and called for reduced American rhetoric against the United States' large trading partners, China and Mexico. Stapleton promised he would submit an Immigration and Border Security bill to Congress in his first 100 days as President and create military and trade agreements facilitating 200 years of peaceful trade and prosperity between China and the United States. "China is our economic rival, not our enemy," said Stapleton. Corey Stapleton is a U.S. Naval Academy graduate who served as Montana Secretary of State from 2017 to 2021, certifying the 2020 Presidential election. This year he made several campaign visits to New Hampshire and Iowa, attended the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC), and recently spoke at The American Democracy Summit in Los Angeles and World Affairs council in New Hampshire. _**"I wasn't able to break through," Stapleton said.**_
---
|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | I need you to understand why these next few hours are so critical, Peter: – After 15 days of total dysfunction, House Republicans still have not elected a new Speaker. – The People’s House is at a standstill as Team Extreme devolves into chaos, crisis and confusion. | | | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Hakeem Jeffries and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately: | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: 500 Signatures Needed [via Team Cooper]
subject: We cannot allow this, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Sign on to stand with Roy >>>
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769589/433217117/823540626?refcode=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwMjAzOC1jYjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2A36K38kPywbtyn_02OXOs9hUR9mQNM0f7jjeNyLN-8=&emci=bd761efc-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, **North Carolina Republicans have abused our redistricting process to gain unfair power.** Their district maps have been obvious partisan power grabs to give some voters more of a say than others and make it _harder_ for Democratic candidates to win. That’s what they’re planning again this fall, Peter. Roy is working hard to ensure that every single North Carolinian has their voice heard in elections to come and that power is not simply consolidated in the hands of the few, including by calling for a **Nonpartisan Redistricting Committee** to ensure fair district lines. **[If you agree that power belongs in the hands of the people — not partisan politicians — please sign on in support of a Nonpartisan Redistricting Committee today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769590/433217118/-310767572?refcode=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwMjAzOC1jYjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2A36K38kPywbtyn_02OXOs9hUR9mQNM0f7jjeNyLN-8=&emci=bd761efc-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769591/433217119/-310767572?refcode=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwMjAzOC1jYjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2A36K38kPywbtyn_02OXOs9hUR9mQNM0f7jjeNyLN-8=&emci=bd761efc-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
North Carolina is a toss-up state and our political representation should reflect that reality. But under their own state legislative maps, Republicans drew themselves into a one-vote supermajority — and they’d do the same with our federal maps, too, if given the chance.
In the past, Republicans’ ultra-partisan maps have been thrown out by the courts. Now that the state Supreme Court is under the control of the far-right, we can’t predict what will happen.
[**That’s why we can’t allow gerrymandering to get that far. We have to institute a fairer process NOW. Sign on to stand with Roy and demand a Nonpartisan Redistricting Committee draw our new maps >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769592/433217120/-310767572?refcode=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwMjAzOC1jYjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2A36K38kPywbtyn_02OXOs9hUR9mQNM0f7jjeNyLN-8=&emci=bd761efc-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71769593/433217121/-310767572?refcode=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwMjAzOC1jYjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2A36K38kPywbtyn_02OXOs9hUR9mQNM0f7jjeNyLN-8=&emci=bd761efc-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=85b02038-cb6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Education Freedom - A Lunch Discussion
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571183?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Mississippi is now surrounded by states that have either implemented education freedom (Arkansas), or are moving towards it (Alabama, Louisiana). **Why aren’t we?

Corey DeAngelis, one of the leading advocates for education freedom, is coming to Jackson to talk about the benefits of giving parents control over their tax dollars. ******Corey will be****explaining how Arkansas-type reform could work for our state, driving up standards and giving every family opportunities that today only rich people enjoy. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4bf0b416ce&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve your place_
| Perhaps the most exciting innovation in education freedom in our state this year is the establishment of ACE scholarships. At this event, David Olson of ACE Scholarships will explain how ACE scholarships work – and introduce a young student that has benefited from the program. Come and listen to what a life-changing opportunity school choice brings for Mississippi families!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=64a6d2ac6d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

At this event, David Olson of ACE Scholarships will explain how ACE scholarships work – and introduce a young student that has benefited from the program. Come and listen to what a life-changing opportunity school choice brings for Mississippi families! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

## Is This Ezekiel 38?
---
Ever since **1500 Islamic Jihadists** aka _Hamas_ terrorized and slaughtered innocent Israelis like savage animals on Saturday, October 7, I have been repeatedly asked is this apart of **End Times Biblical Prophecy**? The specific question is this: **"Are we watching Ezekiel 38 unfold before us?"** This WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2659371.904.1.32c4e38cac1d7986c7954da215be88f2) Tulsa & OKC, I will attempt to answer that question. We will pause our series on the Book of Acts and address the **Israel vs Hamas War** and its' implications... name: Marco Rubio, me (2)
subject: Why I’m supporting Maria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, it's Marco Rubio.
---
I reached out to you earlier about my friend and colleague Maria Elvira Salazar, and so many of you stepped up to support her in her fight to defend Miami. **[But right now, we need 205 more patriots to join the fight so we can hold on to this top-target district in 2024.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=cb5712e79e834689b5277109980a70cd&_e=RiY6naKLqnd7xqEQrQcXrPfKrPEcTewun319GEY_8eePxDm34jilmDiZYYAmT-W-rsEhz7wJT9QsSIQ1zgFrdrniehATO4adJxbtB5AowVeEwRDgs6b_BMmwB7n0rdxd2Sy-_1-jFX1vCppP0-SVd9RPFz3iX-xh84hmNfM1cYSg1791wanZhvEM6P3S0GA7bLXKUq9YsJ7a4Mts8qZUVCOHOaV3ja1JxnDjruiAHrBWtJJyQenvKlVosrRRmIpwEmbsrRzITbkErmxJgFaSH_z7v7kaax_VOawOFQOmdNRK7ipGq4sdBKkeREeCjz-DZXF0cllD6SP4VsqN3vd7cKR6vdS6HtmkFnvIi4YIf14%3D)** Maria has been an incredible ally in our fight to make sure the socialism of Cuba never reaches America, and now, she needs us to step up for her. **[Will you pitch in today to help Maria Elvira Salazar DEFEND Miami and defeat socialism?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=cb5712e79e834689b5277109980a70cd&_e=RiY6naKLqnd7xqEQrQcXrPfKrPEcTewun319GEY_8eePxDm34jilmDiZYYAmT-W-rsEhz7wJT9QsSIQ1zgFrdrniehATO4adJxbtB5AowVeEwRDgs6b_BMmwB7n0rdxd2Sy-_1-jFX1vCppP0-SVd9RPFz3iX-xh84hmNfM1cYSg1791wanZhvEM6P3S0GA747Msqd4gj4miM6tOUKvqrZiB9eBNEQ26d_TJafj7jKuvpMAd-A6kR2CDUpvMs_efX2Lfg8j3cjgqAMBzeVJW-8XdrgE7s_FXyG5x_EEUu-imS96IJRmFg-3XG5cFyW8WsQf0HlnDCuJGZgSGV2dTq9S59VYKjnWV5VQlgU4h07U%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT MARIA ELVIRA SALAZAR HERE**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=cb5712e79e834689b5277109980a70cd&_e=RiY6naKLqnd7xqEQrQcXrPfKrPEcTewun319GEY_8eePxDm34jilmDiZYYAmT-W-rsEhz7wJT9QsSIQ1zgFrdrniehATO4adJxbtB5AowVeEwRDgs6b_BMmwB7n0rdxd2Sy-_1-jFX1vCppP0-SVd9RPFz3iX-xh84hmNfM1cYSg1791wanZhvEM6P3S0GA7J0GHl0H2AkovW-wV0HuwPbcOAE-UddP6Qcj0F0396cNWkkAg9KAgn4e7C41hllDIDjo0crPSPy6g8LJRGhvtgEqsLsENfjtrlq6sjUY3peARFhq16JDc70MKboEneKEdkq9nxPTip56XZa-jxqL3n5T02TFtwLn_H9K7DSsx9DY%3D)
---
Maria is one of the bravest people I know. She took on Fidel Castro. And even when he pushed her, she never backed down. Maria’s willing to put herself on the front lines for freedom, and she isn’t afraid of _any_ socialists no matter who they are. Now, she needs us to back her up in her fight, and with the Left POURING money into Florida, we need to act quickly. **[Pitch in today to help defend this critical Florida district for Maria!](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=cb5712e79e834689b5277109980a70cd&_e=RiY6naKLqnd7xqEQrQcXrPfKrPEcTewun319GEY_8eePxDm34jilmDiZYYAmT-W-rsEhz7wJT9QsSIQ1zgFrdrniehATO4adJxbtB5AowVeEwRDgs6b_BMmwB7n0rdxd2Sy-_1-jFX1vCppP0-SVd9RPFz3iX-xh84hmNfM1cYSg1791wanZhvEM6P3S0GA7BljyX6GlbFpGrxZIVQYd4_wta77SN5RBptKM35T_3F6bNKFJEpdrAjqXqwGQPjlhyLeXon4jKwNdsjf9bXud3eb6T7bQTL_0ihveTD-jNi1v29HEYLP5QNYLjDWTlTxaFyi4IFtzR3XxoaKqO3yozUqXncu4Gjh-2L7dLh2OeeM%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, it's Marco Rubio. I reached out to you earlier about my friend and colleague Maria Elvira Salazar, and so many of you stepped up to support her in her fight to defend Miami. Maria has been an incredible ally in our fight to make sure the socialism of Cuba never reaches America, and now, she needs us to step up for her. Maria is one of the bravest people I know. She took on Fidel Castro. And even when he pushed her, she never backed down. Maria’s willing to put herself on the front lines for freedom, and she isn’t afraid of any socialists no matter who they are. Now, she needs us to back her up in her fight, and with the Left POURING money into Florida, we need to act quickly. | | Thank you, Marco Rubio (R- FL) | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

Friend,

Republicans have lost seven of the last eight popular votes for president.

Our cause is right, but we have _**failed**_ to win the confidence of a majority of Americans.

That is nothing to be proud of.

We should _**want**_ to win the majority of Americans.

**So today, I 'm here to tell you that the way we win is by uniting people, not by chasing people away. **

The moral mandate to make America freer, fairer, and better falls to us all.

We can fight for policies that lift up ALL Americans. And we can do that together.

**But in order to get this done, we need to unite and fight for our future. **

**[If you're with me in this fight, I'm asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxoty5yjkZsoD5SSoLMTQ-S5OPe3WgPMZYOGPI9DPGGrcgZlcyHImxcmVyGkDMpMhljMFyqdiBzAYPDde0QAS-KOfbZD-sW6MjOEQUXbqyTWE9KAfEv_b5qt2JxvHDrh5ZXqq84ZG1IUpobcIP1M4J2TG2d6dGWL-jzm94vAmZGlDUPN-xZr5dJZsCNlgAXg6VwvCYlsOuMKrQjQcO2wqLSNajNVw98f_KdusFhYuzRjxUf2Gl555BMnYwxePyEtv5KzcLojExDHG69vCl8fmxVlWL_-yuiKcLUMONfj-sHBUMDwjsRa4PPuxtCLy1jPEaGj7pZAI4ppIxKBerkqXD-uwmDKRxCXlrMPK146X5bgUoTOkD1X4EVFrlv6G-7AkXERTR4vk3ZzOwjtr4PVKQbleki9Ehy245LSZUSwfuy4fDnfhOWKDIaHjIeAaGni9wZxmGMejjXvSwovI8YqjbbfkN0mATz2_d-FDIUwfpW_EJy7Rf2ngwxGW0gtOK1zK-6CIj7gwpYWC3ugYO1mzVFA%3D%3D "If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today. ")**
