In order to win, we need to move past the divisions and negativity, and come together. Because at the end of the day, we all have a lot that we can agree on.

_We can agree we want safe streets and clean air.

We can agree we want schools that help our kids thrive and more transparency in the classroom.

We can agree there's a problem with healthcare and we need to fix it.

We can agree that we must take care of those who take care of us--that we must support our veterans.

We can agree that we have a problem at our southern border and we must get the crisis under control.

We can agree inflation is hurting Americans and it's too hard for too many to pay the bills.

We can agree that we can do better--and the good news is, we know how. _

At the end of the day, we have the solutions. And our solutions are the right ones.

**[We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxoty5yjkZsoD5SSoLMTQ-S5OPe3WgPMZYOGPI9DPGGrcgZlcyHImxcmVyGkDMpMhljMFyqdiBzAYPDde0QAS-KOfbZD-sW6MjOEQUXbqyTWE9KAfEv_b5qt2JxvHDrh5ZXqq84ZG1IUpobcIP1M4J2TG2d6dGWL-jzm94vAmZGlDUPN-xZr5dJZsCNlgAXg6VwvCYlsOuMKrQjQcO2wqLSNajNVw98f_KdusFhYuzRjxUf2Gl555BMnYwxePyEtv5KzcLojExDHG69vCl8fmxVlWL_-yuiKcLUMONfj-sHBUMDwjsRa4PPuxtCLy1jPEaGj7pZAI4ppIxKBerkqXD-uwmDKRxCXlrMPK146X5bgUoTOkD1X4EVFrlv6G-7AkXLIpt80pycjYKUZzLniKtSlF15cg_w-rYhGI7LJTSLc8CYtD3IyV9j1ePIhQhOoBO-SfJ82cztZLZBw-YRUDwwAnnvvlEWHxDCwQYVW8Ypa-4-Gsg9GTSiQMUnuXQ47PnEHcjUXKh3UdunoWYYPTxXQ%3D%3D "We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team.")**

What matters most right now is saving the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

In order to do that, we have to put our best foot forward and nominate a candidate who can move on from the drama and bring voters together.

We have to nominate a candidate who will unite our country so we can make America strong and proud again.

**We have to nominate a candidate who can WIN on Election Day.**

-> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador.
-> I have a vision for where our country can go.
-> I have a track record of getting things done.
-> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the **ONLY** candidate who can defeat Biden and Harris in a general election so we can get our country back on track.

**[That's why I'm urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country's future.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxoty5yjkZsoD5SSoLMTQ-S5OPe3WgPMZYOGPI9DPGGrcgZlcyHImxcmVyGkDMpMhljMFyqdiBzAYPDde0QAS-KOfbZD-sW6MjOEQUXbqyTWE9KAfEv_b5qt2JxvHDrh5ZXqq84ZG1IUpobcIP1M4J2TG2d6dGWL-jzm94vAmZGlDUPN-xZr5dJZsCNlgAXg6VwvCYlsOuMKrQjQcO2wqLSNajNVw98f_KdusFhYuzRjxUf2Gl555BMnYwxePyEtv5KzcLojExDHG69vCl8fmxVlWL_-yuiKcLUMONfj-sHBUMDwjsRa4PPuxtCLy1jPEaGj7pZAI4ppIxKBerkqXD-uwmDKRxCXlrMPK146X5bgUoTOkD1X4EVFrlv6G-7AkXgupDiMv24CSQCIx7qpcZOUaWnzqjm2fKw6u0S2GE3C-nAV6yz-357M0qlVBKQ4bU0e1ackP1sLxOwvFlJyEWZU4zSxrdk7smVoLl6MKexhqd1KLy9ChJqdvkQcwBHxwrmai689QRHzZeKwIAWzp8Pg%3D%3D "That’s why I’m urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country’s future. ")**

I'm tired of losing, Friend! And I've heard from many of you on the campaign trail who are tired of losing, too.

That's why, every time I host a town hall or answer questions from voters, I share my plans for tackling the issues Americans care about, and show why I am the only candidate who can unite our country and win.

But I know I can't do this alone. **[I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxoty5yjkZsoD5SSoLMTQ-S5OPe3WgPMZYOGPI9DPGGrcgZlcyHImxcmVyGkDMpMhljMFyqdiBzAYPDde0QAS-KOfbZD-sW6MjOEQUXbqyTWE9KAfEv_b5qt2JxvHDrh5ZXqq84ZG1IUpobcIP1M4J2TG2d6dGWL-jzm94vAmZGlDUPN-xZr5dJZsCNlgAXg6VwvCYlsOuMKrQjQcO2wqLSNajNVw98f_KdusFhYuzRjxUf2Gl555BMnYwxePyEtv5KzcLojExDHG69vCl8fmxVlWL_-yuiKcLUMONfj-sHBUMDwjsRa4PPuxtCLy1jPEaGj7pZAI4ppIxKBerkqXD-uwmDKRxCXlrMPK146X5bgUoTOkD1X4EVFrlv6G-7AkXgqnC6TB78nqZUzn1hiqz8uiXtAWGQX4HddZIjzeTZD5iKkZQG3WA-5MaoC_PWD7_yfhiywAU-vz6ZKUHWoe1y5bHvp3UJcW8GseBg4q6Zb0ui0P58ELDEqp0EzkJKoF_YRVVeW_wrkMMemmAQ3Iwag%3D%3D "I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight.")**

I believe it's time for a new generation to step up and lead us into the future.

**[If you're tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win - _not just for our party, but for our country_ - then put your trust in me.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxoty5yjkZsoD5SSoLMTQ-S5OPe3WgPMZYOGPI9DPGGrcgZlcyHImxcmVyGkDMpMhljMFyqdiBzAYPDde0QAS-KOfbZD-sW6MjOEQUXbqyTWE9KAfEv_b5qt2JxvHDrh5ZXqq84ZG1IUpobcIP1M4J2TG2d6dGWL-jzm94vAmZGlDUPN-xZr5dJZsCNlgAXg6VwvCYlsOuMKrQjQcO2wqLSNajNVw98f_KdusFhYuzRjxUf2Gl555BMnYwxePyEtv5KzcLojExDHG69vCl8fmxVlWL_-yuiKcLUMONfj-sHBUMDwjsRa4PPuxtCLy1jPEaGj7pZAI4ppIxKBerkqXD-uwmDKRxCXlrMPK146X5bgUoTOkD1X4EVFrlv6G-7AkXAg-jtjX58HDl2h2YV1GZ06XARa4Mxz_vl9SzbUN6URpHYXQ96wty5LgE1rXD7izAgUZvTZRUZVqUSLzt1_lPkaPVjWnsBw07F7qrMCaAkRhnenNSt_iAPA4tA2G8FEx3N0sH-DUjVpvKsETjBUuYFA%3D%3D "If you’re tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=997329b5602b48029ba6ea9047bc1803&_e=RHcQdU0mwYRT24DZAl2C28tNMhuOCsv7JqDPEZNhItjDshQM9dTOFmToXrdCaUcxpcpvOYmpG0MGtOpyVLeKqGGfo8d4G_3mrUHK5eLZds-XKgphMZr_xJf9ogBj5EYbJHdle0tiW-vrXYvqvDUFrax9vlpFgLyBcD_l1Sc8h4iw1M_-aaJwVBkoDSMjvxyEA3aBwX_fxwi5PMz64iwMHo_i6SntP4lUCj_721jKI0lkGAeaVlFO8uS09BCrmxAaBkFiDZuKPTpfHyJOgKFxygaZSirSSnquK48aw-LdsBEqrqJjWDVswledoqq-m7mj1wagCp9kZAK5B1YXayAog5UvkGBS5zEEmBN9WlrC2YIBcGJphILHkePKbsMfvNlegUtjfovYL5iT-BgJFCxIr-1qJOK6TKWfJ1rFmGhwL4IPxuJKUYz0HLoyrM1COac3m4cCtbNJV2rKnt7WWUc7QxCgVAsnv-fD2TRkNAn4kRRZ08GMHQn7e6fJHxTqjB8mghnfTlSwE5oq7i6FXKckakHf0BuYM1kp-YP_joejg1dmDXyEflNsEbs-gKplNgStx87RY9Xhl55FUjJyuEbiDpsQOHGCcpHkR6G9gnxmLHowClsjpY9WtuumVf9uZojl "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: This will explain everything. | | | | | | Friend, Republicans have lost seven of the last eight popular votes for president. Our cause is right, but we have failed to win the confidence of a majority of Americans. That is nothing to be proud of. We should want to win the majority of Americans. So today, I 'm here to tell you that the way we win is by uniting people, not by chasing people away. The moral mandate to make America freer, fairer, and better falls to us all. We can fight for policies that lift up ALL Americans. And we can do that together. But in order to get this done, we need to unite and fight for our future. "If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today. " | | In order to win, we need to move past the divisions and negativity, and come together. Because at the end of the day, we all have a lot that we can agree on. We can agree we want safe streets and clean air. We can agree we want schools that help our kids thrive and more transparency in the classroom. We can agree there's a problem with healthcare and we need to fix it. We can agree that we must take care of those who take care of us--that we must support our veterans. We can agree that we have a problem at our southern border and we must get the crisis under control. We can agree inflation is hurting Americans and it's too hard for too many to pay the bills. We can agree that we can do better--and the good news is, we know how. At the end of the day, we have the solutions. And our solutions are the right ones. "We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team." What matters most right now is saving the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. In order to do that, we have to put our best foot forward and nominate a candidate who can move on from the drama and bring voters together. We have to nominate a candidate who will unite our country so we can make America strong and proud again. We have to nominate a candidate who can WIN on Election Day. -> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador. -> I have a vision for where our country can go. -> I have a track record of getting things done. -> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the ONLY candidate who can defeat Biden and Harris in a general election so we can get our country back on track. "That’s why I’m urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country’s future. " I'm tired of losing, Friend! And I've heard from many of you on the campaign trail who are tired of losing, too. That's why, every time I host a town hall or answer questions from voters, I share my plans for tackling the issues Americans care about, and show why I am the only candidate who can unite our country and win. But I know I can't do this alone. "I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight." | | I believe it's time for a new generation to step up and lead us into the future. "If you’re tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win – not just for our party, but for our country – then put your trust in me. " Can I count on your support today? My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. body:

In the wake of Hamas’ terrorist attack on Israel, which left thousands of Israelis and 30 Americans dead, pro-Hamas Democrats are growing their ranks.

Democrats have taken to social media to express abhorrent anti-Israel sentiments, spreading dangerous misinformation and putting lives at risk.

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: The last time the federal minimum wage was raised was in 2009.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
It isn’t enough to sustain anyone.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71772434/433227512/-849459103?refcode=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NGYxYi1kMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge2pceyfleWursnG28p4aT2dFlB4I9gxTryT9bc1dLw=&emci=35b7ee7d-be6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
Tennesseans can’t live on $7.25 an hour. Period. Full stop. **But that’s all they’re guaranteed in our state under federal law.** The fact is it’s not just Tennessee. A full-time minimum wage worker can’t afford housing _anywhere in this country._ If they can’t even make the rent, how are working folks supposed to put food on the table, buy their kids clothes, save for retirement, or do _anything?_ **They can’t.** **_[That’s why it’s beyond time to raise the minimum wage to a liveable level. Sign on to my petition if you agree we need the federal government to act NOW>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71772435/433227513/-655800423?refcode=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NGYxYi1kMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge2pceyfleWursnG28p4aT2dFlB4I9gxTryT9bc1dLw=&emci=35b7ee7d-be6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_** **The last time the federal minimum wage was raised was in 2009.** In 2009, I was still an educator who had never even thought about running for office. Marsha Blackburn was already in her fourth term in Congress. Marsha’s had _nearly fifteen years since_ in Washington to work to bring the minimum wage up — or at least make sure it keeps pace with inflation. She has failed. And Tennessee families are suffering for it. It’s a travesty. **_[I’m calling on politicians in Washington to do what’s right and raise the minimum wage immediately. It’s way past time to act>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71772436/433227514/-655800423?refcode=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NGYxYi1kMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge2pceyfleWursnG28p4aT2dFlB4I9gxTryT9bc1dLw=&emci=35b7ee7d-be6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)_** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71772437/433227515/-655800423?refcode=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjk4NGYxYi1kMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge2pceyfleWursnG28p4aT2dFlB4I9gxTryT9bc1dLw=&emci=35b7ee7d-be6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=32984f1b-d06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)

Gloria Johnson

clean_body: It isn’t enough to sustain anyone. | Tennesseans can’t live on $7.25 an hour. Period. Full stop. But that’s all they’re guaranteed in our state under federal law. The fact is it’s not just Tennessee. A full-time minimum wage worker can’t afford housing anywhere in this country. If they can’t even make the rent, how are working folks supposed to put food on the table, buy their kids clothes, save for retirement, or do anything? They can’t. The last time the federal minimum wage was raised was in 2009. In 2009, I was still an educator who had never even thought about running for office. Marsha Blackburn was already in her fourth term in Congress. Marsha’s had nearly fifteen years since in Washington to work to bring the minimum wage up — or at least make sure it keeps pace with inflation. She has failed. And Tennessee families are suffering for it. It’s a travesty. | Thanks for your time and attention to this critical issue, Gloria Johnson | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
The extremist Republicans running our state government have now shifted their threat to reject vital federal education funds from words into action.
This latest effort led by Speaker Cameron Sexton is blatantly discriminatory and fiscally irresponsible. The devastating, long-term impacts on students, the fiscal integrity of our school systems and the economic future of our state cannot be overstated.
The harsh reality is this - if Sexton and Gov. Lee choose to follow through with this misguided scheme to further defund our schools, there is NOTHING we can do about it. The Republican supermajority can and will rubber stamp their legislation with or without Democrats even present, and Tennessee families will suffer the consequences.
We MUST break the GOP supermajority in the Tennessee House. Republicans must be held accountable on Election Day in 2024.
We cannot leave our children’s futures in the hands of extremists. To end the GOP supermajority we need your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Tennessee families deserve better. The upcoming election cycle provides us with a tremendous opportunity to flip House seats.
Protecting Democratic incumbents in tight districts and flipping strategically targeted Republican-held seats in the 2024 election is our priority, and our leadership is fully invested and committed to this effort. Your contributions will be spent directly on our efforts to break this supermajority and invested directly in Democratic campaigns.
Join us in this fight for Tennessee families. A brighter future for Tennessee is possible with your help.

clean_body: [] Peter, The extremist Republicans running our state government have now shifted their threat to reject vital federal education funds from words into action. This latest effort led by Speaker Cameron Sexton is blatantly discriminatory and fiscally irresponsible. The devastating, long-term impacts on students, the fiscal integrity of our school systems and the economic future of our state cannot be overstated. The harsh reality is this - if Sexton and Gov. Lee choose to follow through with this misguided scheme to further defund our schools, there is NOTHING we can do about it. The Republican supermajority can and will rubber stamp their legislation with or without Democrats even present, and Tennessee families will suffer the consequences. We MUST break the GOP supermajority in the Tennessee House. Republicans must be held accountable on Election Day in 2024. We cannot leave our children’s futures in the hands of extremists. To end the GOP supermajority we need your help. [] Donate [] Tennessee families deserve better. The upcoming election cycle provides us with a tremendous opportunity to flip House seats. Your contributions will be spent directly on our efforts to break this supermajority and invested directly in Democratic campaigns. Join us in this fight for Tennessee families. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z36lesuokgegkibvjive34msaohs13d61k0bj0h8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim9ob3clh2bs)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfiridfrjfj2h9n4b2ses2d1ue8b3pra3s0q4pq0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim9ob3clh2bs)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf83tb1gcrnhigsb199qk7at8ftuhlfnr49nrbt0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdim9ob3clh2bs)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

1600 Daily

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Frohlich=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: 40 more conservative centers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WAGOP is doing something new for the first time - creating new programs and being more aggressive is what it's going to take for the GOP to start... | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=79c09775ff&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Hi Peter,
Ballots for the 2023 local elections **are already being** **mailed out **so make sure you are checking your mailboxes and have a plan to vote, and vote early! We just activated a new team of seven** trained and verified conservative volunteers **in Pierce County who are building relationships in their neighborhoods. We are helping conservatives get their ballots in right away!

Over the next week we will send you information on how to **track your ballot** to verify that it has been counted. Please check your County GOP website for **voting recommendations** in your area.

I also wanted to send you an update on our '**Secure Your Vote'** program that we launched at the beginning of this month. Chairman Jim Walsh set a goal to reach **200 conservative ballot box centers** before next year's statewide elections.

Thanks to support of grassroots conservatives across the state, our initial launch has **already raised $5,900** to purchase **40 more ballot boxes**. $10, $25, $50, and even the full $150 at a time - **grassroots conservatives** are making an incredible impact in our state. **You can add to the success of this program** by clicking on the blue button below and contributing today. Or, helping us find more friendly locations to establish our **conservative ballot box centers** by responding to this email.
---
| [Contribute here to conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c2e8da5566&e=6a281f566d "Contribute here to conservative ballot box centers")
---
| _Chairman Jim Walsh has also been spreading our program launch through various news outlets. Together, we can expand our program across WA._
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9321120aac&e=6a281f566d)
---
| Building the statewide infrastructure for**'Secure Your Vote'** is going to take a lot of grassroots power and resources.**The secure ballot boxes alone can cost up to $150 each - these aren't just a shoe box with a whole cut in it.** And they are accompanied with voter information & materials, ballot tracking, and trained and verified conservative volunteer teams.

You can **click on the button below** to contribute directly to our effort of building more conservative ballot box centers for in-person voting. And we will keep building our grassroots teams of **trained and verified conservative volunteers**. We are working in our neighborhoods to make sure **every conservative voice** is counted and heard.

---
| [Contribute here to conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=82fb46671d&e=6a281f566d "Contribute here to conservative ballot box centers")
---
| Thank you for your support!

Matthew Frohlich
Political Director
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| From: Jim@wsrp.org
Date: Oct. 10, 2023
Time: 8:45 AM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Peter,

For decades, Republicans have been asking to vote in-person again in Washington State. **Now you can.**

Republicans have also been worried about whether or not returning a ballot through the Post Office is trustworthy. **Now you don't have to worry about it.**

Over the last month, the Washington State Republican Party has launched a program called**'Secure Your Vote'. **

This program includes several steps that encourages Republicans to vote, promotes legal ballot harvesting, and **helps ensure that every vote is properly counted** at the county elections office.

We are aligned with local businesses, churches, fishing & wildlife shops and conservative leaning groups to organize **conservative ballot box centers **across the state. We are also establishing **grassroots conservative teams** who will help you verify that your ballot was returned and counted by the county elections.

Building the statewide infrastructure for**'Secure Your Vote'** is going to take a lot of grassroots power and resources.**The secure ballot boxes alone can cost up to $150 each - these aren't just a shoe box with a whole cut in it.** And they are accompanied with voter information & materials, ballot tracking, and trained grassroots volunteer teams.

Our first step is to train the grassroots conservative teams and to establish the secure ballot boxes. While we start with training, can you help us put in place more secure ballot boxes?

**With your support, we can hit our goal of 200 verified conservative ballot box centers before the 2024 statewide election.** That's $30,000 just for the secure ballot boxes alone, which we've already spent $4,000 of.

[_**Can you help us reach the last $26,000 with a grassroots contribution of $10, $25, or $50 today?**_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1974b10dc3&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Help fund conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=831eee3127&e=6a281f566d "Help fund conservative ballot box centers")
---
| Grassroots conservatives are already hard at work in all 39 counties and**here are some of the success stories** so far:

\- 9 conservative ballot boxes in Pierce county with 8 more on the way.

\- 3 In-person voting events organized in Central WA with 8 ballot boxes being deployed this week.

\- 15 churches have established conservative ballot box centers with hundreds of pastors encouraging voting within their congregations.

\- tens-of-thousands of phone calls and text messages are being launched to conservative voters for the 2023 local elections to connect them with our trained and verified grassroots volunteers.

Not every county and district has a fully operational ballot box center yet, or a team of trained and verified grassroots conservatives helping voters secure their vote. We will keep growing. And continue building. **And with your support, by next year we can hit our goal of 200 verified conservative ballot box centers in Washington State.**
---
| [Help fund conservative ballot box centers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=11e5d72076&e=6a281f566d "Help fund conservative ballot box centers")
---
|
---
| | **Ballot harvesting is legal in Washington State. **Democrats have already been doing it in the shadows to win elections for the last decade.

Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. We will do it as aggressively as possible. We will conduct our efforts legally and with integrity. And in doing so, **we will start winning again!**

Please support our efforts today to bring this important change to the way our Party operates campaigns. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/smooth-transition-1341624?e=6a281f566d)
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0hk2jacfneck52f3l25vccht8gbac40lh30uleo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdhm0p36chh2bs)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjc9tg15n692eqqadod1330rup7lvfo1tbkst7lg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdhm0p36chh2bs)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvt3j3ae1duo1rna3bkstqopdempi0hblvn02qu8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cdhm0p36chh2bs)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Briefing

2024 is no longer just an election. It’s truly the final battle for the heart and soul of America.

The future of our Commonwealth is on the line.

Will we continue moving forward, breaking economic development records, and setting up a strong future for the next generations of Kentuckians? Or will we allow my opponent to take the reins and cut short our progress?

I know that, together, we can do what's right and continue on the path of prosperity and unity. But I need all hands on deck to make that happen. With just weeks to go, will you step up to the plate?

[**If you're ready to keep moving Kentucky forward, donate any amount ahead of the 15-day pre-election reporting deadline and help me win this tough race >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71773802/433232233/1286826882?refcode=em23_231018_ddln1_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231018_ddln1_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3926b572-d36d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI2YjU3Mi1kMzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Jf7DeP2scwW56lfszjD77WTPft67zIQ3nuJNJ3rmcA=)

You can register online [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71773886/433232652/-71211468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmZTg5OS1kMzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXaeQMUz0Sv1NEGoVTtSPP5Ewav_gvAhAFPn-yJbYsc=&emci=bd66e939-bf6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=013fe899-d36d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249), or submit a [**registration form**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71773887/433232653/1434558572?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmZTg5OS1kMzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXaeQMUz0Sv1NEGoVTtSPP5Ewav_gvAhAFPn-yJbYsc=&emci=bd66e939-bf6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=013fe899-d36d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) in person or through the mail to your county election office. Every election year is important, folks. This year, voters across the Commonwealth will vote on a new state Supreme Court justice and new judges to sit on Commonwealth and Superior Courts. We’ll also decide whether two judges on Superior Court should get another term. Our judges will hold power over the issues we care about most – from voting and abortion access, to school funding and the environment. Not to mention cities and towns across Pennsylvania will also vote for mayors, city council, and school boards. Your vote is so important in these races. That’s why I wanted to send you this message to make sure you’re registered and you make your voice heard. So make sure you take a moment to [**check your registration**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71773888/433232654/2012029822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmZTg5OS1kMzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXaeQMUz0Sv1NEGoVTtSPP5Ewav_gvAhAFPn-yJbYsc=&emci=bd66e939-bf6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=013fe899-d36d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249), and then forward this email to a few friends, and ask them to check their status too. Thanks, Eugene

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The way we win.
body:
This will explain everything.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyIQbIYK9_xzykFFOZv-vFdQ7PluGDtJ1CipAIu4D0k58BBKY7m_B8uHZQKYS8C1OFa0-CqifUyIuUGeKR52hhKJebTXRKIALHveXvPpi-6t1nRrx_rWUXv8CegA70iPuX6yfOLKxCjZC1e9sE9GvVIBA%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

Republicans have lost seven of the last eight popular votes for president.

Our cause is right, but we have _**failed**_ to win the confidence of a majority of Americans.

That is nothing to be proud of.

We should _**want**_ to win the majority of Americans.

**So today, I 'm here to tell you that the way we win is by uniting people, not by chasing people away. **

The moral mandate to make America freer, fairer, and better falls to us all.

We can fight for policies that lift up ALL Americans. And we can do that together.

**But in order to get this done, we need to unite and fight for our future. **

**[If you're with me in this fight, I'm asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyIZcK5F9z1nMsWwkpEKwmqXHqij4scvShX-RKbwcGYAohtTcWLlK-AaUtOchYG1G1x3E2egXzcHvyq14yjloKTyZYeTRgxMR_Z90kN0zA3Vg8qwWd4jDYS6JDU1vBmQjJPdw9WUeWd0djrwIzmhac4Ww%3D%3D "If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today. ")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyIeEV09ZgFUdQH7Ntmpj_Y_sb00JdyXrqcjntwEZ-gLZMN3wDZj-8fa18kvVqLwD4PH8cllE8CXC8sMzzvgBPgiRTu7nC6rNwVPApptmDIwoYNGW9zvl7R2R-ASVfHlwtCwpJIeAiE3uTDAsi2soJeXQ%3D%3D)
---

In order to win, we need to move past the divisions and negativity, and come together. Because at the end of the day, we all have a lot that we can agree on.

_We can agree we want safe streets and clean air.

We can agree we want schools that help our kids thrive and more transparency in the classroom.

We can agree there's a problem with healthcare and we need to fix it.

We can agree that we must take care of those who take care of us--that we must support our veterans.

We can agree that we have a problem at our southern border and we must get the crisis under control.

We can agree inflation is hurting Americans and it's too hard for too many to pay the bills.

We can agree that we can do better--and the good news is, we know how. _

At the end of the day, we have the solutions. And our solutions are the right ones.

**[We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyIt6sydu_7zqJUyr5CPs83aDpLPsu-m2Eau_EHruPdxumLk1EOkxC48Txg0tAZrDIeNJWtrm0usB8KeVrRp9Ou3377p9Druf65yybdyJV0Wl-IzN91qmm81_xnBToZtsqaFs4W5sO5Y4umInM1jmmreg%3D%3D "We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team.")**

What matters most right now is saving the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

In order to do that, we have to put our best foot forward and nominate a candidate who can move on from the drama and bring voters together.

We have to nominate a candidate who will unite our country so we can make America strong and proud again.

**We have to nominate a candidate who can WIN on Election Day.**

-> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador.
-> I have a vision for where our country can go.
-> I have a track record of getting things done.
-> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the **ONLY** candidate who can defeat Biden and Harris in a general election so we can get our country back on track.

**[That's why I'm urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country's future.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyI4T8oDflIDddTpIG5LCJH3ze2L3hlXBgNoJh37_25_uWtwglDL4zWWi9jT04MHhHt6-ZoNYJLGo6D4VqOUeRkf1ADlajxmIbExgpEBw9UKhec9MMh56EE29PptSh0LNSd29VkRSXUbygySqRrYMgTvg%3D%3D "That’s why I’m urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country’s future. ")**

I'm tired of losing, Friend! And I've heard from many of you on the campaign trail who are tired of losing, too.

That's why, every time I host a town hall or answer questions from voters, I share my plans for tackling the issues Americans care about, and show why I am the only candidate who can unite our country and win.

But I know I can't do this alone. **[I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyI6eBPow4Bz5kOr2gYkB17kG1IozgWHY2bK7JVoiJQLMv6Ddj4hNzu84wb7rf4Abdu6E9KOUCfMAlhDR0nQEUlYlaK64mbYqmWFFTixnCUtWm2fX2XVYSBTROX02Vkaw17ffr61wfAQ6_swVkZvsyCeQ%3D%3D "I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight.")**

---
| | [TIRED OF LOSING? JOIN MY MOVEMENT!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyITtowm17a8VY2UTMGp38bEo4xPGeOs-a1mNYbxv5_j2-peabmfEIbUsEV8EJe3pij51aq6VIlWKEsC4ShkNmacC63CsrDS3Uejw1fAkljGwczYMbe8tFNKH4N4pvmwihmsb2rwG0pBdFepLDqxuRspQ%3D%3D)
---

I believe it's time for a new generation to step up and lead us into the future.

**[If you're tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win - _not just for our party, but for our country_ - then put your trust in me.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3Lqyb0lYdgMz2Ecu2q0IdXtcAolJoxKXWvFBthJCCdVcsS-x_iTTuYThIhlKjWivKBLaIuO2n_VJnGc3_o9NVC7-lrHbxhhh9kGvtPXJO7TUv8F8fpTkNRL57447u1IdsBzMp5MfneRD3oqsjWIgRpDZu-pmibfw3ZcHISHie4z5E54uHiHM_8HQPJls6PmSfOygTFufPAE9iY0yiqkyGfFOQEFJ_XBIQIMMUAvCNwv9hjUYdulg81zmgmf_kBp6lKURGmLwU7Ew4rBXVXgrD5bL4CJSTWpeQqT8ges8rKlSGXIhLThfzrJSPIG_dwWIQ9Z9VfjRHYKQ0h8tNbEyKZ__L_JXxIM5nx3Z3jfdbicQdxy9cHCkv5ASq3EaCtRyIA2pA8eY_pj6OpbAhmhEcYXc5YAwVO7ruuUZt1F1ET12b2dTY-u_rVLrEx01WKpO-Q5WHfPYunC7nMjM2eYKu5U-t2ncJ2WaoYl689jwsYpSX_1kprhvmHsOFQrEsB6_Xivk1pzwuGbDbN6ZY-3k82g%3D%3D "If you’re tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win – not just for our party, but for our country – then put your trust in me. ")**

Can I count on your support today?

My very best,

---
|
---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05717ca23f814a7da3f4969c17729209&_e=2CiI2BL4-aB7-SLuP9S75CwB2Rip4X-uJnAYqazw6Hcwg90b_BO8ZU6WR-Fe8rH3w6WN9feghKBfh8l5NG5ZtbdXaQTv-2F3mxCGq7JfI7wid9IPRrfIYEhLJKqRpZXDUDBmdysEZSLy-TOyH4p9GQUaaZlV1UaWPQu-wsVAI2DNHrCgkqWogXkifg1R_3pbzcrucR0kujhjtMZ6HBzShuDybKwhHjJ9s5PmyjVdMb9EHCaB46J31ElBgYNwFF77QJF_FaMcqJfOYRqxUiog4PhQQC-gNPyCDqOB1oLNoAKxLpQNxDu5IB1h3o5x1iGiq0UfwmIimK0Um-AOZIMvLiILa8hLOSpBUh8tBzYQ2ic90gJk7XOheTEH4Bdf-vpXKakLnbkp7jTkaK-sLgu_EIq5AZr1fltM_QdCwWXAzhvUfnIDMRoLPFwz2L4DIZ9rN35Y2dygVUYUfTPvUEh7L5vUaB6uOuJfHqyo4YoZZPP0Fk2cwHf_RVIou-Nm5LrvrEb0LP29cgdIPqwYUyFiYoo8j52RmAZjvcRh7U0Lwv3xZcE6j6vFMBtJPvJtEbCGr4B4-CnP1TY4I5FoiSefZSMD1_Io-U_AlC7FDPJm5y0hQcMJ-1dsY6RmrzlV5-_q "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: This will explain everything. | | | | | | Friend, Republicans have lost seven of the last eight popular votes for president. Our cause is right, but we have failed to win the confidence of a majority of Americans. That is nothing to be proud of. We should want to win the majority of Americans. So today, I 'm here to tell you that the way we win is by uniting people, not by chasing people away. The moral mandate to make America freer, fairer, and better falls to us all. We can fight for policies that lift up ALL Americans. And we can do that together. But in order to get this done, we need to unite and fight for our future. "If you’re with me in this fight, I’m asking you to join me by pitching in a generous gift today of $20.24 or more today. " | | In order to win, we need to move past the divisions and negativity, and come together. Because at the end of the day, we all have a lot that we can agree on. We can agree we want safe streets and clean air. We can agree we want schools that help our kids thrive and more transparency in the classroom. We can agree there's a problem with healthcare and we need to fix it. We can agree that we must take care of those who take care of us--that we must support our veterans. We can agree that we have a problem at our southern border and we must get the crisis under control. We can agree inflation is hurting Americans and it's too hard for too many to pay the bills. We can agree that we can do better--and the good news is, we know how. At the end of the day, we have the solutions. And our solutions are the right ones. "We can unite our country and win this, but I need you on my team." What matters most right now is saving the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. In order to do that, we have to put our best foot forward and nominate a candidate who can move on from the drama and bring voters together. We have to nominate a candidate who will unite our country so we can make America strong and proud again. We have to nominate a candidate who can WIN on Election Day. -> I'm a two-term governor and served our country as UN ambassador. -> I have a vision for where our country can go. -> I have a track record of getting things done. -> Most importantly, the polls have confirmed, I am the ONLY candidate who can defeat Biden and Harris in a general election so we can get our country back on track. "That’s why I’m urging you to put your trust in me as we fight for our country’s future. " I'm tired of losing, Friend! And I've heard from many of you on the campaign trail who are tired of losing, too. That's why, every time I host a town hall or answer questions from voters, I share my plans for tackling the issues Americans care about, and show why I am the only candidate who can unite our country and win. But I know I can't do this alone. "I need your help, and I'm hoping you'll join me in this fight." | | I believe it's time for a new generation to step up and lead us into the future. "If you’re tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win – not just for our party, but for our country – then put your trust in me. " Can I count on your support today? My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Jim Jordan and Mike Rogers: Not so different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
This week, there has been a lot of focus on Jim Jordan, who is currently House Republicans’ top pick to be Speaker of the House.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=738%2E135344%2EZJr-1V)

This week, there has been a lot of focus on Jim Jordan, who is currently House Republicans’ top pick to be Speaker of the House. Jim Jordan is as extreme as it gets and his potential election marks a full takeover of the Republican Party by radical extremists.
And what’s even more alarming? **Jim Jordan and our potential Republican opponent, former Congressman Mike Rogers, have very similar voting records and have stood in lockstep on a number of key issues during their time in Congress together.** They have both supported legislation that hurt women, unions, and our seniors.
* Jim Jordan wrote of one of the most aggressive national abortion bans on record, the Life At Conception Act, which included zero exceptions for rape, incest, or common miscarriage. Mike Rogers, despite tap-dancing to the contrary, was a lead co-sponsored of this ban — and has supported only bans and penalties on abortion since he was first elected in 1994 (when Elissa Slotkin was a senior in high school).

* Jordan and Rogers have both affirmatively voted to cut Social Security and privatize Medicare. Michigan’s population skews older, so these cuts would disproportionately impact our state. In Michigan, more than 2.2 million people receive Social Security benefits, which account for 1⁄3 of households across the state.

* When it comes to our workers, Jordan and Rogers have both received failing grades from the AFL-CIO and UAW year after year. They uniformly support anti-worker and anti-union legislation – voting to make it easier for employers to stall unionization efforts.

* Even when it comes to bipartisan bills – like providing aid to victims of 9/11 and their families — they have both stood together. In 2010, both Jim Jordan and Mike Rogers voted _against_ the 9/11 Health And Compensation Act, which provided medical services for 9/11 first responders and reopened the 9/11 Victim Compensation Fund.

The truth is that while Mike Rogers will try to paint himself as a moderate, he has and will stand with the most extreme sides of his party whenever he’s given the chance. He’s already doing everything he can to appeal to the far-right base – starting off his campaign with a viral video attacking the FBI and calling them “corrupt” for going after Trump – despite being a former FBI officer!
We know when push comes to shove Mike Rogers will stand with Jim Jordan and Donald Trump over Michiganders – which is why we can’t let him get to the Senate. [**Will you chip in to help us send Elissa Slotkin to the Senate and push back against the brand of extremism that bows to any and every political wind?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231018-2&t=2&akid=738%2E135344%2EZJr-1V)**

| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231018-2&t=21&akid=738%2E135344%2EZJr-1V)**

clean_body: They are doubling down their efforts in our battleground state. | Peter, Last month, Joe Biden and the Left launched a multi-million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to try to give Democrats an edge in the upcoming 2024 elections. Now he is launching a new election strategy in Arizona to further help Democrats win this critical battleground state. Democrats know that winning this battleground seat is essential to taking back the House, so they have doubled down on their efforts. But we can’t let the Left's latest scheme succeed. That’s why I’m counting on my army of grassroots supporters to help us have the funds needed to FIGHT BACK. As 1 of the 5 seats that gave Republicans the House majority, I cannot overstate how important this race is. If we lose, not only will we lose the majority, but your new representative will be a rubber stamp for the Left’s radical “woke” agenda. Last cycle we won against my liberal opponent by a narrow 1% margin and this race is shaping up to be just as close. That means we can’t afford to slow down or show any sign of weakness – every second and every dollar counts with the future of our country on the line. And with your help, I know we will ensure that Biden and the Left’s latest scheme fails by winning this critical seat and holding onto our House majority. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: U.S. Capitol Police Federal Court Filing Reveals Officials Were Aware of the Potential for a Significant Disturbance on January 6
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received the court-ordered
declaration of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the Office of the
General Counsel for the Capitol Police, in which he describes emails
among senior officials of the United States Capitol Police (USCP) in
January 2021 that show warnings of possible January 6 protests that
could lead to serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol.

[alt_text]

[*****]
October 18, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65436&L=30448&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvamFudWFyeS02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8334bad50c8829a5df2a0361436bcb861e05574612c79068218c693fb0a4ff8e]

Judicial Watch announced recently that it received the
court-ordered declaration of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the
Office of the General Counsel for the Capitol Police, in which he
describes emails among senior officials of the United States Capitol
Police (USCP) in January 2021 that show warnings of possible January 6
protests that could lead to serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol.

The holiday season leads right up until the Iowa Caucus! That means we'll be repping our best and most spirited merch all December long. Will you be joining us? Tell us what you want us to throw together for you today to get ready!

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=788b40fcdb61b823b3f7b90fd917471c45faaa3814c774a0baac7268c25481ff2c699addbb4e44caa91c9d567bbc27023cd0bc235d17268b3030246378044e0a

Volunteer!

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=788b40fcdb61b8230fe97ce655542403247876be6c49386afbe6c55e1cdfb76c719a7380bfac7e36585feec34d17654dc4ec5b8c1a21008d6716ca60c8a06728
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=788b40fcdb61b823bc486b8080f321e85ebe5cfa6eb972da059559d0b649dcaa2b3a6cc685e5cf3c8a35549f18d8607a0679dbd29065a9782d820256c01ccb90

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=788b40fcdb61b823bc486b8080f321e85ebe5cfa6eb972da059559d0b649dcaa2b3a6cc685e5cf3c8a35549f18d8607a0679dbd29065a9782d820256c01ccb90

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

Peter,

We know where their priorities are.

My priorities, on the other hand, are not only protecting your children and your rights as a parent, but also holding Schiff & Biden accountable for their corruption, lowering inflation, securing our border, strengthening our nation, and protecting our freedoms & values.

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. I’m not looking for the support of Hollywood’s elite, special interests, or out-of-touch politicians – I’m asking for the support of REAL Americans who are fed up with THEM. Thanks for your support, Eric Early Republican for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Follow Eric On Social Media P.O. Box 730, Hilmar, CA 95324 | | Paid for by Eric Early for US Senate 2024 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I've got 2 important things to share with you | | | | | | Friend, it's Nikki. Moment to talk? | | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. | | Today, many of my Republican colleagues rallied around Jim Jordan and are attempting to install him to be the next Speaker of the House after failing on the first round of voting. Instead of finding a bipartisan solution with Democrats, **House Republicans are trying to push him through again.** _They are choosing more chaos and extreme partisanship._ **Jim Jordan is one of the most extreme and least effective members of Congress, and he's endorsed by former President Trump and some of his closest allies.** Take a look at the facts. Jim Jordan:
* Wants to defund the FBI.
* Supports a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions.
* Co-founded the extreme "Freedom Caucus."
* Refused to cooperate with the January 6 panel.
* **Voted to overturn the 2020 election.**
* Voted against common-sense, bipartisan legislation, including funding for disaster relief, 9/11 victims, medical research, opioid treatments, and veterans' benefits.
* Supports the radical plan to end Medicare as we know it, and to privatize and drastically cut Social Security.
* Has not passed a single bill he has sponsored into law over his 16 years in Congress.

While we have a narrow Democratic majority in the Senate right now — these attempts signal that the GOP is going to continue to hand the reins to MAGA extremists _._ **We must ensure we maintain and build the Democratic majority in the Senate, and a critical component of that is victory right here in New Jersey.** A recent poll showed that if Senator Menendez is the candidate in 2024, he would lose against a generic Republican candidate. That same poll showed that I would win. We cannot hand the GOP this seat. If Senator Menendez is the Democratic nominee, that's exactly what could happen. Peter,

Join us for a volunteer kickoff event for my campaign for Congress here in CA-47! This is a family friendly event, so please feel free to bring your children if you have any. Light lunch and beverages will be provided.

Whether you are already volunteering or are interested in signing up, please come join us this Saturday from 1 to 3 PM to learn more about the campaign and help us kick off our volunteer efforts! Our campaign has been picking up real momentum in the past few weeks. We've added endorsements from a number of state, federal, and local elected leaders -- including Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis.

I'm proud the CA-47 community is consolidating behind our effort to make sure this seat is represented by leadership that will make climate change a priority, enshrine a woman's right to an abortion into federal law, and stand up to Republican efforts that weaken our democracy.

We can win this race, but only with your continued support! Please join us for our volunteer kickoff October 21st. I'd love to see you there.

In unity,

Joanna
