I've witnessed Andrei's dedication to Arizona for over a decade. He is committed to fighting for Arizona families, defending abortion rights, and protecting our public schools. I can unequivocally say that Andrei Cherny is the best leader to represent our community in the halls of Congress.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Gold bars, fancy watches, and private jets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71787187/433251744/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231018_na_issues2_cand_nc_180do_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTAyMzI1YS1kZTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an9qOBw9NHupiLBXHYoGaaE2lRrTe3VUFEU1AERXfr0=)
---
**I’m proud to say Delaware now has some of the most robust anti-corruption laws in the country thanks to my public trust legislative package that was just signed into law.** For too long, our laws didn't treat abuse of power with the seriousness it deserves. Our state laws allowed the powerful and well-resourced to abuse their power and cover up crimes. Here’s a bit more about each bill: **SB 67, the Abuse of Power Prevention Act,** ensures the crime of abuse of office is treated seriously – and like other crimes. **SB 128, a new Obstruction of Justice law,** provides the Delaware Department of Justice the tools necessary to take on cover-ups, misconduct, white-collar crime, and more by powerful and well-resourced individuals. **Democracy can only survive if the public trusts that those provided with power are operating ethically and for the greater good rather than personal enrichment.** Our laws should reflect how dangerous it is when that trust is shattered. Delaware law now does because of these two landmark bills I sponsored and championed with Attorney General Kathy Jennings. I was also proud to work closely with the Delaware Department of Justice, as well as Reps. Williams and Griffiths in the state House. Let’s go! \- Sarah | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71787188/433251745/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231018_na_issues2_cand_nc_180do_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTAyMzI1YS1kZTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an9qOBw9NHupiLBXHYoGaaE2lRrTe3VUFEU1AERXfr0=)
---

clean_body: | = I’m proud to say Delaware now has some of the most robust anti-corruption laws in the country thanks to my public trust legislative package that was just signed into law. For too long, our laws didn't treat abuse of power with the seriousness it deserves. Our state laws allowed the powerful and well-resourced to abuse their power and cover up crimes. Here’s a bit more about each bill: SB 67, the Abuse of Power Prevention Act, ensures the crime of abuse of office is treated seriously – and like other crimes. SB 128, a new Obstruction of Justice law, provides the Delaware Department of Justice the tools necessary to take on cover-ups, misconduct, white-collar crime, and more by powerful and well-resourced individuals. Democracy can only survive if the public trusts that those provided with power are operating ethically and for the greater good rather than personal enrichment. Our laws should reflect how dangerous it is when that trust is shattered. Delaware law now does because of these two landmark bills I sponsored and championed with Attorney General Kathy Jennings. I was also proud to work closely with the Delaware Department of Justice, as well as Reps. Williams and Griffiths in the state House. Let’s go! \- Sarah | = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. name: Josh Riley
subject: we DO give a sh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| My opponent, Marc Molinaro thinks you **"don't give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is."**

He even said - and you can't make this up - people "wouldn't know who the Speaker of the House was if he backed over them in a pickup truck."

**That’s how Molinaro defended his vote yesterday to give the Speaker's gavel to Jim Jordan** \- an extremist, anti-abortion insurrectionist who's hellbent on killing Medicare and Social Security.

I think Molinaro's wrong. We _are_ paying attention. We _do_ care who's running our government. And we don't think Jim Jordan has any place being in Congress, let alone second in line for the Presidency.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We won’t allow ghost guns to flood our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re glad that the Supreme Court has decided once again that the ATF’s regulations on ghost guns should remain in effect
#

Friends -
This week, the Supreme Court once again blocked an attempt to stop the Biden Administration from regulating ghost guns.
This order means the regulation will stay in effect while a legal challenge from gun manufacturers plays out in lower courts.
Ghost guns are a major threat to public safety. They can be built at home from parts purchased online, thus becoming untraceable firearms that can easily fall into the wrong hands. The number of ghost guns recovered by law enforcement has increased by **1,000%** since 2016. This is why regulating ghost guns is so critically important.
GIFFORDS has been leading the fight against ghost guns at the federal level and in states across the country. However, this fight is not over yet. The gun lobby is fighting tooth and nail against this lifesaving rule--they want ghost guns to be unregulated.
Lives are on the line. We can’t let them win.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help us send a strong message to the gun lobby that we won’t allow ghost guns to flood our communities.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231018-1-30&t=1&akid=6748%2E3935704%2EY4kLmY)

Cruz, Manchin and the 14 other lawmakers penned a letter to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and its subagency the National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS), taking issue with regulations designating a large swath of the Gulf of Mexico as a "critical habitat" for the endangered..." **[Ted Cruz Urges President Biden To Permit Texas-Mexico Border Bridge Projects:](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"In a letter to the president, Cruz outlined the benefits of the projects, saying that they will create jobs, improve supply chain resiliency and promote economic growth. Since the bridges will connect two countries, a presidential permit is needed to sign off on the construction. According to the Texas Department of Transportation, presidential permits are "required for the construction, connection, operation, or maintenance, at the international boundaries of the United States for border crossings and other cross-border projects." Cruz is planning on..." **[Ted Cruz Claims Risk Of Terror Attack In US 'Higher Today' Due To Border Policies:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) said the risk of a terrorist attack against the United States is higher now than at any time since Sept. 11, 2001. Cruz appeared on _Maria Bartiromo's Wall Street_ Saturday to react to the immigration crisis unfolding at the U.S.-Mexico border, including reports that people from Lebanon and Syria have entered the country that way. That information worries Cruz, who represents the southern border state of Texas. "I am very sorry to say I think the risk of a major terrorist attack in the United States is higher today than it has been anytime since..." **[Senator Ted Cruz Outlines AM Radio Act’s Three Paths To Law:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "During a recent speech to the National Religious Broadcasters President’s Council at the 2023 Capitol Hill Media Summit, Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) discussed the prospective paths for the passage of the AM For Every Vehicle Act. The bill, which has already moved out of committee, has three potential avenues for approval in the Senate. The first approach involves using unanimous consent to pass the bill, an option typically reserved for non-controversial legislation. This seems unlikely, as Sen. Cruz says, “It looks like we have a couple of Democrat objectors..."

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I've got 2 important things to share with you | | | | | | Friend, it's Nikki. Moment to talk? | | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. body:
I’m proud to fight against MAGA extremism alongside my progressive colleagues in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71788760/433257303/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2YTJkYy1lMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqrJ1LuZvFxacxVd24ndd_owYweeCXpkZ9q_xYchSGc=&emci=0fc648aa-c46d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5176a2dc-e06d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, More than two weeks since Kevin McCarthy was ousted, and the House still does not have a Speaker. Gridlock, chaos, confusion, dysfunction — this is what happens when Congress is beholden to MAGA extremists. Along with other congressional progressives, I am doing my best to hold the line for our democracy, for progress, and for a functioning government. [_**Will you split a donation between my campaign and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC today to support our fight in Congress against MAGA extremism?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71788764/433257306/896813578?&refcode=E4564-20231018-CPCSplit-SL-StopGOP&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2YTJkYy1lMDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xqrJ1LuZvFxacxVd24ndd_owYweeCXpkZ9q_xYchSGc=) **Peter, we must meet this challenge.** House Republicans are nominating Jim Jordan, who still denies the 2020 presidential election results and hasn't passed a single bill in his 16 years in Congress, to be Speaker. _If elected, he will continue to empower extremism in the House._ To beat back the stronghold that extremism currently has on the House, it is paramount that we uplift and amplify progressive candidates who will fight against this far-right agenda. I’m proud to fight alongside my progressive colleagues in Congress, but here’s the truth: 1) Holding MAGA Republicans accountable comes with a cost, and now many of us have become targets of online attacks and 2) We need to elect more progressives like us to Congress. One of our best weapons against extremist Republicans is grassroots supporters like you who are stepping up to support people like me. clean_body: I’m proud to fight against MAGA extremism alongside my progressive colleagues in Congress. | | Peter, More than two weeks since Kevin McCarthy was ousted, and the House still does not have a Speaker. Gridlock, chaos, confusion, dysfunction — this is what happens when Congress is beholden to MAGA extremists. Along with other congressional progressives, I am doing my best to hold the line for our democracy, for progress, and for a functioning government. = Peter, we must meet this challenge. House Republicans are nominating Jim Jordan, who still denies the 2020 presidential election results and hasn't passed a single bill in his 16 years in Congress, to be Speaker. If elected, he will continue to empower extremism in the House. To beat back the stronghold that extremism currently has on the House, it is paramount that we uplift and amplify progressive candidates who will fight against this far-right agenda. I’m proud to fight alongside my progressive colleagues in Congress, but here’s the truth: 1) Holding MAGA Republicans accountable comes with a cost, and now many of us have become targets of online attacks and 2) We need to elect more progressives like us to Congress. One of our best weapons against extremist Republicans is grassroots supporters like you who are stepping up to support people like me. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . Peter, One of Tina’s favorite parts of the job in this first year has been visiting people in their hometowns and hearing about their concerns in their own communities. It’s why she promised to visit all 36 counties in her first year in office — and now we have the latest update from the One Oregon Listening Tour! | | After paralyzing the House for two weeks with their petty infighting, House Republicans _still_ have yet to come to a consensus on House Speaker, holding our Congress back from delivering for the American people.

But, Peter, we're horrified.

The number of House Republicans that voted for Jim Jordan — a MAGA extremist who voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election, has abused his power in Congress, and lobbed a number of racist attacks at Black elected officials for doing their jobs — is absolutely appalling.

[Peter, we deserve better than someone like Jim Jordan leading the House, and we won't stop fighting back against him. name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: There Aren’t Two Sides
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We stand with Israel. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/elderforpresident.com/101823elderisrael?e=0be619cbaa)
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=d89fc9bf93&e=0be619cbaa)
---
| |
# **There Aren’t Two Sides**
---
| | | Friends,

Over the past week and a half, we’ve discovered the depths of the depravity of Hamas terrorists brutally kidnapping, raping, torturing, and murdering thousands of innocent Israelis. The videos, images, and stories are gruesome and devastating, but we must not turn away from these horrors.

The unpleasant truth is there are people on this planet who hate the West – countries like Israel and the U.S. – only because of who we are. They’re not seeking justice. They simply lust for destruction and pain.

Yet, everywhere we turn, leftwing extremists – in BLM, in academia, at the United Nations – insist the Israelis have brought this unthinkable evil upon themselves, or at the very least, both Israel and Hamas share an obligation to find a cooperative solution.

**Let me be clear: there are no “two sides” worthy of consideration here. There is Israel, and there are terrorists. **

Now is not the time for moral equivocation. For all the accusations of Republican racism, it is Democrats who have long excused antisemitism within their ranks – look no further than the [writings](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=e2a85581f0&e=0be619cbaa) of Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY), who proudly praised anti-Jewish leaders like Louis Farrakhan – and they must now face their own moral reckoning.

[Bottom line: we need real leadership in this country, including a president who is willing to do what it takes to meaningfully back America’s greatest ally in the region, as well as defend our safety at home. It’s time for courage in action, not stumbling and dithering, and with your support, I am ready to answer the call.](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bf80b8b593&e=0be619cbaa)

When I’m president, there will be no doubt where this country stands. There will be no false equivalencies. There will be no uncertainty. We will stand united with our friends in Israel and against anyone who would harm them.

Thank you,

Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---
|
---
|
---
| [P.S. Last week, I let you know that we’re giving away signed copies of my book, As Goes California, which details how out-of-control Democrats have destroyed my beloved home state of California and how, if unchecked, they’ll do the same to our country. I’ve got just a few copies left. Reserve yours today.](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=8efa16a710&e=0be619cbaa)

The videos, images, and stories are gruesome and devastating, but we must not turn away from these horrors. The unpleasant truth is there are people on this planet who hate the West – countries like Israel and the U.S. – only because of who we are. They’re not seeking justice. They simply lust for destruction and pain. Yet, everywhere we turn, leftwing extremists – in BLM, in academia, at the United Nations – insist the Israelis have brought this unthinkable evil upon themselves, or at the very least, both Israel and Hamas share an obligation to find a cooperative solution. Let me be clear: there are no “two sides” worthy of consideration here. There is Israel, and there are terrorists. Now is not the time for moral equivocation. For all the accusations of Republican racism, it is Democrats who have long excused antisemitism within their ranks – look no further than the of Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY), who proudly praised anti-Jewish leaders like Louis Farrakhan – and they must now face their own moral reckoning. When I’m president, there will be no doubt where this country stands. There will be no false equivalencies. There will be no uncertainty. We will stand united with our friends in Israel and against anyone who would harm them. Thank you, Larry Elder GOP Candidate for President | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 6500 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Copyright © 2023 , All rights reserved._

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: Every dollar counts.

body:
Make a difference in this year’s election.
|
Team, if you had the opportunity to help secure the right to reproductive freedom in just a few weeks, would you take it? With the election now **less than a month away** , we have exactly that chance – and it’s crunch time. **[Here’s just a taste of how your $5 can help build a better future for Ohio:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71789441/433259809/-1880409822?refcode=odp_em_231018_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdjYzM3ZS1lMjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xajcKfxA85Dc7dHaqr4S-mcvhqMoj3inbRGe9pOffQ=)**
* Ohio Dems aren’t just trying to get Democrats in office on Election Day – we’re working every day, in every corner of the state, to help mobilize voters and ensure that everyone who wants to can participate in the electoral process. **Your $5 helps us reach out to Ohioans and register new voters, spread the word about who’s running – and who stands for what principles – and help folks find their polling locations.**
* Anti-abortion groups are doing everything in their power to attack reproductive healthcare, including spending big on misleading ads attacking Issue 1, which would protect the right to the full range of reproductive care in the state Constitution. **Your $5 helps us fight back.**
* If you’ve ever volunteered on a campaign, you know what that $5 can do in the final days before Election Day. **Your $5 will help fuel volunteer efforts in the critical final days, including buying supplies for volunteers all across Ohio.**

**There’s a lot at stake this fall.** Every single dollar brings us one step closer to our goals. With your help, we can achieve incredible things together. **[Donate $5 now, and know that you're a part of the solution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71789442/433259810/-1880409822?refcode=odp_em_231018_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdjYzM3ZS1lMjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xajcKfxA85Dc7dHaqr4S-mcvhqMoj3inbRGe9pOffQ=)** Thank you for your continued support, Ohio Democrats | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →************** | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71789443/433259811/-1880409822?refcode=odp_em_231018_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdjYzM3ZS1lMjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xajcKfxA85Dc7dHaqr4S-mcvhqMoj3inbRGe9pOffQ=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71789444/433259812/-1880409822?refcode=odp_em_231018_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzdjYzM3ZS1lMjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9xajcKfxA85Dc7dHaqr4S-mcvhqMoj3inbRGe9pOffQ=) ************

| These are unprecedented times - the division, the war, and the corruption you see on the news probably keeps you up at night.
That's why you need a strong, experienced, Republican fighter to go to battle for you, and for America.
But right now, you're stuck with my opponent, Chris Pappas, whose primary objective is forcing costly "green" initiatives down your throat.
And frankly, Peter, we have bigger fish to fry.
You don't need a member of Congress who focuses on helping only a select few.
You need a member of Congress who will make America safer, more prosperous, and more affordable for all Americans.
That's what I vow to do if I'm elected next November - can I count on you to help me get there?
[If so, please make a grassroots contribution of at least $25 to help us get our campaign off the ground, and ready for 2024.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k3iynzSKfKvGOanUkeD6FSFPZjMvqixyh5-9ppdFZOnwHMesRqgdQIexzklAamgLQGc8vm43FRnBRstoiQO2pl7QCa0EV3JNSPGs0N4aT9eiFGq_NxafyK_Ro6Rt8VNOAIKhZoCvks04yBM1lmawFrojOn8KBysVMEgcx88J6gTGpgGu-d7tLP9uM2RBpzS0BS9aXvT-FxgVEmFS--bt3k5dB4Q1xAdyIR5wUiOt8PXmQwRWq7Qv7-psiEQwAunMiJDrWwlYZfMz0G_RWDCH0OVny5btPhKJWRQ5P0dZ_4hjKBsP3bdlrQNL3c8AQLPeJpMxSZgRgy8r4-K4RgFgEA2wMUcl3qZlZiHtH4twF5U=&c=jSweJz4RBLgN9eask4nr0lv-CUQwsm6eW6Lg-nQNMFXTqUzLdWl3KA==&ch=pWjWHyg9QB-Mtc4XGHsUtU_3R9BwXdYHrjF-EfF0VNap_2VWP7ESxA==)

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---

clean_body: You have a choice to make... | | | | | == | America is at a crossroads, and you have a choice to make, Peter. As a successful businessman, devoted family man, New Hampshire native, and experienced New Hampshire citizen legislator, I've made my choice. I'm running against Chris Pappas for New Hampshire's 1st Congressional Seat. Now will you make the choice to stand with me? == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | These are unprecedented times - the division, the war, and the corruption you see on the news probably keeps you up at night. That's why you need a strong, experienced, Republican fighter to go to battle for you, and for America. But right now, you're stuck with my opponent, Chris Pappas, whose primary objective is forcing costly "green" initiatives down your throat. And frankly, Peter, we have bigger fish to fry. You don't need a member of Congress who focuses on helping only a select few. You need a member of Congress who will make America safer, more prosperous, and more affordable for all Americans. That's what I vow to do if I'm elected next November - can I count on you to help me get there? == Thank you, | == | Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-1 | | == | | == | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner. Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963. Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook. Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company. Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce. He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business. | | == == == | | | | | | | Prescott for Congress | PO Box 26, Kingston, NH 03848 | | Sent by mailto:info@prescottforcongress.com powered by

Peter,

The battle for the 2024 Senate majority has been rated a **toss-up** and we need _all hands on deck_ to protect our razor-thin advantage.

EMILYs List-endorsed women are helping play both defense and offense in the fight for the majority in highly competitive swing state races. Their opponents, like Sen. **Rick Scott (FL)** , former Rep. **Mike Rogers (MI-SEN)** , and **Sam Brown (NV-SEN)** , are clear examples of anti-choice Republican extremism.

That's why we're running a **three-day Reject Republicans Fund to raise $75,000** for pro-choice women facing off with extremist opponents in must-win races nationwide.

**So before we dive into Scott, Rogers, and Brown: Can EMILYs List-endorsed candidates count on your support in helping to reach this goal by Thursday at midnight, Peter? Donate now be a part of it >>**

Florida, Michigan, and Nevada are battleground states in the fight for the Senate majority and abortion access nationwide, which is why EMILYs List has endorsed Democratic pro-choice women in each of these races. Here's what you need to know about the Republicans our candidates are facing:
* Last summer, Sen. **Rick Scott (FL)** celebrated the Supreme Court's decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. He's also on the record saying that if he were still governor of Florida, he would have _proudly_ signed a 6-week abortion ban into law.
* In Michigan, former Rep. **Mike Rogers** has entered the race for a newly open blue seat. While Rogers claims he would not vote for an abortion ban, his anti-choice voting record and support for a near-total ban in 2010 tell us everything we need to know about his *actual* beliefs.
* Nevada GOP Senate candidate **Sam Brown **is also trying to conceal his anti-choice agenda. However, his work for the Faith & Freedom Coalition — an organization that has long pushed for a nationwide abortion ban — and a history of supporting some of the _strictest_ statewide abortion bans speaks for itself.

Each of these races will be hard fought, but with our support, pro-choice women can send anti-choice extremists like these packing next November.

**So don't wait! Donate now to help hit our $75,000 Reject Republicans Fund goal and support Democratic pro-choice women who can DEFEAT anti-choice extremism next November:**
[_**https://go.emilyslist.org/Reject-Republicans**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71789952/433261650/-1663589318?sourceid=1052154&refcode=20231018_OppoRRoundup_v1s2&refcode2=WTEFE1034&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI4NTI3NC1lNDZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgLcEFY5K3C_K2KBm9nhfS0aT7N3Yk2-t4dQnrVbass=)
Thank you,

name: Juan at United We Dream Action
subject: Biden isn’t backing down and neither are we
body:
The Biden administration is waiving 26 environmental and indigenous protection laws to speed up border wall construction. | | | Peter, The Biden Administration recently announced they would be waiving a staggering **26** laws in order to speed up the construction of the dangerous, wasteful, and pointless border wall. President Biden has decided the laws that **keep our air and water clean, protect our endangered species, and preserve indigenous grounds and burial sites** should come second to building the border wall. Let’s be clear: **Border walls don’t work.** They’re an agent of fear-mongering, used to demonize migrants and score political points. They do irreparable harm to our environment and wildlife and create dangerous conditions for immigrants and asylum seekers. **UWDA is leading the fight against the Biden administration’s efforts to waste taxpayer dollars, trample environmental and indigenous protections, and put migrant lives at risk. clean_body: The Biden administration is waiving 26 environmental and indigenous protection laws to speed up border wall construction. | | | Peter, The Biden Administration recently announced they would be waiving a staggering 26 laws in order to speed up the construction of the dangerous, wasteful, and pointless border wall. President Biden has decided the laws that keep our air and water clean, protect our endangered species, and preserve indigenous grounds and burial sites should come second to building the border wall. Let’s be clear: Border walls don’t work. They’re an agent of fear-mongering, used to demonize migrants and score political points. They do irreparable harm to our environment and wildlife and create dangerous conditions for immigrants and asylum seekers. UWDA is leading the fight against the Biden administration’s efforts to waste taxpayer dollars, trample environmental and indigenous protections, and put migrant lives at risk. Will you rush in an urgent contribution to fuel our fight against racist border walls? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We have to demand President Biden and his administration do better. subject: Donald Trump’s favorite
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4249%2E5257348%2EIxkdH4 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — we
wanted to make sure you saw Adam’s message.

With Donald Trump mired in criminal indictments, the former president will
continue ramping up his attacks on everybody he views as a threat.

At the top of that list is “his favorite,” Adam. Trump made that
abundantly clear when he attacked Adam while barnstorming in California.

Adam will never waver in his fight to bring truth and accountability to
Congress — but he needs a strong grassroots showing to face off against
Trump and his MAGA allies.

With Republican Steve Garvey now in the race, your support is more
important than ever.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4249%2E5257348%2EIxkdH4 ]If you’re able, please chip in
$3 to
help Adam respond to Trump’s latest attack.

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Fri, Sept 29, 2023
Subject: "Shifty Schiff is really a sick person. Looks like he won't be
the next Senator anymore... I don't think he would've won anyway."
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

I have breaking news to share,
Derek.

Donald Trump is giving his keynote speech at the California Republican
Party convention — and he dedicated a portion to attacking me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4249%2E5257348%2EIxkdH4 ]Before I tell you Trump’s latest attack against me, can you help
respond with a donation? He knows how effective I am at holding him
accountable and is doing all he can to stop us. We have a chance to fight
back.

Here’s what he said:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4249%2E5257348%2EIxkdH4 ]Donald Trump speaks at California GOP convention

"And then you have, of course, my favorite: Shifty Adam Schiff. Pencil Neck.
He's known for one thing — the world's smallest neck. I call him Pencil Neck. If
you touched him, his neck would break... Shifty Schiff is really a sick person.
Looks like he won't be the next Senator anymore... I don't think he would've won
anyway."

Trump is attacking me because he knows I am effective. He fears what I can
— and will — do as a Senator to stand up to his MAGA allies.

Because when I stood up to him, I secured the first bipartisan vote in
history to convict a sitting president in his Senate impeachment trial.

Because I shined a light on what happened on January 6 — and his
involvement trying to usurp our democracy.

Because the evidence I gathered on the January 6 Committee has helped
authorities make a case to indict him.

Because he knows I will hold those who abuse their power accountable —
whether it’s him, megacorporations, or any other special interests that
are rigging the rules against hardworking families.

Trump sees the grassroots coalition we’re building, and he’s terrified.
You can bet these dangerous personal attacks will only ramp up from here,
so I need your help to stand up and win.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231018_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4249%2E5257348%2EIxkdH4 ]Help me respond to Trump’s latest attack,
Derek. Please chip in
$3 now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Exciting events coming up!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter As we approach election day, I wanted to be sure to let you know about a couple of upcoming events. Please, help us get Republican voters to the polls by getting involved! Attend a free event, call some friends and encourage them to
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018b4414732a-35e6cad0-9235-44de-8113-2635d8b7b866-000000/6aVI-PNjs_caxbGIgPiLmvlXnd4=344)
---
| |
---
| Peter
---
| As we approach election day, I wanted to be sure to let you know about a couple of upcoming events. Please, help us get Republican voters to the polls by getting involved! Attend a free event, call some friends and encourage them to vote early, or even volunteer for a Republican candidate. The first upcoming event is the Secure Your Vote Rally with Governor Glenn Youngkin in support of Delegate Tara Durant's candidacy for Senate District 27. The event is free, and you can RSVP [here](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Ffredericksburg-secure-your-vote-rally-tickets-731164792577%3Futm_experiment=test_share_listing%26aff=ebdsshios/1/0100018b4414732a-35e6cad0-9235-44de-8113-2635d8b7b866-000000/dvdq1oqnmsX2bG_lOrrNQLeGF2M=344) or at the link below. **Saturday, Oct. 21st****5:00 PM****Professional Building Maintenance****56 Well Lane****Fredericksburg, VA 22405** https://www.eventbrite.com/e/fredericksburg-secure-your-vote-rally-tickets-731164792577?utm_experiment=test_share_listing&aff=ebdsshios
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Then, the night before election day, join Delegate Phil Scott, Delegate Bobby Orrock and I as we rally for victory in Spotsylvania! We'll be at American Legion Post 320, off of Brock Rd. This event is also free, and you can RSVP [here](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Felection-eve-rally-for-spotsylvania-with-sen-reeves-del-scott-and-more-tickets-737936938247%3Faff=oddtdtcreator/1/0100018b4414732a-35e6cad0-9235-44de-8113-2635d8b7b866-000000/9UzCqf_5qR_vSf1G4nSTlTq07v8=344) or at the link below. **Monday, November 6th****7:00 PM****American Legion Post 320****8456 Brock Road****Spotsylvania, VA 22553** https://www.eventbrite.com/e/election-eve-rally-for-spotsylvania-with-sen-reeves-del-scott-and-more-tickets-737936938247?aff=oddtdtcreator
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| This year is our year. Things are looking good for our goal to hold the House and take the Senate, but we as candidates and elected officials cannot do it without your support. I hope to see you at one or both of these events, and at the polls on election day putting Virginia back on track! Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440
---

| | We’re getting down to the wire, Derek. We’re less than 3 weeks from Election Day in the Commonwealth, where voters will decide whether our state will be under complete Republican control or if we’ll be the only state in the nation to flip our legislature blue this year. I’m writing to you today to __[**ask if you can support two more Democratic candidates running for our General Assembly.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71790178/433262624/2065528189?refcode=mw_em_231018_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmZkZjhjMC1lNTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXb0GUNzXziL5bfxj-F5MfVC4I870N9Vfwgb4Nm9jro=)__** ** Lily Franklin, running for House District 41, has spent the majority of her life living and working in Southwest Virginia. She knows the problems facing Virginians because she’s experienced them firsthand and she knows how to find concrete solutions for those problems thanks to the knowledge she’s gained working in our government for the past seven years. Trish White-Boyd, who is running in battleground State Senate District 4, currently serves on the Roanoke City Council – where she also served as Vice-Mayor – and is a successful business owner that has lived in the district for over 40 years. Lily and Trish both have a proven track record of public service and deep roots in our communities. They know what Virginians need and how to get it done. subject: Down goes Jim Jordan - now let’s unseat him!
body:
Jordan doesn’t belong in Congress, much less the Speaker’s office.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71790592/433264111/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTcxMGU1ODAtZTc2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uNMWdSda-ZVscMgSCuLOCIR6G99pLnNVBBAXe1A5dss=)
---
Friend, The pressure is working. We have, once again, defeated Jim Jordan’s vain quest to become Speaker of the House of Representatives and second in line to the presidency! Democrats have held firm in their opposition to Jordan, a man who helped plan Trump’s attempted coup after he lost the 2020 election. **And our pressure worked: enough Republicans wavered to stop Jordan in his tracks.** Jordan is one of the least effective members of Congress. He has passed ZERO bills into law in over 10 years in office. He makes $174,000 per year but is worth $22 million...somehow. And he is totally unfit to serve—he knew about allegations of abuse at OSU and said nothing; and he violated the Constitution to help keep Trump in power after the 2020 election. I have spoken with thousands of traditional Republican voters in our district: _**they all say that Jim Jordan doesn’t show up, he doesn’t care, and he treats his constituents with contempt.**_ He deserves to lose this election. I flew out to D.C. today to join thousands of other advocates for democracy and freedom to PROTEST and fight back to prevent Jordan from becoming Speaker under ANY circumstances:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71790593/433264112/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTcxMGU1ODAtZTc2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uNMWdSda-ZVscMgSCuLOCIR6G99pLnNVBBAXe1A5dss=)

body:
A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://action.conorforaz.com/p/pKfVwCqeNUy4NM7F4Jx-eQ2?unsubscribedata=mC9y1zNeYbpW4dEY%2FJuEK6duUGj7MF1N12yEQdt1ABiyZ8c8TGT9QjuB%2FehsryM57oQt9Z%2FMhEQ%2FjCZEwwmx6GgqakzK%2BflR1bh%2BbpW0XK9HgluK4%2BR3fJ1We3qgwvNgNttYFU22WZfk0a1i%2BQppdbozJT8%2FhjsuBE4JBF6YFwIFl0SCQ0iaBzOA2Agc4OZHTABVSRMzz0Fz%2BlKguoCEIp8F%2BsG3b9NJwWXuWf0D2V3qUjorZTpIwdBeBpXy72ObpZ2QCFy3rnKaWMS8mfYtkU6Fzg4OxVjUCxV%2F1mJ9RDTK9CT10l35EfJrqqLIFTsYstnoAWzM8f6%2FyJKwaPDNVwyjDN1Q7ql5B1NwSk4S9Z8nU%2FEQ6rAQEwwCciw4riFetnxfG0ccDFlrLhxiy9qACGwQTkVi0KrtHPqXiL0tvzFddDLJf7R2yw9BMlHowGll)

Hi Peter, it’s Conor for Congress here.

We can’t deny the facts—Congress is yet again at the brink of a government shutdown and House Republicans have already wasted two weeks fighting amongst themselves about who their party leaders should be.

Arizonans simply can’t afford their dysfunction: 32,510 federal employees in our state will be hurt if Congress can’t reach a long term funding deal by November 17th.

**[It’s clear the GOP can’t govern themselves, let alone a country. Can you chip in $15 and help me flip this seat so we can bring order back to the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71791582/433267792/1075697501?amount=15&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_101823_Dysfunction_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIxNjM0NDUtZTk2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mh_KoiYbxGSKK97lPq9Dl09SB-iY5Xjr3_cBuxwwkuM=)**

Dysfunction reigns, and my opponent David Schweikert is a driving force behind that chaos. Instead of reaching across the aisle to work for his constituents, Schweikert was one of 91 Republicans that voted to shut the government down last month. **Instead, it was Democrats who bailed this country out.**

I’m running for Congress to combat fiscal dysfunction and ensure that Congress _serves_ Arizonans instead of jeopardizing their livelihoods. **[Send Schweikert a message that Arizona won’t take Republicans’ partisan games anymore by chipping in $10 or $20 to my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71791584/433267794/1075697501?amount=20&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_101823_Dysfunction_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIxNjM0NDUtZTk2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mh_KoiYbxGSKK97lPq9Dl09SB-iY5Xjr3_cBuxwwkuM=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, it’s Conor for Congress here. We can’t deny the facts—Congress is yet again at the brink of a government shutdown and House Republicans have already wasted two weeks fighting amongst themselves about who their party leaders should be. Arizonans simply can’t afford their dysfunction: 32,510 federal employees in our state will be hurt if Congress can’t reach a long term funding deal by November 17th. = Dysfunction reigns, and my opponent David Schweikert is a driving force behind that chaos. Instead of reaching across the aisle to work for his constituents, Schweikert was one of 91 Republicans that voted to shut the government down last month. Instead, it was Democrats who bailed this country out. I’m running for Congress to combat fiscal dysfunction and ensure that Congress serves Arizonans instead of jeopardizing their livelihoods. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, let’s end dysfunction, and create an Arizona that works for everyone. —Conor | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring our tax code is fair and equitable and works for small businesses and the middle class. It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.** | = = Paid for by Conor for AZ Conor for AZ P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: Ryan is rising in the polls
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
Ryan climbs the polls amid several stellar media appearances!
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=2275c096db&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### More Iowans are Choosing Ryan
The latest Iowa Republican Caucus Voter Survey by Civiqs shows Ryan at 7th in the polls. He tied with Chris Christie and beat both Mike Pence and Asa Hutchinson! Ryan's message is resonating and gaining momentum with key Iowa voters. [_Read here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=f4af39cdc2&e=c1403f41d3)
|
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=fe4f0ffaff&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Ellie Binkley at the FRW
Ellie spoke at the Iowa Federation of Republican Women last weekend. She talked about her family's move from South Korea to the US and the importance of the next generation. [_Watch here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=f318bd95b1&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=14f19855a8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### New Hampshire Summit
Ryan presented at the GOP's New Hampshire "First in the Nation Leadership Summit" in Nashua last week. He spoke on rising inflation and warned against becoming 'the generation that prospered the most but sacrificed the least.' [_Watch here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7177ce883d&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=a9654b765d&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Oliver Bardwell Podcast
Host Bardwell speaks with Ryan about his past missionary work and how God led him back into business. They discussed the root causes of America's poverty and crime, and how restoring our nation's economy will save the livelihoods of millions of people.
_[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=cfdfa07ea9&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8d22f5b028&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Triple MMM Tailgate
Ryan will appear as a special guest at Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks's 3rd Annual MMM Tailgate Celebration. The event will host a tailgate dinner, several speakers, and lots of fun for all! RSVP _[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=fa536b3520&e=c1403f41d3)_ for tickets. The event will be at Streb Construction in Iowa City on October 20th.
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**

---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=97e4d61b02&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
| **We ask that you take one moment to donate and send the link to 10 new people. Tell them to send it to 10 more! BE THE CHANGE that allows Ryan's message to reach the nation!**

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

Peter, I need to share an important update from my team.
Pennsylvania is a top target of the GOP, and we need to be prepared for anything and everything that Mitch McConnell and our opponent might throw at us.
**[With National Journal ranking Pennsylvania as the #4 most competitive Senate race in the country, I'm asking you to pitch in $5 or more right away. We need to be ready to take on massive GOP spending.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231018-1?refcode=em20231018-1&refcode2=921_552475_8R4Tu1&akid=921%2E552475%2E8R4Tu1)**
With gratitude,
Bob
* * *
**_BREAKING:_** National Journal just ranked PA's Senate seat #4 in their top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024.
**[Defend Bob Casey: Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231018-1?refcode=em20231018-1&refcode2=921_552475_8R4Tu1&akid=921%2E552475%2E8R4Tu1)**
* * *
Peter, this is a breaking update. In National Journal's first Senate rankings of the cycle, **Pennsylvania ranks as #4** -- the most competitive amongst the presidential battleground states.
This shift indicates the seriousness of David McCormick entering into the race and the wealth he can bring to bear. Your support right now could make a big difference in whether or not we're outspent by the GOP.

National Journal says “Democrats need to defy political gravity again to keep their narrow majority” -- _and they're right._
Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority is on the line in Pennsylvania -- so we need to raise the resources to fuel our campaign NOW, before McCormick and right-wing super PACs start pouring money in.
**[Will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can afford today to support our fight to keep Pennsylvania's Senate seat blue? body:
I really need your response

Friend - Chuck Grassley here.

I'm reaching out because one of our most crucial **constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment. **

Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden's Democratic Governors is doing just that. **[She issued an"emergency" public health declaration to SUSPEND individuals' rights to carry and bear arms.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3291d04c6d404d69ab36b85b7161cd57&_e=iHCfwi0-23_wL5Dj620-YVXqOTNM4VcwaQpDHgH99_s02xYPdULDK_THQjXdCi3Iz-EjYfp0MOw46Pc9vilhMJ4fTrj-4M2KWOnJ3DiVkY3bsZdmbLl11xkYX80WuvY0eQPO5Hp9wGzcZlyQmbZUSS4copwR0aR8_iaukKOz2CvfgryhGUWKTm1se-khWKXXvsehDtEX6DMRB0cl-d35mDMpq0Ing9MDXrglF76RQtuf60_gMjXVDW3_I9e6wmi-D9TuRLYkVGE7xyOZKyCBQMnqpC-OXRlRjTgey5tfpTuiwQZfWcqkklj6s5ZcdxQ0eRsyYFKSsb3OUBqOqfr2Z06od9vwhUU1a0Y59XEwTXMC81Ua-bf-xBvrPbODgX8mRp81_brc3DA3SEuikR8vgB1Sg24hAAIE034GPgNoyORPuvBcPfpQo-uDNhXbXBENoh8r9sYUfDo8h9AbIOB7oZ9e-M8dGKZxN2fOALIm5Ks%3D)**

Our Second Amendment Rights are not up for grabs, and I'm reaching out because we desperately need help from dedicated Americans like you to PROTECT our constitutional right to keep and bear arms.

Will you take a few minutes and complete my quick **[Second Amendment Questionnaire?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3291d04c6d404d69ab36b85b7161cd57&_e=iHCfwi0-23_wL5Dj620-YVXqOTNM4VcwaQpDHgH99_s02xYPdULDK_THQjXdCi3Iz-EjYfp0MOw46Pc9vilhMJ4fTrj-4M2KWOnJ3DiVkY3bsZdmbLl11xkYX80WuvY0eQPO5Hp9wGzcZlyQmbZUSS4copwR0aR8_iaukKOz2CvfgryhGUWKTm1se-khWKXXvsehDtEX6DMRB0cl-d35mDMpq0Ing9MDXrglF76RQtuf60_gMjXVDW3_I9e6wmi-D9TuRLYkVGE7xyOZKyCBQMnqpC-OXRlRjTgey5tfpTuiwQZfWcqkklj6s5ZcdxQ0eRsyYFKSsb3OUBqOqfr2ZwrHRFu2IAgkUokUPR1HTM-xHMr5ZAwQ0F7uJIYrWlkeaQsU_toOk86uHhEaZbEyce7InEi933Dxbo9SJQrUevMAXYaGQEpcww2ggMRrcWRMhS_uVJB4o0coolikc63tFRqIiWkDxppFSSwpIp5oqRc%3D)** It's crucial I receive your response as soon as possible with our gun rights under direct assault from Left-wing Governors.

clean_body: I really need your response Friend - Chuck Grassley here. I'm reaching out because one of our most crucial constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment. Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden's Democratic Governors is doing just that. Our Second Amendment Rights are not up for grabs, and I'm reaching out because we desperately need help from dedicated Americans like you to PROTECT our constitutional right to keep and bear arms. Will you take a few minutes and complete my quick It's crucial I receive your response as soon as possible with our gun rights under direct assault from Left-wing Governors. name: Katie Porter
subject: Medicare for All will offer the best quality care at the lowest cost to deliver it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)
When I ran on Medicare for All in 2018, I was told many times it was a losing strategy. I was running to flip a Republican held congressional district, and conventional logic was that only “moderate” Democrats could win these purple districts.
**But I’ve supported Medicare for All because it will offer Americans the best quality healthcare with the lowest cost to deliver it. It’s that simple.**
Don’t believe the BS from health insurance companies. We don’t need a tax increase to afford single payer healthcare. We will _save money_ when our system exists to serve patients—not profits for giant corporations.
**[Derek, can you sign on to show your support for Medicare for All?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-medicare-for-all/?source=em20231018-1&t=2&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)**
[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-medicare-for-all/?source=em20231018-1&t=3&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)
I’m still disappointed that when Democrats controlled the House, Senate, and White House, we never even brought Medicare for All to the floor for a vote. **That’s what I mean when I say Washington is rigged to work for special interests and corporations. And I’m running for the U.S. Senate to change that.**
Thanks for being a part of our movement.
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231018-1?refcode=em20231018-1&refcode2=31654_3422442_OBMcnA&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20231018-1&t=4&refcode2=31654_3422442_OBMcnA&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=31654%2E3422442%2EOBMcnA)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
Phil is running for Florida’s 28th Congressional District with my full support
| | |
---
Friend —
Retired Navy Commander Phil Ehr just announced that he’s running for Florida’s 28th Congressional District, and I am proud to endorse him. Let me tell you why — **[_but first, if you’re all in to flip Florida blue, will you split a donation between my campaign for U.S. Senate and Phil’s campaign for the House?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71793666/433275407/1502717701?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk219-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTkxMzU0OGEtZWY2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mcMvJq18G5cdqMeHiCmVNtSMnf1yB_cIq-QEgQ52w6I=)**
Phil has dedicated his life to service to our country — first in the U.S. Navy, and now as a candidate for office. He understands what it means to serve, and has a proven commitment to fighting for freedom and for Florida families. Now more than ever, we need representatives in the House who understand what it means to stand up for our freedom.
I love this community — and I was proud to represent South Miami-Dade and the Keys in Congress. I know Phil Ehr is a candidate who can flip this congressional district from red to blue. And together, Phil and I will deliver for our community in both the House and the Senate.
**[_This will be a tough race — but I know we can flip South Florida blue this year. I love this community — and I was proud to represent South Miami-Dade and the Keys in Congress. I know Phil Ehr is a candidate who can flip this congressional district from red to blue. And together, Phil and I will deliver for our community in both the House and the Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Phil Ehr will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. Together, Florida Democrats can and will win next November! – Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

subject: Iranian American Democrats of California support Sepi for endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
A big statewide political organization is supporting us, friend

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71795042/433280676/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231018_team_support&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U4N2M5OWUtZjE2ZC1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EDml4yUrKOoMAOmoQrI4L2TVvPDe047oe53oNAHosW8=)
---
Friend, As the only California-wide organization supporting the Iranian American community, The Iranian American Democrats of California (IADC) announced their support of Sepi Shyne for Congress. Here's what Sepi had to say about it: _"I'm deeply honored to have the support of the IADC, an organization I've been a founding member of. This recommendation underscores our shared commitment to diverse voices and the importance of representing all perspectives in Congress. As the first openly gay Iranian-American elected to any public office, I am dedicated to breaking barriers and advocating for a more inclusive and equitable future for all."_ There is not a single Democrat in Congress who hails from our community and Sepi is running to make history — support from IADC is a big leap forward for our campaign. [**Will you chip in $24 or more right now to help Sepi make history in clean_body: This will be a quick read. | | | Peter, this will be a quick read, but it’s really important you understand where things stand: 1\. Democrats continue to fight for working Americans by growing the economy and delivering on meaningful legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the CHIPS Act. 2\. The other side is focused on destroying the progress we’ve made, and extreme MAGA politicians are actively working to undermine our democratic institutions. 3\. We need your help to stand together in opposition to these MAGA Republicans who want to take us backward. Every supporter has a role to play in this campaign, and our work isn’t over until every American has access to the health care they need, the education they deserve, and an economy that’s built from the middle out, not the top down. Every donation, regardless of the amount, gets us one step closer to achieving these goals. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Some exciting endorsement news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
An important update about who’s supporting Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race
#
Peter,
In the nine months since Lucas launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley, national groups, local leaders, and tens of thousands of working people across Missouri have lined up to support our grassroots movement.
So before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) here’s an update:**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)**
**IN JUNE:** Lucas rolled out his first big slate of endorsements — including statewide labor organizations like the Missouri AFL-CIO, former statewide elected officials like Lt. Gov. Joe Maxwell + Auditor Susan Montee, and community leaders like St. Louis County Council Chairwoman Shalonda Webb.
These early endorsements made it clear that Lucas is building the relationships and coalitions across the state that he needs to flip this Senate seat next year.
**IN SEPTEMBER:** Another major national organization, League of Conservation Voters, announced their support for Lucas in this election. They’re all-in because they know that this race is our best chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — and they know that Lucas has what it takes to do it.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)
**AND JUST LAST WEEK:** Over 14,000 healthcare providers, higher education faculty, janitors, nursing home workers, first responders, and social service workers united in the SEIU Missouri/Kansas State Council announced they’re officially endorsing Lucas.
This marks another major signal of support for Lucas from Missouri’s election-winning labor movement, who’ve united together to get major wins for everyday people in our state, like Medicaid expansion + a higher minimum wage.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)
**Lucas is running to defeat Josh Hawley because everyday Missourians deserve someone looking out for them in the U.S. Senate** — and from investing in our communities to protecting our planet and standing up for American workers and the union way of life, Lucas is ready to serve.
**[So if you’re ready to help us elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please add a donation of $10 or whatever you can to our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38623?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38622?refcode=em20231018-4013&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)
---
It’s time to put everyday people — folks who know how to take care of each other — in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231018-4013-footer&t=13&refcode2=4013_614464_NcIsSI&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=4013%2E614464%2ENcIsSI). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend, Over this past week, tens of thousands of people have rallied in cities across the U.S. for a ceasefire. Over 100 Jewish Americans have been arrested while protesting to end the Israeli military’s unfolding genocide against Palestinians, and thousands blocked entrances to the White House on Monday calling for a ceasefire. In Congress, I just joined 12 other Democrats to introduce the _Ceasefire Now Resolution_ , urging the Biden administration to call for an immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine, and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to people under siege and trapped in Gaza. **The collective punishment of Palestinian civilians is a war crime, a moral outrage, and an egregious violation of humanitarian law.** [**Please sign on now to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Ceasefire Now Resolution_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARur9oJsIiNX9tLV9Y5vFlFT0uII91byQnhQHUm1-L6FwUPVIfrMi8ngPyAnHRWfn_iDqASNv2gkHqk65EvVKxD1ehzgrVTMuK9X7cjzDc0EpAEauuolU12jLA206EreCJKM5DmBU7cO03zYevpu0swmwf5LG-9y9BqV1Q1mvQLv2MPquROyTMzocTQEhiyNCMlc-xyv4uwpv6JiUfLR-h2zf0dNUYzZ-VgKHMvDF3FgObQD0hwK54U950iThwKcPesYjhkL79V6wylqCrITt7K-XLUZdAMtoo1JYg10aLDugpa423xkVQAqM3E6PV7vjG97ESOXCJogF8HFTO1-nm0FGsAoKgazXHbaAF4pX26E7swsXKwzE_w1tJ0ppy0DKVXNnUQE7lAdCuhWqrF6_22iAO42QuFzBtAfMlbo1jzFFxuqrA3ghh1TQ7Jsg0CWy8C5QgMuA5sLlvF0X1BaX9eZgMtvhfT_J8inMRCAEwgEGfrP23h84r6eR0TY0CrEC98OEL7oVCd5FRi9UomFHs-xfUcQy0caiQy7vZi0oPdvKSpIxHK94moaGwHIX6XO9q_Ggy6TFJIwoAg9Gno6V6mHlpS6-Zku-ri-f5RhtvdHgLhB2HgFYaWmVsLM9LBJJz-16uvdivuaSeMznGkjmDh2AXI2lkRnUQK-by1Fkz9tn5ENZWG3RxAvGwBkD3_kgV/40j/LBHbwPlCQoiPIdd77Grl3g/h1/BGzaQiiHlKI_nnd3V6K4amY_oGhagf4eT2uC4OjokXo) **We need legislation that saves as many lives as possible, no matter one’s faith or ethnicity.** So I’m joining some of my colleagues and a growing coalition of human rights advocates in calling for de-escalation, ceasefire, and a strong humanitarian response that prevents more devastating civilian casualties across the region.

The answer to war crimes is not war crimes.
Since Saturday October 7, Israel’s government has been dropping around a thousand bombs a day on 2.2 million trapped Palestinians—over half of whom are children. This includes white phosphorus bombs, an illegal incendiary weapon that burns through skin down to the bone.
As of Monday, October 16, the UN and the WHO reported that 1 million Palestinians have been displaced, and Israel’s military has targeted 111 medical facilities, killed 12 health care workers, and bombed 60 ambulances. Recent reports indicate hundreds have been killed in the bombing of a hospital sheltering thousands of civilians.
Calling Palestinians “animals,” Israeli politicians have openly broadcast their collective punishment of civilians. The Israeli government has cut off water, food, fuel, medicine, and electricity to Gaza, while refusing to accept Palestinian Americans from Gaza or to allow the delivery of humanitarian aid into Gaza.
As Jewish group IfNotNow said while supporting the _Ceasefire Now Resolution_ :_“Even as Biden allows Israel's genocide of Palestinians, we will not allow more mass murder in our name.”_
**Unfortunately, many U.S. political leaders are supporting this violence and calling to send more weapons to Israel’s military, while dehumanizing and disregarding Palestinian civilians.** The Biden administration, most of Congress, and U.S. State Department officials have actively tried to silence calls for de-escalation and a ceasefire.
The hate and racist rhetoric coming out of Washington D.C. is pushing incendiary, hateful, and dehumanizing anti-Palestinian and anti-Muslim rhetoric that must be called out. A 6-year-old boy—Wadea Al-Fayoume—was stabbed to death in Chicago for being Palestinian American.
My colleagues are trying to silence me, the only Palestinian American in Congress, because I want the violence to stop—no matter whether it’s toward Israelis or toward Palestinians. I cannot believe I have to beg our country to value every human life, no matter their faith or ethnicity. We cannot lose sight of the humanity in each other.
[**Please sign if you agree: The U.S. government must urgently save Palestinian, Israeli, and American civilian lives.
