clean_body: We need legislation that saves as many lives as possible, no matter one’s faith or ethnicity. | | | Friend, Over this past week, tens of thousands of people have rallied in cities across the U.S. for a ceasefire. Over 100 Jewish Americans have been arrested while protesting to end the Israeli military’s unfolding genocide against Palestinians, and thousands blocked entrances to the White House on Monday calling for a ceasefire. In Congress, I just joined 12 other Democrats to introduce the Ceasefire Now Resolution , urging the Biden administration to call for an immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine, and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to people under siege and trapped in Gaza. The collective punishment of Palestinian civilians is a war crime, a moral outrage, and an egregious violation of humanitarian law. | We need legislation that saves as many lives as possible, no matter one’s faith or ethnicity. So I’m joining some of my colleagues and a growing coalition of human rights advocates in calling for de-escalation, ceasefire, and a strong humanitarian response that prevents more devastating civilian casualties across the region. The answer to war crimes is not war crimes. Since Saturday October 7, Israel’s government has been dropping around a thousand bombs a day on 2.2 million trapped Palestinians—over half of whom are children. This includes white phosphorus bombs, an illegal incendiary weapon that burns through skin down to the bone. As of Monday, October 16, the UN and the WHO reported that 1 million Palestinians have been displaced, and Israel’s military has targeted 111 medical facilities, killed 12 health care workers, and bombed 60 ambulances. Recent reports indicate hundreds have been killed in the bombing of a hospital sheltering thousands of civilians. Calling Palestinians “animals,” Israeli politicians have openly broadcast their collective punishment of civilians. The Israeli government has cut off water, food, fuel, medicine, and electricity to Gaza, while refusing to accept Palestinian Americans from Gaza or to allow the delivery of humanitarian aid into Gaza. As Jewish group IfNotNow said while supporting the Ceasefire Now Resolution :“Even as Biden allows Israel's genocide of Palestinians, we will not allow more mass murder in our name.” Unfortunately, many U.S. political leaders are supporting this violence and calling to send more weapons to Israel’s military, while dehumanizing and disregarding Palestinian civilians. The Biden administration, most of Congress, and U.S. State Department officials have actively tried to silence calls for de-escalation and a ceasefire. The hate and racist rhetoric coming out of Washington D.C. is pushing incendiary, hateful, and dehumanizing anti-Palestinian and anti-Muslim rhetoric that must be called out. A 6-year-old boy—Wadea Al-Fayoume—was stabbed to death in Chicago for being Palestinian American. My colleagues are trying to silence me, the only Palestinian American in Congress, because I want the violence to stop—no matter whether it’s toward Israelis or toward Palestinians. I cannot believe I have to beg our country to value every human life, no matter their faith or ethnicity. We cannot lose sight of the humanity in each other. Thank you for taking action. Right now, we must keep showing massive public support for ending the violence. And in the long-term, we must keep building the movement to end the Israeli government’s apartheid system against Palestinians. Everyone in the region deserves to live safely, in freedom and with equal rights. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
6️⃣ things to know about the GOP’s Speaker nominee Jim Jordan
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71796510/433285008/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDhjMmE5YS1mNjZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmloSqWtPvy9ZODuDaDHY5PqBlXz4nketatRJc1WqlE=&emci=0329fb31-f46d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=448c2a9a-f66d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)

| | After two weeks of stalled progress and chaos, it appears House Republicans still cannot get their act together. Their latest selection for Speaker of the House, Rep. Jim Jordan, just failed (again) to get the votes needed to take the gavel. And for good reason. Jordan has a history of extremism: **Jim Jordan has a fraught relationship with democracy.**
* He sought to overturn the 2020 Election results, refused to comply with several subpoenas in January 6 investigations, and amplified unhinged conspiracy theories.

**Jim Jordan does not believe in compromise or bipartisan solutions.**
* His far-right House Freedom Caucus uses a "my way or the highway" approach to governing, targeting essential immigration reforms and the Affordable Care Act.

**Jim Jordan's voting record is at odds with the needs of everyday Americans.**
* He voted against bipartisan legislation for disaster relief, aid for victims of 9/11, medical research funding, opioid treatment, and expanded medical benefits for veterans.
* He has pushed for radical plans that would make sweeping cuts to Social Security, and functionally destroy Medicare by raising the retirement age and slashing benefits.
* He also supports a nationwide abortion ban with zero exceptions.

House Democrats are ready to work across the aisle to lower costs for working families, to tackle climate change, and make our communities safer — but with a Speaker selection like Jordan and the chaos caucus running the show — that is not likely possible. clean_body: 6️⃣ things to know about the GOP’s Speaker nominee Jim Jordan | | | | After two weeks of stalled progress and chaos, it appears House Republicans still cannot get their act together. Their latest selection for Speaker of the House, Rep. Jim Jordan, just failed (again) to get the votes needed to take the gavel. And for good reason. Jordan has a history of extremism: Jim Jordan has a fraught relationship with democracy. He sought to overturn the 2020 Election results, refused to comply with several subpoenas in January 6 investigations, and amplified unhinged conspiracy theories. Jim Jordan does not believe in compromise or bipartisan solutions. His far-right House Freedom Caucus uses a "my way or the highway" approach to governing, targeting essential immigration reforms and the Affordable Care Act. Jim Jordan's voting record is at odds with the needs of everyday Americans. He voted against bipartisan legislation for disaster relief, aid for victims of 9/11, medical research funding, opioid treatment, and expanded medical benefits for veterans. He has pushed for radical plans that would make sweeping cuts to Social Security, and functionally destroy Medicare by raising the retirement age and slashing benefits. He also supports a nationwide abortion ban with zero exceptions. House Democrats are ready to work across the aisle to lower costs for working families, to tackle climate change, and make our communities safer — but with a Speaker selection like Jordan and the chaos caucus running the show — that is not likely possible. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Xakota, Fair Fight
subject: Our plan to win in 2024 and beyond
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
The latest threats to the freedom to vote, the work we’re doing to fight back, and what it will take to defend our democracy in the 2024 elections and beyond. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71796571/433285212/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231018_e_strategicplan_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY5ODQxZS1mNzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oRU3i4WXeTY6NsgczxV1tucxN9utBRQgCYkUWbQ4HY=&emci=ae321817-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8269841e-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi, I’m Xakota — and because you’re a critical part of the Fair Fight team, I wanted to give you an inside look at the work we’re doing to educate the media and shape the national narrative around voting and democracy. It’s a strategy memo about the threats we face and the work we must do to defend our democracy in the 2024 elections and beyond. We share how we plan to fight back against systemic efforts to disenfranchise voters, particularly voters of color and young voters. We’re calling it our Battleground Democracy program. Keep scrolling to read more about it. Now, here’s the thing: Executing these plans will require an outpouring of support from grassroots donors across the country. We’re counting on people like you. [**Can you pitch in any amount to help fund our programs and help ensure equal access to the ballot box?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71796572/433285213/1358700588?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231018_e_strategicplan_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY5ODQxZS1mNzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oRU3i4WXeTY6NsgczxV1tucxN9utBRQgCYkUWbQ4HY=) Thank you for all of your support — this work wouldn’t be possible without activists like you! Xakota Xakota Espinoza
Director of Strategic Communications
Fair Fight
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71796573/433285214/-845747035?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231018_e_strategicplan_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY5ODQxZS1mNzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oRU3i4WXeTY6NsgczxV1tucxN9utBRQgCYkUWbQ4HY=&emci=ae321817-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8269841e-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) **Date** : October 17, 2023
**To** : Interested Parties
**From** : Fair Fight
**Re** : The stakes for voting and elections in 2024 and beyond
* * *
**What We’re Up Against:** Right now, we are seeing a nationally-coordinated effort by far-right extremists who are using every tool at their disposal to restrict access to the ballot box, attack election administration, and subvert the will of voters. Fair Fight recently hosted the third in our ongoing series of “Battleground Democracy” briefings to provide media with insight into the current landscape for voting access as we approach the 2024 presidential election. Since launching this past May, some of our work through Battleground Democracy has included:
* Ongoing education directed towards media and voters alike, including memos, videos, and briefings, around the proliferation of mass voter challenges and the threat they pose to democracy;
* Highlighting the emerging trend of legislative expulsions, censures, and takeovers to silence the voices of elected officials and subvert the will of voters;
* Ringing the alarm around the emergence of new “voter fraud hunting” software being pushed by far-right activists and election deniers;
* Exposing the dangers of rapid takeovers of local Boards of Elections (BOEs);
* Highlighting our assessment of the anti-voter track records of the GOP presidential candidates, and conducting rapid response around the recent debates; and
* Spotlighting four far-right groups that have us watching out for anti-democratic tactics—including mass voter challenges—that subvert elections and restrict access to the ballot.

Below, you can take a closer look at some of the key takeaways from our most recent work. You can also follow our efforts in real time at [**FairFight.com/BattlegroundDemocracy**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71796574/433285215/1625705104?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231018_e_strategicplan_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY5ODQxZS1mNzZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oRU3i4WXeTY6NsgczxV1tucxN9utBRQgCYkUWbQ4HY=&emci=ae321817-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8269841e-f76d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277). _**Far-Right Groups that Raise Our concerns About Election Subversion and Ballot Access**_ We view efforts by conspiracy theorists and anti-voter extremists to strip eligible voters from the rolls as one of the biggest threats to our democracy as we look ahead to 2024, and believe Georgia has become ground zero for these efforts. Since the 2020 presidential election, more than 350,000 voter challenges have been filed in Georgia. Bad actors are increasingly weaponizing anti-democratic tactics like mass voter challenges and aggressive voter purges — conducted under the guise of “list maintenance” and the need for “clean voter rolls” — to restrict voting access for historically marginalized communities, particularly Black and brown voters. Fair Fight has been tracking this issue closely to support voters, and understand and document the harmful impacts of these anti-voter actions. Since the 2021 passage of SB 202 — Georgia’s extreme anti-voter legislation codifying that any single Georgian can challenge an unlimited number of registered voters in their county — we’ve collected and analyzed information reflecting that at least 100,000 (or approx. 1 in every 70) Georgia voters have had their eligibility challenged by anti-voter conspiracy theorists, the majority of whom are white, far-right men fueled by disinformation and false conspiracy theories surrounding the 2020 election. **According to the data for the vast majority of the challenges tracked by Fair Fight — about 89,000 of 100,000 — were submitted by just six right-wing activists.** In our latest Battleground Democracy briefing for the media, we put the spotlight on four groups — the “Election Integrity Network” (EIN), VoterGA, True the Vote (TTV), and Greater Georgia — and our opinion that they have been leading the charge when it comes to training and encouraging individuals to file challenges. Based on what we have heard from voters, counties, and other sources, we believe these groups are at the center of efforts to make mass voter challenges one of the cornerstones of the right’s state-by-state, precinct-by-precinct effort to purge America’s voter rolls of those deemed undesirable. _**Georgia Is a Battleground and Testing Ground**_ Not only is Georgia a critical political battleground state in 2024, it’s also where the fight to defend our nation’s democracy is currently taking place — so Fair Fight’s work in Georgia will have a ripple effect nationwide. Based on our experience on the ground in Georgia over the last several years, we believe Governor Brian Kemp is a chief architect of modern-day voter suppression. His extreme anti-voter law, Senate Bill 202, has served as the blueprint for voter suppression bills nationwide. And we continue to hear of GOP-led state legislatures across the country that are following Kemp’s lead, working to silence and stifle the political power of voters, especially those in Black, brown, young, and LGBTQ+ communities. In Georgia, the GOP legislature has passed legislation leading to the removal of Black members of county boards of elections, as well as legislation that facilitates the removal of progressive district attorneys. And across the country, GOP-led legislatures have expelled, censured, and taken other actions to silence, remove, and suppress legislators and democratically elected officials. These actions, which have disproportionately targeted Black and queer electeds, represent a disturbing new frontier of the GOP’s assault on democracy. These tactics remind us at Fair Fight of those used by white supremacists post-Reconstruction, relying on state power to suppress and intimidate dissenting legislators and silence the communities they represent. _**The Path Ahead**_ All of this is happening against the backdrop of the upcoming 2024 elections, magnifying our concern that the far-right GOP is preparing to disrupt elections administration with anti-democratic and anti-voter legislation, an endless barrage of unfunded mandates designed to overwhelm election workers, and challenges to voters and to election results. We are also hearing from voters negatively affected by representatives who seem to be openly lauding their intentions to target Black, Hispanic, and young voters as a means of suppressing the vote. **We do not view it as an accident that this is happening as Democratic-leaning blocs of voters are continuing to turn out in record-breaking numbers, and as the electorate is becoming increasingly more diverse.** We believe the GOP knows what this shift means for their chances of winning democratically and that, as a result, they may use every tool at their disposal to try to hold on to power. But this strategy not only erodes the freedom to vote, it carries additional consequences like intimidating voters and legislators alike to stop them from showing up and speaking out. As 2024 approaches, we must see these reprehensible tactics for what they are — an attempt to silence our voices, subvert our will, and undermine our fundamental freedoms. These last-ditch power grabs cannot be permitted to succeed; we must stand together, and ensure that our voices are heard. **Fair Fight will continue our work to protect the freedom to vote in all of the following ways:**
* Support pro-democracy champions and defeat anti-voter extremists in the 2023 local elections, 2024 elections, and beyond. Following the 2020 presidential election and 2021/2022 U.S. Senate election wins, we’ve shown that we know how to win and we’re ready to do it again.
* Contact voters who’ve been affected by mass voter purges and help them maintain or reinstate their registrations. After Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State announced a purge in August, we were able to contact tens of thousands of voters with information on how to stay on the rolls.
* Equip voters with the educational materials they need to confirm they’re registered, find their polling place or dropbox, cast their ballot, and have it counted.
* Launch online ads to reach new voters and support voter turnout efforts.
* Mobilize Democracy Watch volunteers to attend Board of Elections meetings and help cultivate pro-voter leadership on those bodies. Recently, this work supported the appointment of the first Black female chair in Georgia’s Fulton County.

Fair Fight will continue to call out bad behavior by, and take action against, right-wing actors who attempt to hoard power from those to whom it truly belongs — the people of our democracy. Together, we can continue to fight for free and fair elections for all. Together, we can win.
* * *

clean_body: The latest threats to the freedom to vote, the work we’re doing to fight back, and what it will take to defend our democracy in the 2024 elections and beyond. | | | Hi, I’m Xakota — and because you’re a critical part of the Fair Fight team, I wanted to give you an inside look at the work we’re doing to educate the media and shape the national narrative around voting and democracy. It’s a strategy memo about the threats we face and the work we must do to defend our democracy in the 2024 elections and beyond. We share how we plan to fight back against systemic efforts to disenfranchise voters, particularly voters of color and young voters. We’re calling it our Battleground Democracy program. Keep scrolling to read more about it. Now, here’s the thing: Executing these plans will require an outpouring of support from grassroots donors across the country. We’re counting on people like you. = Thank you for all of your support — this work wouldn’t be possible without activists like you! Xakota Xakota Espinoza Director of Strategic Communications Fair Fight Date : October 17, 2023 To : Interested Parties From : Fair Fight Re : The stakes for voting and elections in 2024 and beyond What We’re Up Against: Right now, we are seeing a nationally-coordinated effort by far-right extremists who are using every tool at their disposal to restrict access to the ballot box, attack election administration, and subvert the will of voters. Fair Fight recently hosted the third in our ongoing series of “Battleground Democracy” briefings to provide media with insight into the current landscape for voting access as we approach the 2024 presidential election. Since launching this past May, some of our work through Battleground Democracy has included: Ongoing education directed towards media and voters alike, including memos, videos, and briefings, around the proliferation of mass voter challenges and the threat they pose to democracy; Highlighting the emerging trend of legislative expulsions, censures, and takeovers to silence the voices of elected officials and subvert the will of voters; Ringing the alarm around the emergence of new “voter fraud hunting” software being pushed by far-right activists and election deniers; Exposing the dangers of rapid takeovers of local Boards of Elections (BOEs); Highlighting our assessment of the anti-voter track records of the GOP presidential candidates, and conducting rapid response around the recent debates; and Spotlighting four far-right groups that have us watching out for anti-democratic tactics—including mass voter challenges—that subvert elections and restrict access to the ballot. Below, you can take a closer look at some of the key takeaways from our most recent work. You can also follow our efforts in real time at . Far-Right Groups that Raise Our concerns About Election Subversion and Ballot Access We view efforts by conspiracy theorists and anti-voter extremists to strip eligible voters from the rolls as one of the biggest threats to our democracy as we look ahead to 2024, and believe Georgia has become ground zero for these efforts. Since the 2020 presidential election, more than 350,000 voter challenges have been filed in Georgia. Bad actors are increasingly weaponizing anti-democratic tactics like mass voter challenges and aggressive voter purges — conducted under the guise of “list maintenance” and the need for “clean voter rolls” — to restrict voting access for historically marginalized communities, particularly Black and brown voters. Fair Fight has been tracking this issue closely to support voters, and understand and document the harmful impacts of these anti-voter actions. Since the 2021 passage of SB 202 — Georgia’s extreme anti-voter legislation codifying that any single Georgian can challenge an unlimited number of registered voters in their county — we’ve collected and analyzed information reflecting that at least 100,000 (or approx. 1 in every 70) Georgia voters have had their eligibility challenged by anti-voter conspiracy theorists, the majority of whom are white, far-right men fueled by disinformation and false conspiracy theories surrounding the 2020 election. According to the data for the vast majority of the challenges tracked by Fair Fight — about 89,000 of 100,000 — were submitted by just six right-wing activists. In our latest Battleground Democracy briefing for the media, we put the spotlight on four groups — the “Election Integrity Network” (EIN), VoterGA, True the Vote (TTV), and Greater Georgia — and our opinion that they have been leading the charge when it comes to training and encouraging individuals to file challenges. Based on what we have heard from voters, counties, and other sources, we believe these groups are at the center of efforts to make mass voter challenges one of the cornerstones of the right’s state-by-state, precinct-by-precinct effort to purge America’s voter rolls of those deemed undesirable. Georgia Is a Battleground and Testing Ground Not only is Georgia a critical political battleground state in 2024, it’s also where the fight to defend our nation’s democracy is currently taking place — so Fair Fight’s work in Georgia will have a ripple effect nationwide. Based on our experience on the ground in Georgia over the last several years, we believe Governor Brian Kemp is a chief architect of modern-day voter suppression. His extreme anti-voter law, Senate Bill 202, has served as the blueprint for voter suppression bills nationwide. And we continue to hear of GOP-led state legislatures across the country that are following Kemp’s lead, working to silence and stifle the political power of voters, especially those in Black, brown, young, and LGBTQ+ communities. In Georgia, the GOP legislature has passed legislation leading to the removal of Black members of county boards of elections, as well as legislation that facilitates the removal of progressive district attorneys. And across the country, GOP-led legislatures have expelled, censured, and taken other actions to silence, remove, and suppress legislators and democratically elected officials. These actions, which have disproportionately targeted Black and queer electeds, represent a disturbing new frontier of the GOP’s assault on democracy. These tactics remind us at Fair Fight of those used by white supremacists post-Reconstruction, relying on state power to suppress and intimidate dissenting legislators and silence the communities they represent. The Path Ahead All of this is happening against the backdrop of the upcoming 2024 elections, magnifying our concern that the far-right GOP is preparing to disrupt elections administration with anti-democratic and anti-voter legislation, an endless barrage of unfunded mandates designed to overwhelm election workers, and challenges to voters and to election results. We are also hearing from voters negatively affected by representatives who seem to be openly lauding their intentions to target Black, Hispanic, and young voters as a means of suppressing the vote. We do not view it as an accident that this is happening as Democratic-leaning blocs of voters are continuing to turn out in record-breaking numbers, and as the electorate is becoming increasingly more diverse. We believe the GOP knows what this shift means for their chances of winning democratically and that, as a result, they may use every tool at their disposal to try to hold on to power. But this strategy not only erodes the freedom to vote, it carries additional consequences like intimidating voters and legislators alike to stop them from showing up and speaking out. As 2024 approaches, we must see these reprehensible tactics for what they are — an attempt to silence our voices, subvert our will, and undermine our fundamental freedoms. These last-ditch power grabs cannot be permitted to succeed; we must stand together, and ensure that our voices are heard. Fair Fight will continue our work to protect the freedom to vote in all of the following ways: Support pro-democracy champions and defeat anti-voter extremists in the 2023 local elections, 2024 elections, and beyond. Following the 2020 presidential election and 2021/2022 U.S. Senate election wins, we’ve shown that we know how to win and we’re ready to do it again. Contact voters who’ve been affected by mass voter purges and help them maintain or reinstate their registrations. After Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State announced a purge in August, we were able to contact tens of thousands of voters with information on how to stay on the rolls. Equip voters with the educational materials they need to confirm they’re registered, find their polling place or dropbox, cast their ballot, and have it counted. Launch online ads to reach new voters and support voter turnout efforts. Mobilize Democracy Watch volunteers to attend Board of Elections meetings and help cultivate pro-voter leadership on those bodies. Recently, this work supported the appointment of the first Black female chair in Georgia’s Fulton County. Fair Fight will continue to call out bad behavior by, and take action against, right-wing actors who attempt to hoard power from those to whom it truly belongs — the people of our democracy. Together, we can continue to fight for free and fair elections for all. Together, we can win. | = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We have a MAGA challenger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Getting ready for 2024
#
We debated whether or not to send this email.
When it comes to campaigning, our motto has always been to focus on our record, and not give any extreme right-wing opponents any free publicity.
But even if we don’t talk about them much, the reality is we have to take our Republican challengers seriously. In 2020, Alexandria was in the second most expensive House race in the country. Her challenger raised and spent more than $10 million against her. And even when our challengers don’t win, the disinformation they sow can discredit our movement if we don’t fight back.
Now, we officially have a challenger for 2024, and she's starting to fundraise.
[We’re now asking if you will contribute $5 today to support Alexandria and ensure we have the resources to win next year? When thousands of people give what they can, it shows the power of this movement.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231018.14T6Rs&refcode=em20231018-5173-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)
Here are a few facts about our opponent:
* **She paid George Santos a lot of money to consult on the last election.** In 2022, she paid George Santos’ consulting firm $110,320 and hers was the only campaign to ever report working with the firm.
* **Her campaign may have been part of a scam run by George Santos.** A donor who gave to Santos had their credit card charged for additional, unauthorized donations — including two maxed-out $2,900 contributions to her campaign. 1
* She participated in the **January 6 Insurrection rally.**
* **She is associated with the white supremacist Proud Boys** and proudly posted a photo of herself with their leaders.

We know that communities in The Bronx, Queens, and across the country support our message and want AOC to stay in Congress – but we need to show it by making sure Alexandria wins again by a considerable margin.
[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today? Every dollar helps us reach more voters to ensure that we have the resources to reach voters all across New York’s 14th district so Alexandria wins by a HUGE margin next year.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231018.14T6Rs&refcode=em20231018-5173-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231018.14T6Rs&refcode=em20231018-5173-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)**
Together we can keep winning and send Alexandria back to Congress for another term to keep fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice for all.
Thank you for being with us,
Team AOC
1 - [talkingpointsmemo.com/muckraker/george-santos-tina-forte-flag-credit-card-charges](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19176?t=22&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231018?refcode=em20231018-5173-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=5173_2526796_TtNYJ6&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231018-5173-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=5173%2E2526796%2ETtNYJ6)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Her challenger raised and spent more than $10 million against her. And even when our challengers don’t win, the disinformation they sow can discredit our movement if we don’t fight back. In 2022, she paid George Santos’ consulting firm $110,320 and hers was the only campaign to ever report working with the firm. Her campaign may have been part of a scam run by George Santos. A donor who gave to Santos had their credit card charged for additional, unauthorized donations — including two maxed-out $2,900 contributions to her campaign. 1 She participated in the January 6 Insurrection rally. She is associated with the white supremacist Proud Boys and proudly posted a photo of herself with their leaders. We know that communities in The Bronx, Queens, and across the country support our message and want AOC to stay in Congress – but we need to show it by making sure Alexandria wins again by a considerable margin. Together we can keep winning and send Alexandria back to Congress for another term to keep fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice for all. Thank you for being with us, Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: John Padora
subject: Times are tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
I just wanted to acknowledge the fact that the world has seemed more chaotic, unpredictable, and dangerous these past few weeks. Abroad, we’ve seen continued intense fighting in Ukraine as they fight to repel the Russian invaders.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=973f86ad02114a64b264f7cd580b13c6&_e=RDJJUK13efW0Cue9ZKq0E7Ctuq41Hp5gmwUGaNIECKVJD1a5Z2Z7g5Fct4bL5NZdD_6QGHsOtoRieHnvFAEfShLYE-UUsfrQTp-tfSc99hry3MbvzIRzcykC0X9kXkq2bXqDxiGjJQTTBAZXoPQbrgyTmNbIxHQy0sFJWSsuagEsEox7-O_xLQdStAR47uLY1GwLt8wVq5dFGejaGTzv4YcqceFIet38slfVQcL2F_dX5PXm2e9-op9IFlRS0-Jnwxh2dMSL6ksw7K0vRWpnoCJmDqaVkA1uRaGHSzW0pacBgYMDdAmo0lFCg__LYmT7eEVMPi5zBHAYlAuz-uMd50sTlXTzbF4cZi_KBKo5k64mLUUH_QVqKFgmmY1h81AsfEla21uAhb6gEJQKmc3pjg%3D%3D) Folks, I just wanted to acknowledge the fact that the world has seemed more chaotic, unpredictable, and dangerous these past few weeks. Abroad, we’ve seen continued intense fighting in Ukraine as they fight to repel the Russian invaders. In Israel, we’ve seen unspeakable horrors in the aftermath of Hamas’ surprise attack, and we’ve seen war in Gaza as Israel responds to the largest attack against Jews since 1945. Here at home, we’ve had quite a circus of Republicans in Congress trying to figure out who the Speaker of the House will be after Kevin McCarthy was ousted for keeping the government open for only one more month. Simply put, things are not great. And I feel as concerned for the future as you do. Often, it feels impossible to do anything about the state of the world when things seem so bad. But I promise you that there is something you can do. **Here at home, you can help ensure that the chaos agents bringing our government to the brink of shutting down do not remain in power after 2024.** We only need to flip five seats, and if you send me to Washington, that puts us one step closer to regaining the House majority. **[So, if you can, please donate to my campaign today to bring us closer to making flipping the House blue a reality.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=973f86ad02114a64b264f7cd580b13c6&_e=RDJJUK13efW0Cue9ZKq0E7Ctuq41Hp5gmwUGaNIECKVJD1a5Z2Z7g5Fct4bL5NZdD_6QGHsOtoRieHnvFAEfShLYE-UUsfrQTp-tfSc99hry3MbvzIRzcykC0X9kXkq2bXqDxiGjJQTTBAZXoPQbrgyTmNbIxHQy0sFJWSsuagEsEox7-O_xLQdStAR47uLY1GwLt8wVq5dFGejaGTzv4YcqceFIet38slfVQcL2F_dX5PXm2e9-op9IFlRS0-JnagWdtechG_CXb4eQ5h--YFuafP9Zarkvd5Cdxm1WLuILzuCSmpRiRv9Of2SbAuVXYmj7eomW6Vw1xtcaXaZZZOBtquuvAmgkO-TgmJpzyv_nAm8LtPyRIvWe8RR4GvK9D-pzFwvzKfT7tYaVoIs0iw%3D%3D)** [CHIP IN TODAY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=973f86ad02114a64b264f7cd580b13c6&_e=RDJJUK13efW0Cue9ZKq0E7Ctuq41Hp5gmwUGaNIECKVJD1a5Z2Z7g5Fct4bL5NZdD_6QGHsOtoRieHnvFAEfShLYE-UUsfrQTp-tfSc99hry3MbvzIRzcykC0X9kXkq2bXqDxiGjJQTTBAZXoPQbrgyTmNbIxHQy0sFJWSsuagEsEox7-O_xLQdStAR47uLY1GwLt8wVq5dFGejaGTzv4YcqceFIet38slfVQcL2F_dX5PXm2e9-op9IFlRS0-JncPrFcN0nzVue1I93m4bDKOdwTtc5c-62dyW6-BhLElzRubVTBwweHiFLBFAao18IpDl4bofbEtNk133PYk2pirKu8Ok9Q3kWt59JPPWrBxbV2h_b4RnbmYN3zufKcCzrB5zIa33g9482xFoZnKv_vA%3D%3D) Times are tough right now, and the news is bleak. But always remember that there is always something you can do about it. Thank you so much, John Padora [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=973f86ad02114a64b264f7cd580b13c6&_e=RDJJUK13efW0Cue9ZKq0E7Ctuq41Hp5gmwUGaNIECKVJD1a5Z2Z7g5Fct4bL5NZdD_6QGHsOtoRieHnvFAEfShLYE-UUsfrQTp-tfSc99hry3MbvzIRzcykC0X9kXkq2bXqDxiGjJQTTBAZXoPQbrgyTmNbIxHQy0sFJWSsuagEsEox7-O_xLQdStAR47uLY1GwLt8wVq5dFGejaGTzv4YcqceFIet38slfVQcL2F_dGRabj_r6wscGb9bSO0UrP2e569pVEwovoM9LV4jo1mUhs-ZmD4icdelw8EtfdaRxVhUBX6znBI82IQqlwJzXCzglB-H2IA9PxqeQq_ZgYbWiP-7il6oAZgBfSr8IRcH-xPkLrBdBQCFRgJlCof462SfC7Ix2ghms9RF9UpfiTid6zsKmu4BRHyxVxMZSMfDs%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Down by 4 points
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I know we will win in November, but I can’t do it without you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_t=Dvn2ASzq8V0qz7NOFGzagz5DItSnuHmME3D3f7eNm2r5d2l7Mms-MswDLj50RcnrqV6cMlhBx-zyhR6IURwjbFyHW5SWnK4u1tjSg-U3Hns%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_t=Dvn2ASzq8V0qz7NOFGzagz5DItSnuHmME3D3f7eNm2r5d2l7Mms-MswDLj50RcnrqV6cMlhBx-zyhR6IURwjbFyHW5SWnK4u1tjSg-U3Hns%3D)
---

Fellow American - did you see this NEW Montana Senate Poll?

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_e=ySKYaw81QFMYjf7ez9nC6ItXr99Pp-VC81IvoqMkakTIGRg-03EbEO5gUKfZVgOrbGzhKW8OtvNzHd0-M8Lr0MPr0Tu9wB1PteIpgbIjpGXr2xVONE9MEQw4icndibTCnN8NnLNe2m9npc9vVGfZhU3CFqKPVtz0ZR-KLKe26Ifz5F1n1hjbqAm71kScbIzI2W8DKMyzb-Vo_g5Ory5xPOztZ2ySRKEnI-okaN-s8nxmIdxon0m_InluD7kT3nBiBm3uyFCIRwwfLPzvXrxCp-ZOPyL1EghxKJneGDmO7RTD0UVwBjYKmx4VRqrrhDcc57pF601JY3Gc-FClcbFhr2uu5Uowle5AnT-uVz_rudbGuXEnriOJ-K5N8RWNykjR1JQs7p511s4mfsihX70uhQ%3D%3D)
We're GAINING FAST on an 18-year incumbent, Democrat career politician Jon Tester.

I haven't been in this race long - _just three and a half months_ - but what we're doing is working.

Fellow American, I am new to politics. I've never run for office before. And I'm not a career politician. I'm a former Navy SEAL, aerial firefighter, and job creator ready to bring a new generation of conservative leadership to Washington.

But I cannot do this without conservative patriots like you.

**[Before the day is over, can I count on you to chip in $4 or even $40 to help us catch up to entrenched Democrat Jon Tester?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_e=ySKYaw81QFMYjf7ez9nC6ItXr99Pp-VC81IvoqMkakTIGRg-03EbEO5gUKfZVgOrbGzhKW8OtvNzHd0-M8Lr0MPr0Tu9wB1PteIpgbIjpGXr2xVONE9MEQw4icndibTCnN8NnLNe2m9npc9vVGfZhU3CFqKPVtz0ZR-KLKe26Ifz5F1n1hjbqAm71kScbIzI2W8DKMyzb-Vo_g5Ory5xPOztZ2ySRKEnI-okaN-s8nwkYoqoBgVIFapRL6F6oTNsScEeCC56_ytljxM2s5MIDjoBeRQeeMAplI_kHMyGQMCz3B2059RW5KPo0DFTmYhist7kooNA7ZoLT5PCWCT5z12qwGLSJ_vIdTAeZAX1k_4_nMVOQ3wijrK7K8xrPAoYGvXO7HglCjOed_1Swjhcnw%3D%3D)**

**We cannot win a Republican Senate majority without winning in Montana, Fellow American.**

**[I wouldn't ask for your help today if this wasn't the top priority.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_e=ySKYaw81QFMYjf7ez9nC6ItXr99Pp-VC81IvoqMkakTIGRg-03EbEO5gUKfZVgOrbGzhKW8OtvNzHd0-M8Lr0MPr0Tu9wB1PteIpgbIjpGXr2xVONE9MEQw4icndibTCnN8NnLNe2m9npc9vVGfZhU3CFqKPVtz0ZR-KLKe26Ifz5F1n1hjbqAm71kScbIzI2W8DKMyzb-Vo_g5Ory5xPOztZ2ySRKEnI-okaN-s8nxFG-_aFiB7ICVp0liBAqbwEJvzl2Ustqpn-naoiW0H75LBVjmCz2_ZiQYMsyKQZ_K_2Xy_Z4vfvsQFkGUmZMi_x3KwWANg-iElBb4w_pEHffq2QUFaJ0P9vURDFRJdQVmTiJw8M7ojqWSD57gnPPwIuCausmfTNcdcj7ZaOALMCg%3D%3D)**

For America's Future,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_e=ySKYaw81QFMYjf7ez9nC6ItXr99Pp-VC81IvoqMkakTIGRg-03EbEO5gUKfZVgOrbGzhKW8OtvNzHd0-M8Lr0MPr0Tu9wB1PteIpgbIjpGXr2xVONE9MEQw4icndibTCnN8NnLNe2m9npc9vVGfZhU3CFqKPVtz0ZR-KLKe26Ifz5F1n1hjbqAm71kScbIzI2W8DKMyzb-Vo_g5Ory5xPOztZ2ySRKEnI-okaN-s8nw9PSh11iuS1WY3EjWDAFEvgHX3hyOTT2tMptFNxayfel26Gj9iMDvcYp1Mvr1w1i1XwaNAOxoTuw8DH8SFIHT5oJ8H_fewS7UwgwbYr8myUO3mUz21mxTXXa-hpjr1oQoXpzWkBikUwxeUqk8VBzXEfDy48gC6olLgNcz3V8rCAw%3D%3D)
Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=61251db3b21641c4ae8fc564f670ffd3&_e=ySKYaw81QFMYjf7ez9nC6ItXr99Pp-VC81IvoqMkakTIGRg-03EbEO5gUKfZVgOrbGzhKW8OtvNzHd0-M8Lr0MPr0Tu9wB1PteIpgbIjpGXr2xVONE9MEQw4icndibTCnN8NnLNe2m9npc9vVGfZhU3CFqKPVtz0ZR-KLKe26Ifz5F1n1hjbqAm71kScbIzI2W8DKMyzb-Vo_g5Ory5xPOztZ2ySRKEnI-okaN-s8nwrvZxCMIDx9W62mr2Vd9hAmBWjhVJJIqkSxUuexhIgoATtXeo4zWAzOIPnupDtbpGBHV0S87Xl8lLNwOGG4oNqwnF19fLoGKA8E_fTS2h9dxKKh2FhQa3bGE_aDo-Z_vHdZ8U82wpmHNBFvGkNq7fInaWbcPKNCmySDJtsHesxsQ%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: =?utf-8?Q?Roca=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Exciting News!
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6c586164cf&e=0a12281e0e)
# Exciting Milestone: We've Raised Over $100,775 for Our Congressional Campaign So Far! 🎉
Dear Friend,
I hope this email finds you well and full of optimism. I'm thrilled to share some fantastic news with you today, and I can hardly contain my excitement. Together, we've achieved something truly remarkable on our journey towards representing Maryland's 6th Congressional District!
I am elated to announce that our campaign for Congress has successfully fundraised over $100,775 since we launched back in April 2023, and we've reached this impressive six-figure milestone earlier than anyone could have imagined. This achievement is a testament to the incredible support we've received from our community, donors, & supporters, and it shows that our message of common-sense leadership is resonating with voters who believe in a brighter future for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District.
What sets our campaign apart from the rest is not just our fundraising number itself, but the way we've reached it. Unlike some of our Republican opponents who rely on loans to artificially inflate their numbers, we are proud to say that all of our contributions have come from real, everyday people who genuinely believe in our cause. Over 1,000 individuals, from all walks of life and backgrounds, have come together to support us. Our average contribution is under $100, making it clear that we are a campaign of the people, by the people, and for the people.
Furthermore, I'm excited to share that over 90% of our contributions come directly from within Maryland's 6th Congressional District. This means that our local community is the driving force behind our campaign, and we are committed to representing their needs, concerns, and aspirations in Congress. This is a powerful testament to our campaign's grassroots strength and the genuine connection we have with the people we aim to serve.
We couldn't have reached this incredible milestone without your support, and I am eternally grateful for your dedication and commitment to our cause. Your contributions, whether large or small, have propelled us forward and demonstrated the collective power of a united community.
But, our journey is far from over. As we look ahead, we remain focused and determined to continue the hard work necessary to secure our district's future. Every dollar and every volunteer hour makes a difference, and we invite you to join us in this important endeavor. Together, we can bring the change we all desire and deserve.
Thank you for being part of our movement, for believing in our vision, and for helping us reach this incredible fundraising milestone. We are only getting started, and with your unwavering support, we are confident that we can make a lasting impact on Maryland's 6th Congressional District.
Stay tuned for more updates, events, and ways to get involved in the coming weeks. Together, we will shape the future of our district.
With deep gratitude,Mariela RocaRepublican Candidate for CongressMaryland’s 6th Congressional District 🇺🇸
(P.S. If you can help us keep our momentum in this race with a small contribution today, click the donate button below. ⬇️ )
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c2bb539032&e=0a12281e0e)

This is a powerful testament to our campaign's grassroots strength and the genuine connection we have with the people we aim to serve. We couldn't have reached this incredible milestone without your support, and I am eternally grateful for your dedication and commitment to our cause. Your contributions, whether large or small, have propelled us forward and demonstrated the collective power of a united community. But, our journey is far from over. As we look ahead, we remain focused and determined to continue the hard work necessary to secure our district's future. Every dollar and every volunteer hour makes a difference, and we invite you to join us in this important endeavor. Together, we can bring the change we all desire and deserve. Thank you for being part of our movement, for believing in our vision, and for helping us reach this incredible fundraising milestone. We are only getting started, and with your unwavering support, we are confident that we can make a lasting impact on Maryland's 6th Congressional District. Stay tuned for more updates, events, and ways to get involved in the coming weeks. Together, we will shape the future of our district. With deep gratitude,Mariela RocaRepublican Candidate for CongressMaryland’s 6th Congressional District 🇺🇸 (P.S. If you can help us keep our momentum in this race with a small contribution today, click the donate button below. ⬇️ ) | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Roca for Congress. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Another day of GOP dysfunction.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
GOP dysfunction gets in the way of our progress. We must get them out of office.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71797567/433288867/669571681?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231018-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTA5NjQ1MC1mYTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQc0A8V4m4AS2yDunmuf3QzVc87HHKNgdbxVGg06kBk=)

| Peter,

Today, I joined my Dem colleagues in voting for Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House.

Democrats remain **united and ready to work** to lower costs for working families and make our communities safer.

Republicans in the House, however, followed up yesterday’s dysfunction with more dysfunction. Jim Jordan failed to clinch the House Speakership after a second vote. Though keeping an extremist like Jim Jordan from the Speakership is a victory for democracy, we must not lose sight of the message: _**Republicans are not fit to govern.**_

GOP dysfunction gets in the way of our progress. **We must get them out of office.** [_**Can I count on your support with a $10 contribution today to fight against Republican dysfunction and take back the House? name: Sean Feucht
subject: A warning to those who cheer Israel's demise
body:
Scripture is clear on this.| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=55239461f83a49298faf9fe764b91e4f&_e=_itoQMB4P3r0aL5nhzLVDEC6UROGsyXmfuUJb_tdlm3uKr3hIpA8tUaJxOCBote19p4KhSzagoPUR4ykQ40yHS22uDH_beOgYkTdZ53MN_5r7WdVv-SAVaGs7Rnq8Vi7_i6MhVy2zlDySsuiGtgGn4FpohN2KGoN0_FpocprV7j94434_Lhs8LycoO5ZUhuFVtn5Cho9gFAXkX7T_vXDxGbcVm8Op50k3s0nKA9-kTePf7PR-gSQ9NcCxNOM6ELFkn2L2oIr92CVQ8y6P10ffzYecy3Eo151uZQ4Nmj6WGKsMjD0eJDEg6wHKfdFvectLQFAzgk2a-otJ3ZGFIlkBQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
We continue to pray and speak up for Israel as they continue to fight back against terrorist attacks. We have witnessed not only physical attacks against the State of Israel but also intentional disinformation in an attempt to damage the integrity of Israel's military. Those who support and cheer on attacks on Israel are complicit! The explosion in a hospital was quickly labeled as an attack by Israel by the mainstream media, yet the truth revealed that the explosion was a Hamas rocket detonating in the hospital. There will be no apologies by those who prematurely blamed Israel, because we know so many in this world have hearts hard towards Israel. Instead, we watch them quietly soften the headlines as more truth comes out. Luckily, we don't take our cues from the media, we take them from God's Word.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=55239461f83a49298faf9fe764b91e4f&_e=_itoQMB4P3r0aL5nhzLVDEC6UROGsyXmfuUJb_tdlm3uKr3hIpA8tUaJxOCBote19p4KhSzagoPUR4ykQ40yHS22uDH_beOgYkTdZ53MN_5r7WdVv-SAVaGs7Rnq8Vi7_i6MhVy2zlDySsuiGtgGn4FpohN2KGoN0_FpocprV7hZRZNTFbzeDd3gGAquqGmapgajf-ORdVv1stoNRog-s4VvkBjn23YV4UkGr0ilBEbtkIrtzwJ3IEjBFsuv5NGAI9wDVop1NMaz4Y9KTwIn8KiSK3jKZueH-56cVEaUKw8J1SJXBWjdI8SFgqvADjLPOXkGFoYocnItAmzbxFYYUw%3D%3D)
---
Scripture is clear - God will bless those who stand with Israel, and curse those who do not. I am reminded of a passage from Ezekiel 25: _For this is what the Sovereign Lord says: Because you have clapped your hands and stamped your feet, rejoicing with all the malice of your heart against the land of Israel, therefore I will stretch out my hand against you and give you as plunder to the nations. I will wipe you out from among the nations and exterminate you from the countries. I will destroy you, and you will know that I am the Lord_!
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---

| Peter,

Today, I joined my Democratic colleagues in voting for Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House—a vote I’ll take as many times as necessary to stop extremists from becoming Speaker.

**Democrats remain united and ready to lower costs for working families and make our communities safer.**

This week, Republicans once again showed us they’re unfit to govern. After ousting McCarthy from the Speakership last week, they nominated extremist, election-denier Jim Jordan. Today, he failed to clinch the Speakership after a second vote.

Though this represents a victory for our democracy, we must not lose sight of our goal: **We must get Republicans out of office.**

**I’m counting on your support to help me power my efforts to elect progressives up and down the ballot in 2024.[_Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today? clean_body: Democrats remain united and ready to lower costs for working families and make our communities safer. | = | Peter, Today, I joined my Democratic colleagues in voting for Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House—a vote I’ll take as many times as necessary to stop extremists from becoming Speaker. Democrats remain united and ready to lower costs for working families and make our communities safer. This week, Republicans once again showed us they’re unfit to govern. After ousting McCarthy from the Speakership last week, they nominated extremist, election-denier Jim Jordan. Today, he failed to clinch the Speakership after a second vote. Though this represents a victory for our democracy, we must not lose sight of our goal: We must get Republicans out of office. I’m counting on your support to help me power my efforts to elect progressives up and down the ballot in 2024.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s show the GOP how it’s done, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez P.O. | | Peter – As you might have heard me say before, I'm a huge fan of transit. And I'm an even bigger fan of the incredible workers who make transit systems run. So I'm really excited to make a big announcement:** Amalgamated Transit Union (ATU) Local 757 just endorsed me to be the next Congresswoman from OR-05.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71797729/433289404/974409837?refcode=2023-10-18-atu&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=89e724b7-fa6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWU3MjRiNy1mYTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LRnk9q0I55fLLZLJ1Xm2_0I2bMIF88zSfSYRelaisms=) As a civil engineer who's been involved for decades in transportation planning, it means a lot to have the support of the largest union for transit workers in Oregon. I believe in making our roads and railways more accessible to all. I believe that bus drivers, train conductors, rail workers, and everyone who contributes to the infrastructure of our transit systems deserve fair wages, safe working conditions, and collective bargaining rights. **I will be their champion in Congress.** This endorsement from ATU Local 757 is a major sign of momentum for our campaign, and I'm excited to talk with more voters across OR-05 about my plans and priorities. name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Defending my daughters' futures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

Most of you know me as a member of Congress. And some of you may remember me from your TV screens as a journalist. **_But most importantly, I’m a mother of two daughters._** Everything I do, I do for them, and when I see what the liberal Left wants their future to look like, I’m absolutely horrified. From replacing women's voices with biological men to burying the next generation in debt from out of control spending, it's like our country has completely abandoned our young kids. **_That’s why I’m continuing to fight in Congress for the future that my daughters deserve - but I need your help._** **[Keep me in Congress so I can fight for our kid’s future - Donate today!](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=6f0488b0d86442b2a3f1756c9ce93683&_e=pOpOdE1peIGxNO65W6HpyzNSfj02l5lSSsWNnNZ7Wpnu1eCWHDLccaIXO5d_JSG23aUwHv9vnVbyika1rkrNlcPo9ERJQb3T40b6qQSGu2l--Q-wXni8fplyGHkszkPBuHjT138cRQbOmijmpXQYZ7Tn_GSuoDtcpUwHZ3RfYGirJAORvBdOrDEo5jj7wzqqMes1HV8hfCmuGKVGRulz5YX-NdXfdf7pxJkNfyhGJ_KAsB6oP6WghaByL8R_CY304HNZKwKZIBvkPNIJYPvrTzNlgI4FNHnkN23suFTblqe5F9aLeSnm4YzisTONL5peVC01d6hcXE6Mqa_JPhbtVIyjr4m8TfxlUA7B4VAcqwE%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Most of you know me as a member of Congress. And some of you may remember me from your TV screens as a journalist. But most importantly, I’m a mother of two daughters. Everything I do, I do for them, and when I see what the liberal Left wants their future to look like, I’m absolutely horrified. From replacing women's voices with biological men to burying the next generation in debt from out of control spending, it's like our country has completely abandoned our young kids. That’s why I’m continuing to fight in Congress for the future that my daughters deserve - but I need your help. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

Wade , supported a national abortion ban, and spent years shilling for corporations who put profits over people. And 4 indictments, 91 criminal charges, 3 anti-abortion supreme court justices, & 1 violent attempt to overturn an election later, Kelly is still all in for Trump. Come on, Kelly. Granite Staters don’t want a governor who will bow to the biggest extremist in the room — they want one who will roll up her sleeves and get to work for our state. I talked about this during my speech at the New Hampshire Democratic Midterm Convention late last month—and let me tell you, the energy that day was electric. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = = New Hampshire wants a leader who understands New Hampshire families and will fight back against extremism. We need a governor who will protect reproductive freedom, defend public education, build affordable housing, combat climate change, and make sure every Granite Stater has the opportunity to thrive. While Kelly is focused on scoring petty political points, I’m focused on leading for New Hampshire and that’s what I’ll bring to the corner office. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = As governor, I will lead the corner office with integrity. Thanks, Cinde | = | = Click here to from Cinde Warmington's email list. Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington. William Christie, Treasurer. PO Box 2133, Concord, NH 03302

name: Col. Mike Waltz, me (2)
subject: AI has become a threat to humanity
body:
I’m reaching out to my most loyal supporters with an urgent ask| | | Peter, Every day, there’s a dangerous new revelation about Artificial Intelligence.

If you haven’t been keeping up, AI can now:
---
* Imitate anyone’s voice, letting **_scammers_** pose as your loved ones over the phone.
* Start businesses, create websites, and invest online
* Be used to create Deep-Fake videos of world leaders

---
And worst of all, AI has **_no off-switch._**

I’m taking immediate action to combat the dangers of AI, which is why our team put together an EMERGENCY PETITION for every patriot.

[**Will you join me and sign your name and DEMAND Congress take action to stop the dangers of AI?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=f5a66e8b59a0478d9e16608077e73023&_e=XiPBNJDJ9d3bx2U02nv7i6ViV6Ame11M3hfdrKIUrWCryNiK-lAGgELvF6q9QPlP362f1e4YnPFB8uIk2age8YaJpXYI4YW7qVsiC13phkFWLHgbTTEAryQaWIMlingZtswLVebOj2-a5qtRZKw8HMxmratM4arBPuKHViQ9zXvoAQ1XIADiOLjVhnXqks0dkHUUwuFeMuxdriMbj0Q75cQIlx9NVpZkwuTNeVjGR_uDxVrwTORf3T0K3U_gsUon6oRJkMFh_x8AVWlpSLByhwdb7LrjB7jkz8m3IP8xunsd2Brd53u7PqVby-iseWOn0sF25oepO8BxMunJNKUjIg2L2FdZ7XnS3d6WoE_ftqfdd3KM9XD-CjGTSzELy9PX)

|
---

They, along with our other foreign adversaries, see the weakness of Joe Biden and America. We must take these threats as a warning. As your U.S. Senator, I will restore strength to our country and ensure our military is equipped with the resources it needs to secure our border and protect American citizens. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)

|

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: I'm just getting started
body:
Peter,Saturday will mark one month since I proudly launched my campaign for Congress!I am thrilled by the overwhelming support and enthusiasm we've seen on the campaign trail. The reception from people across our state has been nothing short of incredible.Just recently, I had the opportunity to share my story on Fox News, reaching hundreds of thousands of viewers and spreading our message far and wide.I've received 17 endorsements, coming from both present and past Republican elected officials. Their endorsements underscore their belief in my candidacy as the most capable choice to defeat Jared Golden. We are just getting started, and we need your support,Peter.**Let's keep the momentum going strong.**_Today, I'm reaching out to you with a specific request - I'm looking for 23 new donors who can contribute at least $50 to our campaign._ [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlytjhl-ddldgdkhd-r/) Every contribution matters and makes a difference, and it's your support that keeps us moving forward.__I want to make it clear that I am fully committed to earning every Republican vote in this primary. **Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

subject: Corruption in our democracy

body:
As progressive activists, we have a moral and ethical obligation to call out corruption and hold leaders accountable for their exploitation.
#
Peter,
Clarence Thomas’ corruption is eroding public confidence in the Supreme Court.
While the news might not be focused on Clarence Thomas, we won’t allow his corruption to go unnoticed and further undermine our democracy.
Clarence Thomas does not have the ethical or moral compass needed to be a Supreme Court Justice. **Pramila is determined to get corruption out of our democracy, once and for all.**
**Let’s send him a strong message: It’s time to resign. [Add your name to our petition to demand his resignation to finally restore trust in our government. **](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/20231018-clarence-thomas-resign-petition/?source=em20231018-3050&t=1&akid=3050%2E420207%2Epq-FAl)

Jayapal HQ

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I will continue to vote down extremist Jim Jordan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71798583/433292489/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTliOTVlNS1mZTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ok99MtB8hK5vftj8w0LMqnNZCE7OGW0KAL1jmfkgxVI=)
Friends,
I was just on the House floor to vote down Jim Jordan for Speaker for the second time.
Democrats — and even some Republicans — are united in believing that Jim Jordan is not fit to be Speaker of the House, and we will continue to oppose MAGA extremist Jim Jordan no matter how many votes he calls.
I’ve devoted my first months in Congress to fighting for accountability of lawmakers — lawmakers like Marjorie Taylor Greene, George Santos, and Lauren Boebert, lawmakers who are extremists in many forms. And I remain committed to that cause.
Jim Jordan is a Trump puppet, and choosing him as speaker further emboldens the MAGA wing of the party.
Jordan is an outspoken election denier. He directly aided and supported Trump on January 6th and led the cause to overturn the certification of electoral college votes. And now, he is leading the baseless impeachment inquiry against President Biden.
Jim Jordan is not a lawmaker — he is a tool for Trump to use. I have seen firsthand how he spreads hatred and nonsense over and over again in the House Oversight Committee.
Enough is enough. We should not have extremists running the House and upheaving our democratic process. Every day they waste is another day that stops any work for the American people and pushes us closer to a government shutdown.
And that is unacceptable. We were elected to work for the people, not waste precious time on political games.
So, our best option to make sure this doesn't happen again is to hold extremists accountable at the ballot box in 2024. Let’s make sure that every extremist that held up our democratic process and supported an anti-democracy extremist is unseated and we return power to Democrats — the only united party in Congress ready to fight for its people.
**[What do you say? Will you help me fight to flip the House blue? If so, please make a contribution to my movement to hold this seat and elect Democrats who will flip the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71798584/433292490/871887458?refcode2=3a9b95e5-fe6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231018-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTliOTVlNS1mZTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ok99MtB8hK5vftj8w0LMqnNZCE7OGW0KAL1jmfkgxVI=)**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71798585/433292491/871887458?refcode2=3a9b95e5-fe6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231018-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTliOTVlNS1mZTZkLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ok99MtB8hK5vftj8w0LMqnNZCE7OGW0KAL1jmfkgxVI=)****
It’s times like these where it is most important that we come together to show Republicans that we will not let their political stunts slide. So I hope you will stand with me in this fight.
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country.

Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey.

Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put _$14 MILLION _**😧** into his failed run for Senate last year AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him.

[_**If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. We built a people-powered team that made history in 2022 – let’s build something even bigger to win again in 2024.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71798603/433292569/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231018-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNzdjMWY0LWZlNmQtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3T1xwswa_L2Ns_PPD7LJ5J_FRP6Q59E0IQ9P1LxmvvA=)

Thanks to folks like you, Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats in the Senate who are fighting for working families. We’re going to need your help to keep it that way.

Appreciate you all!!

**❤️ **John

John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

clean_body: Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. | Peter, I have some BIG news in the PA Senate race: 🚨 David McCormick just launched his campaign against my friend + fellow PA Senator Bob Casey 🚨 Mitch McConnell hand-picked this guy. We can’t let this hedge fund executive who lives in CONNECTICUT and who made his fortune selling out PA and American workers to China win. We need to step up for Bob. Like, big time. So please, please, please🙏 = | = Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey. Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put $14 MILLION 😧 into his failed run for Senate last year AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him. = Thanks to folks like you, Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats in the Senate who are fighting for working families. We’re going to need your help to keep it that way. Appreciate you all!! ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Look, no matter who their Speaker is or isn’t, the House GOP have shown that they aren’t focused on helping working families, but on grandstanding and getting featured on cable news.

Some of you who’ve been around a long time know that I used to be a professional fighter in MMA. I believe being a member of Congress isn’t actually that different. To be successful, you’ve got to show up for your constituents every day— _no matter what you end up facing._

Every day I’m in Congress, I’m standing up for KS-03 and for everyone to have access to a more just and fair world—whether that be pushing back against the climate crisis or passing the marriage equality law.

**That’s why I’m proud that today, I was included in the Out100 list of most impactful LGBTQ+ people. I am always proud to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community.**

But the attacks keep coming in. The NRCC just landed a punch with their brand new misleading attacks against my record.

**_[That’s why we need grassroots supporters to help us fight back. I’m looking for 500 people to help my team hit our first goal of the brand new quarter by becoming a 2024 member before Friday’s deadline. subject: What did we do to try and Save America?

body:
This is a BIG question.

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a1b162a32b9e4da295cc8f8975d26f04&_e=qBXdBU_Ami3uDGkgQfP7dbq1Nd6Ly06jpdaPCV9vYTPK3GT8MI_y-bR20yd0FMtx6L-TOVASHjIZ3-Ybw3rhuoeTooRLe-IU-M7XLrJb6_CPO1NmSjnssFz8QgXobhyEByFXt9tLzuAlA4YvzZZpklVMHWhnc2oKlj-stxULB9G-dq5js7dHYFAjMZU3hz2lWXPcImFj0u90UOPaqOKK8zNR8-RByu7ZbXVA-D91N9YViaee5uRrbHFvsgmFLc2Y4QzJwYtrTKLFOUTULWam18gtONEfqNcovVTQXCkqMwDY9krT6JzD_zzOZVI4-W4GRVRo5DOhMbMe7BJCXlK-jg%3D%3D)

One day, our kids will ask us, "What did you do to try and Save America?"

I don't want to look in their eyes and say, "I gave up because it was too hard."

[**We don 't have that option; we have one year to save America. Are you up for it?**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a1b162a32b9e4da295cc8f8975d26f04&_e=qBXdBU_Ami3uDGkgQfP7dbq1Nd6Ly06jpdaPCV9vYTPK3GT8MI_y-bR20yd0FMtx6L-TOVASHjIZ3-Ybw3rhuoeTooRLe-IU-M7XLrJb6_CPO1NmSjnssFz8QgXobhyEByFXt9tLzuAlA4YvzZZpklVMHWhnc2oKlj-stxULB9Gw4oedWGO-y7XAAiDwJP6YbweJ5oZkF5C86S8Vgcj1Sy59Va7OBJn8Vm7M4x8iJLACI0WKUSZkrtU7vNGBk9j5CryxF0W-FsWevjIkawlT6OEv4XTG2_8LZ7-gy_-ojtBXcDTUJo4sYYdo8794uioJxIxIzkkOOzBzphlm6ne65Q%3D%3D)

We have to get our priorities right in this country -- Americans are suffering, and the Biden administration is doing NOTHING.

Every decision I make in the U.S. Senate will be made with our children and families in mind. I will answer to YOU, the people of Arizona, NOBODY ELSE.

**My radical opponents are only accountable to their real constituents ...

The military-industrial complex, giant corporations, big pharma, big banks, WEF, and other GLOBALIST INSTITUTIONS. Don't let them trick you into thinking they care about Arizona. **

**It 's time to fight for America First. name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Jim Jordan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
He shouldn’t even be in Congress, let alone second in line to the presidency.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231018-2&refcode2=1349.734936.SOe9rv&t=1&akid=1349%2E734936%2ESOe9rv)
---
Peter, this is Aquilino Gonell. Former Capitol Police Officer.
If you need any more evidence that the Republican Party has to be defeated, look at what they’ve done over the last few days.
The House GOP put up Jim Jordan as their pick for Speaker.
**Jim Jordan is an insurrectionist.** Jim Jordan is a material witness to the events leading up to, during, and after the assault on our Capitol on January 6th. He refused to comply with a lawful subpoena from the committee investigating January 6, meddled with the Georgia election interference probe, and has proposed budget cuts to the FBI and the Department of Justice. He betrayed his oath to our country.
While I fought for my life against the traitors at the Capitol — while my fellow officers and I were beaten, kicked, spit on, cursed at — Jim Jordan spread lies about our elections and voted for those lies. He has never stopped. He continues to undermine our democracy.
Jim Jordan is dangerous. How can we trust him to uphold the law if he is not able to comply with a subpoena? How can we trust that he will faithfully defend the Constitution when he has done everything in his power to undermine it? He shouldn’t even be in Congress, let alone second in line to the presidency.
But that’s the GOP in 2023. That is why I am working so hard to stop them from taking their dangerous rhetoric and actions with them to the Senate.
That is why I am supporting Ruben Gallego, a friend who acted heroically on the House floor on January 6th.
And that is why I am asking you to make a donation to his campaign, to help him defeat Kari Lake. The MAGA Queen. Another insurrectionist sympathizer who has done untold damage to our democracy.
Please:
[**Can Ruben count on your support in his Senate campaign against Kari Lake in Arizona? Make a generous donation here, if you can.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231018-2&t=2&akid=1349%2E734936%2ESOe9rv)

We're running a Mock Election Poll to find out where our most loyal supporters stand before the big day (and to see if we're on the right track to send Tate Reeves packing).

Peter, I believe in service over self. As a leader, it is my responsibility to listen first to what you need. As Governor, I have always put the needs, jobs, and benefits of the people I serve over my own, and as President, I promise you I'll do exactly the same. **[Today, I'm reaching out to ask if you'd mind taking a minute to respond to my official Listening Survey:](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=81e74a45f6294e819ab41fcd18b2783c&_e=s7NWAQAqDeLAUKkFTxRmo_ZriRl7YCOHBD7V6nh9zQgVyvgc6J9In5llC2FJyt-BUugwYawdM06htlDb1tWAvXKS76mcE5-FDBxVPfDvPMy6v-aQZYheFvr_HVnk2vNZ7vZC9zhUZ3ZXWl37ejmgkzkeRXXpgFTLNeBEvrYzBCOuoBGS_Q1ICT_lEYR8DyPUH9R5Y0zNYplqhfzrdoo8E_DhEsyWqj29Z9MS0EzK54mULOVPMwZ0d_h8zqOhx9hjyCKNRsL-g6s71gf2VJD6AXWPQNaE4F3jZocVFuAwUDt4MW5vOEmjdwhYjlApIjbn2zkmfFrZOZ4F2CJE34DyhEp3aOVSPouJelK35S1eBuiMu-YZyLCJxGzvnmC2XebBv5iljgw0zc4GojiLNNoYSUFztb-cZSRXMSvrZCW4GV6ZgBIyxzpQ3VqID81AF0bm "Today, I’m reaching out to ask if you’d mind taking a minute to respond to my official Listening Survey:")**
