---
Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=81e74a45f6294e819ab41fcd18b2783c&_e=s7NWAQAqDeLAUKkFTxRmo_ZriRl7YCOHBD7V6nh9zQgVyvgc6J9In5llC2FJyt-BUugwYawdM06htlDb1tWAvXKS76mcE5-FDBxVPfDvPMy6v-aQZYheFvr_HVnk2vNZ7vZC9zhUZ3ZXWl37ejmgkzkeRXXpgFTLNeBEvrYzBCOuoBGS_Q1ICT_lEYR8DyPUH9R5Y0zNYplqhfzrdoo8E_DhEsyWqj29Z9MS0EzK54mULOVPMwZ0d_h8zqOhx9hjyCKNRsL-g6s71gf2VJD6AXWPQNaE4F3jZocVFuAwUDttghdJ3JzzU9_G7xr4EDF0amleMkE0f11G5nwjfB7hEEg-UrP9a7AHsNWw4knpfriaOcIqZuEJ8EliziCCRPTkklyc2t7jezCVPfeN258PjAfHOgvpuBF-CBaY7uvnyEoRC93ImGuQUbZ3XXrpjth_) A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates
* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities
* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT
* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable
* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency
* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation
* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity
* Protecting the unborn
* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state
* Expanding education freedom
* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities
* Lowering prescription drug costs
* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable
* Creating a universal school choice program
* Delivering record-breaking tax relief
* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership
* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans
* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders
* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court
* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief
* ESG prohibitions
* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
* Improvements to our state's infrastructure
* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis
* Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions
* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

LAWLER IN THE NEWS | via ABC News MSNBC via CBS News via FOX Business via The New York Times via The Daily Mail | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. subject: Arizona Labor is on our side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor]
Hi Peter,
Wow, do I have huge news to share with you!
Our campaign just earned the endorsements of three major Arizona labor unions. The United Food and Commercial Workers Union (UFCW) Local 99, the Arizona Education Association (AEA) and the Communications Workers of America (CWA) Arizona State Council have all officially announced their support for our campaign.
I am so honored to earn the support of these dedicated unions. From educators to the outstanding workers in supermarkets, airports, offices, packing houses and those who maintain our communications infrastructure – organized labor is the power that keeps our state moving forward.
STAND WITH OUR UNIONS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor]
Together UFCW Local 99, the Arizona Education Association, and Communications Workers of America Arizona State Council represent well over 44,000 hardworking Arizonans. With less than a year to go until the Democratic primary election, this early support from some of the biggest labor unions in Arizona isn’t just an honor, but a strong show of support that our campaign is the one that has working Arizonans’ backs.
Through my experience as an organizer with Mi Familia Vota, an SEIU civic participation program, and working for UFCW Local 99 nearly two decades ago, I learned the power of unions.
I’ve seen how our union family has stood against extremists here in Arizona attacking working families, education, immigrants, and health care access. Never once did our friends in labor say, “those aren’t our fights.” They said, “we have your back.” And we will always have theirs.
Will you stand with organized labor and hardworking Arizonans across our state by joining them in support of our campaign? Chip in today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor]
We are stronger than we’ve ever been. We are more than allies – we are a coalition – and we can get this done! Thank you!
¡A ganar por las familias trabajadoras!
Raquel Terán
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101823_arizonalabor]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

name: Team Mondaire

body:
Take our Q4 Priorities Survey and let Mondaire know which issues are at the top of your mind.
Friend,

We have officially closed the books on the first quarter of this campaign! As we look ahead to the rest of the year, Mondaire wanted to take a moment to check in with his supporters.

You see, this grassroots campaign is about the people of New York’s 17th District. Mondaire is running to once again serve your interests—but in order to do that, he needs to know what's at the top of your mind.

[**Will you take two minutes to fill out our Q4 Priorities Survey? Mondaire wants to hear the issues that matter most to you so he can best serve you in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71799333/433295651/1493465815?ms=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&refcode=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&source=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=lyPx1KvdaAsQeQycX/S3MssbSXYIb0u/2XJ6lUCF0Fi4DJ7hoJ41H7xNlwyiCK83uI48tA/XkaYAesePhu3I/u0Hjwt9teU14hGna6Rhsq0=&refcode2=c14ebab4-016e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlYmFiNC0wMTZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_l4u8ugxENVoJfXBUYmq3eHcYPEvj5gG-MqSeD26j-g=&emci=ca8b1e23-c96d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=c14ebab4-016e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)

Since Republicans took control of the House, they have wasted time on a baseless impeachment inquiry into President Biden, tried ramming through cruel budget cuts, and continued to defend the twice-impeached, serially indicted Donald Trump. Now, instead of passing spending bills ahead of an urgent deadline, they are squabbling yet again over who should be Speaker.

By contrast, during the previous session, Mondaire and his Democratic colleagues passed the Inflation Reduction Act and the largest infrastructure law in generations. They cut child poverty in half and rescued the American economy at the height of COVID-19.

Mondaire is ready to continue fighting for these issues—and more—in Congress. But first, he wants to check in with his supporters to hear directly from you about the issues at the top of your mind.

[**Please take our Q4 Priorities Survey and share with Mondaire the issues you’d like him to focus on in Congress. We’ll be sharing the results with Mondaire in just a few days—so don’t wait! Make your voice heard now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71799334/433295652/1493465815?ms=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&refcode=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&source=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231018_Survey_esrv_gq_act_Q4_TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=lyPx1KvdaAsQeQycX/S3MssbSXYIb0u/2XJ6lUCF0Fi4DJ7hoJ41H7xNlwyiCK83uI48tA/XkaYAesePhu3I/u0Hjwt9teU14hGna6Rhsq0=&refcode2=c14ebab4-016e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRlYmFiNC0wMTZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_l4u8ugxENVoJfXBUYmq3eHcYPEvj5gG-MqSeD26j-g=&emci=ca8b1e23-c96d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=c14ebab4-016e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=24719896)

Thanks,

Team Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. body:
Peter, we’re worried. Jim Jordan is still in the running to replace Kevin McCarthy.
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71799341/433295661/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1341-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGViYWI0LTAxNmUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvcGrTmLbdSB0VnVPX0hq-fiBylf-aBRMfy3tRw2p3s=)
---
Peter, we’re worried.
**Jim Jordan is still in the running to replace Kevin McCarthy as speaker of the House** – and the consequences for our democracy could be devastating. From his alliance with Trump to his attacks on abortion rights, Jordan’s political record is alarming. **But the reality is bigger and scarier than one MAGA Republican. Here’s why: **
**Right now, we’re witnessing a colossal breakdown of leadership in one of the two parties running the federal government.** Republicans like Jordan and his conservative enablers have brought Congress to a standstill. Without a new speaker, the government might be open, but no meaningful work can get done. And with less than a month until the stopgap funding bill expires, we could still face the crisis of another possible government shutdown.
This is why Emerge works day in and day out to transform politics at every level. Our communities deserve leaders who will show up and get to work delivering for everyday people – not endless disruption and popularity contests from do-nothing Republicans. **Democratic women are the leaders we need right now. **
**[If you’re ready to accelerate real transformation and empower leaders who put our communities first, please donate $10, 25, or what you can today to Emerge. Every dollar supports our efforts to recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office, win critical races, and replace do-nothing Republicans in every state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71799342/433295662/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1341-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGViYWI0LTAxNmUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvcGrTmLbdSB0VnVPX0hq-fiBylf-aBRMfy3tRw2p3s=)**
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71799343/433295663/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1341-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGViYWI0LTAxNmUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvcGrTmLbdSB0VnVPX0hq-fiBylf-aBRMfy3tRw2p3s=)
---
While the GOP is wasting time and sowing dysfunction in Congress, Emerge women are busy fighting to expand access to lifesaving health care, protect our essential rights, and pass policies that deliver for American families who struggle to make ends meet.**But we MUST grow our ranks of these dedicated fighters at every level of our government – and we need your help, Peter. **
As part of the Emerge community, your support is what powers our unique programs that equip Democratic women with the training and network they need to succeed on the campaign trail and in office. **With 200+ Emerge women on the ballot this November and crucial races ahead in 2024, we need your support now to make our biggest impact yet. **
We’re counting on you to be a part of our women-led movement for change. So please, Peter: [**Donate $10, 25, or what you can now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower more Democratic women to lead in 2024 and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71799344/433295664/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1341-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NGViYWI0LTAxNmUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvcGrTmLbdSB0VnVPX0hq-fiBylf-aBRMfy3tRw2p3s=)
Thank you for your urgent support,

Team Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Communications Workers Endorse Dave Min
body:
CWA Local 9510 Joins Sen. Min’s Expansive Labor Coalition | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7ded1b26185/communications-workers-endorse-dave-min-15663868?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** October 18, 2023
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**Communications Workers Endorse Dave Min**
_CWA Local 9510 Joins Sen. Min’s Expansive Labor Coalition_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, the Communications Workers of American Local 9510 announced their endorsement of Dave Min for US Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. The announcement follows the Orange County Labor Federation’s recommendation of Dave Min for endorsement by the state federation. CWA joins statewide labor organizations–the Service Employees International Union and the California Federation of Teachers–as well as an impressive cohort of locals and councils, including Teamsters Joint Council 42, IBEW locals 47 and 441, LAPPL, and IUPAT District Council 36, in endorsing California State Senator Dave Min. Dave Min has a strong record of advocating on behalf of municipal and county employees, and has emerged as the clear candidate of choice for Orange County’s working families.

**“The men and women of CWA Local 9510 are proud to follow the recommendation of our counterparts at the Orange County Labor Federation in endorsing Dave Min for Congress,”** said Kenny Williams, President of OCLF & Peter O'Brien, President of CWA 9510. **"Dave Min has spent his career advocating for working families, and we know he’ll continue to fight for us in Congress. He is also the only elected official in this race, and the only pro-labor candidate who has articulated a clear and convincing pathway to victory. We are confident he will win this seat and be our champion in Washington, DC.”**

CWA local 9510 has been active in Orange County for over 30 years, and represents workers at AT&T, AT&T Mobility, Avaya, Evoque, Frontier, Legacy T, SAUSD Substitute Teachers and Verizon.

**“I’m truly honored to receive the endorsement of the Communications Workers of America Local 9510. Their support, along with the Orange County Labor Federation's recommendation, further strengthens our labor coalition. Together, we stand for the hardworking men and women of Orange County, and I'm committed to being their champion in Congress,”** said Dave Min. **“I’m the only candidate with a clear pro-labor agenda and a proven pathway to victory. With the backing of CWA 9510, we're building a movement for the working families of CA-47, and we're ready to win this seat and make a real impact in Washington."**

After impressive fundraising hauls in the first three quarters of this year, Dave Min continues to set the pace for Katie Porter’s open Congressional seat by adding to his political coalition with consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. Additionally, Min entered the race with support from current CA-47 Representative, Katie Porter, the first Democrat to win the congressional seat in its history. In recent months, Min has announced the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 60 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4498097c49&e=7017cc100e). ###

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country.

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

With the backing of CWA 9510, we're building a movement for the working families of CA-47, and we're ready to win this seat and make a real impact in Washington." After impressive fundraising hauls in the first three quarters of this year, Dave Min continues to set the pace for Katie Porter’s open Congressional seat by adding to his political coalition with consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. Additionally, Min entered the race with support from current CA-47 Representative, Katie Porter, the first Democrat to win the congressional seat in its history. In recent months, Min has announced the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 60 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available . ### California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | Our mailing address is: PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Dave Min For Senate PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda.

We have less than 3 weeks until Election Day in Virginia, and we need to make sure our Climate Champions running for the State House and Senate have what they need to cross the finish line.

Under the right leadership, Virginia has proven to be a leader in climate progress. Their participation in the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative has helped reduce harmful emissions, and the Virginia Clean Economy Act has accelerated the timeline to transition the state to a 100% renewable energy economy.

But recently, GOP Governor Youngkin has made it clear that he has no interest in protecting climate progress in the state. Fortunately, Democratic lawmakers have been able to push back on his efforts by holding a slim majority in the State Senate. To get back on track, we need to protect the Democratic Senate majority and win back the state House of Delegates in November.

Climate is not the only area where progress is under attack. The same people who are willing to compromise our climate in favor of corporate polluters are also attacking progress on reproductive rights, education, and voting rights, just to name a few. But together, I know we can fight back.

As part of our **Virginia Victory Challenge** , everyone who makes a contribution to support our VA climate champions will get a chance to receive a call directly from me or even a signed copy of my book, "What Can I Do? My Path from Climate Despair to Action."

body:
| Peter, my opponent, Marc Molinaro thinks you **"don't give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is."**

He even said - and you can't make this up - people "wouldn't know who the Speaker of the House was if he backed over them in a pickup truck."

**That’s how Molinaro defended his vote to give the Speaker's gavel to Jim Jordan** \- an extremist, anti-abortion insurrectionist who's hellbent on killing Medicare and Social Security.

name: Bob Casey (Official Campaign)
subject: How we can stand up to David McCormick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Every grassroots donation is important.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=923%2E552475%2E39EJMO)
Hi Peter,
There's one reason why we're emailing you today: **We won't be able to defend PA's Senate seat without you.**
PA is ranked by CNN and National Journal as one of the most critical Senate battlegrounds this election, **and historically, our Commonwealth has seen some VERY expensive campaigns.**
**$381 million dollar level expensive.** That's how much was spent in the 2022 Pennsylvania Senate race.
Our opponent David McCormick is a mega-millionaire who could pour millions of dollars into his campaign, and Mitch McConnell and right-wing donors have promised Super PAC support.
**[That's why EVERY grassroots donation is so important, Peter. Will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare today so we have the resources to fight back and defend PA's Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231018-2?refcode=em20231018-2&refcode2=923_552475_39EJMO&akid=923%2E552475%2E39EJMO)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231018-2?refcode=em20231018-2&refcode2=923_552475_39EJMO&akid=923%2E552475%2E39EJMO)**
Your donation will help us run ads, host events, hire staff, and organize voters across Pennsylvania. **[Whatever you can chip in today will be greatly appreciated.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231018-2?refcode=em20231018-2&refcode2=923_552475_39EJMO&akid=923%2E552475%2E39EJMO)**
Thank you so much!
-- Team Casey

body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=bEq1UeAfcwvyoxaAk%2FbdvPzbhnaaYhHud7NTqvhRP%2BJEg6i4NpCbGg5hkGugaNQl9Nd5iwd5DOrGqyuxgFjVCEANYhMXFTC3%2BFummjM%2BmAyr3bii7HvlvRpL7PaQSCH%2BBvJccURXM3i3uJDiOY3WrjcfQCbyL%2F1A0gFHh%2B0O3WKDrasgQbJ345Iz%2FJoRUQfjNsYAN%2FJgFfWLWJRc%2F4oKuWUPUv1Ff7fRyWaOJvGS3AKaJ9TDM3FVvkBTdljUN3ovEEImZgp4t5ufzwlFUN1cVXThKQe8v7VCI1VrRp3Q62ggfvMg%2B%2FLVMiHBg2kr7GJ%2FRLcJCj5VASm%2BndSyb8L8xBKzhI7La3a2iZ7x3sCzLIVypLkSjp9fev767fFOP%2FwoEyvLeY1cxqGJNVe%2Fr1Kp%2BiEb7hjufJecr7%2BXeiTeLGYKb%2BH0E8MUYznHiqbOvTzN .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter, I love Texas and our people. It’s my favorite place in the world.
That’s why it’s so upsetting to me to see Republicans like Ted Cruz dragging us down and keeping us in the dark ages.
After 30 years of GOP control, we are at the bottom in education spending and outcomes.
Our senator won’t lift the military blockade to confirm nominees.
We’re spending millions in taxpayer money on a backward immigration plan.
And Republicans like Ted Cruz are refusing to pass any common sense gun legislation.
Texas could have it so much better than this, Peter! But we won’t achieve everything we can if we leave Republicans in power to destroy our state, like they’ve done for three decades.
We need new leadership. I am the Democrat who will stop Ted Cruz and get to work fighting for the issues Texans really care about.
But I need your help. Will you donate any amount right now to power this campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Tony Evers
subject: our goal for the week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

As your governor, I’m fighting every day to protect your rights and
freedoms. That includes your right to vote and have it counted, your right
to make your own health care decisions, and your right to be your true
self, without government intervention.

Earlier this month, Republicans in the state legislature passed multiple
anti-trans bills that are solely designed to score culture war points and
attack a vulnerable community of Wisconsinites.

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: I will veto this legislation
and any other bigoted bills that come across my desk, especially those
that are just designed to score political points.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231018_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.1&t=1001&akid=6435%2E1827488%2E2o9IBk ]I’m fighting for your freedoms, and I need your support to keep
Wisconsin blue ahead of the 2024 elections. Can you chip in to help us hit
our $32,983 goal before our deadline on Sunday night so we can keep making
critical early investments across Wisconsin?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

name: Election Team @ Our Revolution
subject: We know how to beat billionaire special interests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As you know, we have big local elections happening in the next few weeks and our team is working around the clock to make sure that progressive voters show up. Turnout is the name of the game in local elections, which have notoriously low turnout, so we’re doing everything we can.

Even a few dollars will help us increase capacity. We have set an ambitious goal to have three one-on-one conversations with every progressive voter in each of the 25 races we’ve endorsed in for the Nov. 7th election — that is a LOT of conversations! Help us meet our goal before we run out of time. Some of these races will be decided by just a few votes. Can you chip in today by making a donation here? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9838?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231018_fr_turnout_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_turnout&t=1011&akid=4803%2E5885482%2E2WEdnf)

Our Revolution has spent a lot of this year focused on building local power — with big wins to show for it. This spring, we celebrated a huge victory in Chicago when progressive Brandon Johnson won in an upset election, and we’re already seeing results: earlier this month, Chicago became the largest city in the country to independently phase out the archaic tipped minimum wage.

We know the playbook of the billionaire extremists who we’re up against: they are investing whatever it takes to invade our local governments and create a breeding ground for far-right ideology. We need to activate our grassroots army to make sure the small but mighty few don’t take control with their bigoted, racist ideas in our local governments and start chipping away at our freedoms.

Stand with us and help us fund our get out the vote operations for the next three weeks with a donation of any size today. Together we can make a difference. ---
As you can probably imagine, **THE PRESIDENT’S** **TRUST** received a massive surge of new members on Monday – a very dark day in the history of our country.

---
When I didn’t see your name on Monday’s updated roster, Patriot, I had to believe that maybe your invitation to become a Founding Member had been lost.

---
_(Or, if you didn’t join because times are tough in Biden’s America, then please just stop reading here. I certainly don’t want to guilt you into joining.)_

---
Over the course of this year, our movement has proven to be resilient amidst the most egregious attacks conceivable. There is just one reason our movement has prevailed against the never-ending witch hunts... and that reason is _YOU_.

---
My trusted supporters have peacefully defended this movement from the most heinous attacks – _and the higher we surge in the polls, the *worse* the attacks will get_.

---
**The Deep State will use any weapon at its disposal to destroy our momentum.**

---
But I have my own secret weapon – YOU.

---
With you by my side, we will prevail like never before and SAVE AMERICA.

clean_body: Checking in after Monday’s roster was finalized.| | | Patriot, As you can probably imagine, THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST received a massive surge of new members on Monday – a very dark day in the history of our country. When I didn’t see your name on Monday’s updated roster, Patriot, I had to believe that maybe your invitation to become a Founding Member had been lost. (Or, if you didn’t join because times are tough in Biden’s America, then please just stop reading here. I certainly don’t want to guilt you into joining.) Over the course of this year, our movement has proven to be resilient amidst the most egregious attacks conceivable. There is just one reason our movement has prevailed against the never-ending witch hunts... and that reason is YOU. My trusted supporters have peacefully defended this movement from the most heinous attacks – and the higher we surge in the polls, the worse the attacks will get. The Deep State will use any weapon at its disposal to destroy our momentum. But I have my own secret weapon – YOU. With you by my side, we will prevail like never before and SAVE AMERICA. | | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP INVITATION FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. body:
They’ve rigged the system
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800455/433299034/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMDhkODctMDU2ZS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Yx5G2CQ6A2QeQ6ClWXV3F7JlFIK2VkGUZp2AU8dTdM=&emci=5ab8fde1-046e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=22a08d87-056e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=16746905)

Hi there, I want to take a moment to share why I was inspired to form Term Limit the Court along with partners across the country.
Since the 1970’s, Democrats have won the popular vote more often than Republicans; however, they’ve been able to appoint a fraction of the Supreme Court justices.
Why?
Because without term limits, the Supreme Court has become an untouchable body that is unaccountable to the American people. They can no longer claim to be “above politics'' while they throw out decades of precedent to take away constitutional rights from women. They can no longer claim to be impartial while they lounge on billionaires’ yachts.
It’s time to act, team. That’s where Term Limit the Court comes in. We can mobilize a bipartisan, nationwide movement to support legislation to apply term limits to the Supreme Court and restore balance to the third branch of government.
However, I can’t do this alone, team. Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can to help launch our campaign?**[The team and I set a goal to raise $5,000 from grassroots donors for launch, and we’re just $1,389 away from our goal. Whether it’s $5, or $500, your support will help us transform American policy forever. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800456/433299035/-207898673?refcode=E4553-20231018-Onboarding2ndClicks-SL-Corruption&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMDhkODctMDU2ZS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Yx5G2CQ6A2QeQ6ClWXV3F7JlFIK2VkGUZp2AU8dTdM=)**
[GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800457/433299036/-207898673?refcode=E4553-20231018-Onboarding2ndClicks-SB-Corruption&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMDhkODctMDU2ZS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Yx5G2CQ6A2QeQ6ClWXV3F7JlFIK2VkGUZp2AU8dTdM=)

[GIVE $5 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800458/433299037/-207898673?refcode=E4553-20231018-Onboarding2ndClicks-SB-Corruption&amount=5&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMDhkODctMDU2ZS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Yx5G2CQ6A2QeQ6ClWXV3F7JlFIK2VkGUZp2AU8dTdM=)

Thanks for taking the time to read this and standing by me as we take on corruption and dysfunction in the court.
– Alan

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800459/433299038/1721652333?refcode=refcode=E4553-20231018-Onboarding2ndClicks-footer-Corruption&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJhMDhkODctMDU2ZS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Yx5G2CQ6A2QeQ6ClWXV3F7JlFIK2VkGUZp2AU8dTdM=)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: I have a record of bringing people together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?source=em231018-ca-split&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy)
Friend: I'm a fourth-generation Texan who was raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mother taught in public schools and sometimes even worked an extra job to get by.

Thanks to her, my teachers and coaches, and the good folks at our local YMCA, I went on to play football for Baylor and in the NFL before becoming a civil rights lawyer. _**Then I ran for Congress to serve the community that raised me.**_

I'm running for Senate because I don't want my story to be the exception. I want all kids, no matter where they're from or what they're facing, to have what they need to achieve their dreams. [_Will you chip in to help me defeat Ted Cruz and give Texas families the senator we deserve? →_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?source=em231018-ca-split&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy)
**[DONATE →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?source=em231018-ca-split&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy)**
_**My very first vote in Congress was to expand the Affordable Care Act and make health care more accessible for all Americans. Ted Cruz once spent 21 hours speaking out against the ACA on the Senate floor.**_

Last year, I was proud to be a part of passing a historic infrastructure bill that will bring $35 billion to Texas over the next five years. I also helped pass the CHIPS and Science Act, which is bringing high-tech manufacturing to our state. Ted Cruz voted against both of these _**bipartisan**_ bills.

_**Ted Cruz would rather deny Texans vital investments we need than reach across the aisle.**_ He's one of the most divisive legislators in Congress and has spent his whole career pitting people against each other. I have a very different record of bringing people together – in fact, I was just named the most bipartisan member of the Texas delegation.

[_That's the kind of leader I'll be in the Senate, and if you agree Texans deserve better than Ted Cruz's selfish extremism, I hope you'll chip in on my campaign today. We need to raise $45,000 a day to compete with Cruz and his special interest allies, so please: Split a donation between me and Zak Malamed before midnight to help me fire Ted Cruz →_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?source=em231018-ca-split&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20231018-ca-split-el&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy) [Split $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20231018-ca-split-el&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231018-ca-split-el&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=10&amount=30&refcode=em20231018-ca-split-el&refcode2=519_8507_LkWDRy&akid=519%2E8507%2ELkWDRy)

\- Colin

Derek, we’re just weeks away from state and local elections in Pennsylvania. I’ve made a plan to vote. Have you? I hope so.

Just over one year from now, I’ll be on the ballot alongside President Biden and every other federal candidate. On Election Day 2024, everything we’ve worked for will come down to just one thing: voter turnout.
If we can’t get enough strong Democrats to turn out in November next year, Republicans will easily blow us out of the water. And we’re seeing right now the consequences of a Republican majority. That’s why Chrissy is asking 1,000 of her supporters to make their pledge early: **Will you pledge to get to the polls on Election Day and vote in 2024?**
| | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800559/433299567/2023752121?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk892-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTU1MjVlNC0wNTZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3T8r1BlDt_K-QN0EHR6qZsTIOpa0q4q6q__tunXhYI4=&emci=c30037c0-166d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=555525e4-056e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
---
We know that Election Day is still a long way away. But with so much on the line – from our reproductive rights to the security of our democracy to our fundamental right to vote – we can’t afford to leave anything to chance.
**And as Chrissy says: If we’re not preparing, we’re losing.** That’s why we’re determined to ensure that Chrissy’s supporters everywhere pledge to vote by midnight, and we’ve personally selected you to represent 18326.
**Please, this won’t take long: Will you pledge to vote in the 2024 elections?**
| | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71800560/433299568/2023752121?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk892-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTU1MjVlNC0wNTZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3T8r1BlDt_K-QN0EHR6qZsTIOpa0q4q6q__tunXhYI4=&emci=c30037c0-166d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=555525e4-056e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)

body: President Dwight Eisenhower warned Americans what can happen when their government becomes too big and self-driven by its bureaucracies [Action] "CENSORED AND CONTROLLED" PART 3 The Censorship Industrial Complex [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65446&L=30472&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc29yZWQtYW5kLWNvbnRyb2xsZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjdGlvbithbGVydCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f992d54f23ef3843dff9a9e95b81a809b45ed2a6879fbc32a4b0aa173c9726a3] President Dwight Eisenhower warned Americans what can happen when their government becomes too big and self-driven by its bureaucracies. Like the military industrial complex, the censorship industrial complex has become an uncontrolled sector of government that has stolen some of our most basic freedoms – freedom of speech and in some cases, freedom of thought. Unelected officials make decisions that touch millions of Americans every day. In the case of censorship, these unelected government managers are controlling what you see, read and hear. They could, themselves, send the Capitol Police to arrest him for his crimes, as the right of citizens arrest exists in the District of Columbia when there is probable cause that a felony crime is being or has been committed.** But the Republicans want to leave him in office to have a weak, braindead and criminal fool to run against in 2024. Biden has not just been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, he has undoubtedly been bribed in one manner shape or form by Iran.

clean_body: Republicans released their list of top targets for 2024 - and I’m on the shortlist. | = | Peter, In case you haven’t heard, Republicans released their list of top targets for 2024 \- and I’m on the shortlist. | = We know what this means because it’s happened before. | | ❌ They’ll be pouring outside money into our district and running nasty attack ads, lying about my record. ❌ They’ll support my far-right Republican opponent with ads and cash. ❌ They’ll fly top national Republicans like Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and Marjorie Taylor Greene into the Lehigh Valley to campaign for our opponent. In short, Republicans are going to do everything they can to defeat me. I made the list because they think I’m vulnerable. Our election last year came down to 2 percentage points, one of the closest in the entire country. We don’t have any margin for error, with House Republicans controlling the House by just 5 SEATS.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | Dear Friend, Earlier this week Kelly signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge to oppose and veto any and all efforts to increase taxes as Governor. Kelly will always protect our New Hampshire Advantage – and will fight tooth and nail to ensure the Democrats never implement an income or sales tax.

Today, she made the same commitment to New Hampshire Voters as she runs for Governor.” Kelly will always fight to protect our New Hampshire Advantage and will keep our state safe, prosperous and free! All the best, Team Kelly

name: Team Salinas
subject: Dangerous, reckless, and unforgivable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon

**We won’t mince words: This is downright terrifying.**

To vote to hand the Speaker’s Gavel to a man who proudly introduced anti-abortion legislation, enthusiastically voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election, and vehemently defended (and continues to defend!) federally indicted Donald Trump at every turn is reckless, irresponsible, and unforgivable.

We're now in the fight of our lives to take back the House Majority.

[**Andrea is holding the line in Washington against Republicans' extremist agenda, but we need you in this too. Oh that’s right! Scott Perry said, **“We can go without a Speaker for a long time.”**

We know two things for sure though:

One, Janelle’s opponent Scott Perry is going to back Jim Jordan every time because **they’re both anti-democracy extremists.**

And two, **Janelle just wants to get to work.** While Scott Perry might be comfortable wasting our dollars by goofing off in the People’s House, Janelle is ready to fight for our fundamental needs — safety, healthcare, education, abortion rights, and good, family-sustaining jobs.

clean_body: Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Team Stelson. The chaos in Congress continues. We haven’t had a Speaker of the House for the past two weeks... and what does Janelle’s opponent have to say about it? Oh that’s right! Scott Perry said, “We can go without a Speaker for a long time.” We don’t know about you, but we’re pretty sure Congress should be busy working for us, not playing petty political games. = | = The clown show doesn’t appear to be ending anytime soon. Today, for the second day in a row, insurrectionist Jim Jordan failed to get enough votes to win the Speaker gavel. We know two things for sure though: One, Janelle’s opponent Scott Perry is going to back Jim Jordan every time because they’re both anti-democracy extremists. And two, Janelle just wants to get to work. While Scott Perry might be comfortable wasting our dollars by goofing off in the People’s House, Janelle is ready to fight for our fundamental needs — safety, healthcare, education, abortion rights, and good, family-sustaining jobs. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We need a hard worker like Janelle in Congress. Let’s get Scott Perry out once and for all. — Team Stelson | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking her knowledge and passion for serving others and running for Congress to work to protect a woman’s right to an abortion and make schools safer for kids and teachers. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Sharing my thoughts on Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends,
Like so many across the country and world, I have spent the past 11 days heartbroken. Like many Jewish Americans, I have close friends and family who live in Israel, and I share in the pain and anger so many of us are feeling.
The horrors we have watched unfold are unspeakable. And yet, there is so much to say. I couldn’t possibly capture it all in one email, but I wanted to share some of my thoughts with you directly:
I unequivocally condemn Hamas’ horrific, inexcusable attacks. Israel has a right to defend itself, and the United States stands ready to offer our support.
I’m also the Founder and Chair of the Protection of Civilians in Conflict Caucus in Congress, and have spent much of my career trying to make sure that we are minimizing civilian harm in conflict areas. I believe that we are strongest when we lead with our values and that protecting innocent lives is both the right thing to do, and important for the long-term safety and security of Israel.
I feel grateful that I have gotten to spend so much time in the region, most recently this past April, when I joined Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries’ Congressional delegation that traveled to Israel to mark the nation’s 75th anniversary. Growing up, I’d spend every other summer there, and the other summers my cousins from Israel would stay with us in San Diego. As a teenager I spent time in Sha’ar HaNegev, San Diego’s sister city, and in the neighboring Bedouin and Israeli-Arab communities. I’ve even visited Gaza. The region is incredibly special, and it’s incredibly special to me.
My heart is with all those grieving loved ones. And I am outraged by the violence against Jews and Muslims we are seeing in the United States and around the world — the reports of swastikas spray-painted outside classrooms, of bomb threats at our synagogues and mosques, the murder of a 6-year-old boy in Illinois, and more.
My immediate attention is on making sure we save as many lives as possible — recovering the Israeli and American hostages and protecting civilian lives in Israel and Gaza.
If you’d like to share your thoughts, I’d invite you to respond to this email.
Finally, I want to make sure you know that the State Department is providing resources for Americans impacted by the emergency situation in Israel, Gaza, and the West Bank. If you or any of your loved ones need to reach the Embassy in Israel, you can call +1 (833) 890-9595 or +1 (606) 641-0131. You can also click here [https://il.usembassy.gov/u-s-citizen-services/security-and-travel-information/] for the latest updates from the embassy and additional resources. And if you or someone you know needs to evacuate Israel or Gaza, fill out this form here [https://t.co/OOCpIplKCt] for updates from the State Department.
Thank you for reading.
With heartbreak and hope,
Sara
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89313/images/SDS/SJJ-DigitalHeadshot-USE.png]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need to be prepared for AIPAC.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush have shown tremendous political courage over
the last week — at the cost of being attacked by both establishment
Democrats and Republicans.

Despite these attacks, they are still speaking out and standing up for
Palestinian human rights. They’re even rallying today at the White House,
calling for a ceasefire:

Last cycle, AIPAC spent millions against anyone who spoke up for
Palestinians in general elections and primaries. AIPAC spent millions in
just nine races, and defeated nearly every Democrat it opposed.

→ So now, we need to be prepared for AIPAC to spend heavily against our
candidates who have been bravely calling for a ceasefire. Will you support
us in this moment of need?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139163?refcode=em20231018-31400&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7 ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help us prepare for
AIPAC to spend heavily against us and our candidates? We have to protect
the Squad, we can’t let them defeat a single member of our bloc.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139169?refcode=em20231018-31400&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7 ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats like Rashida Tlaib, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush,
Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee are leading a generational shift in the
Democratic Party.

Thank you for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231018-31400-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31400_1203867_36j4I7&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31400%2E1203867%2E36j4I7

name: Tina Smith
subject: DeJoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Despite public outcry and pressure across the country to improve postal services, DeJoy hasn’t budged. |
#
Do you remember Louis DeJoy, folks? Donald Trump chose him for Postmaster General after being one of his wealthiest campaign donors. And since being appointed, he’s slowed down mail delivery, cut pay for thousands of postal workers, canceled employee overtime, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, removed drop boxes, and more. **_Yikes._** Despite public outcry and pressure across the country to improve postal services, DeJoy hasn’t budged. We need to do what we can to turn up the heat and public pressure before the Postal Service is reduced to rubble. **[Will you sign my petition to demand DeJoy’s resignation from the Postal Service? We need a new Postmaster General to save the USPS from further sabotage and reverse the damage done to this critical lifeline millions of Americans depend on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71802683/433306718/570476933?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC45_20231018_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDhmNzkxYy0wZjZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUqLJZ9tsRi9ayww87Xth6tlycJykLmDRQyJfKxs4lc=&emci=2d8f791c-0f6e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8f791c-0f6e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71802685/433306719/570476933?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC45_20231018_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDhmNzkxYy0wZjZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HUqLJZ9tsRi9ayww87Xth6tlycJykLmDRQyJfKxs4lc=&emci=2d8f791c-0f6e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8f791c-0f6e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: The attacks against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4250%2E5257348%2EM2v04w)
Derek —
This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country.
The last few years have been grueling for our nation and our democracy, but it hasn’t always been like this.
There was a time before Donald Trump. When you could disagree without being disagreeable. When it wasn’t taboo to have friends across the aisle, or at least people you could work with. When you would bring people together — Democrats and Republicans — to get things done.
Why? Because it was in the best interest of the American people to have a government that functioned. And that wasn’t in chaos 24/7.
Those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the United States.
I’ve never been one to back down from the bad guys — so amidst these attacks, I did my duty and called him out. I took on these fights not because they were easy, but because it needed to be done.
That vitriol has taken a turn for the worse. Here’s what the other side has had to say about me:
“Wild-eyed conspiracy nut.” - Tucker Carlson
“Pencil neck. Shifty Schiff.” - Donald Trump
“[He] openly lied to the American public.” - Kevin McCarthy
**Never in my life would I expect to be cast a president’s “favorite” enemy — but here we are. And I’m not going to back down.**
It doesn’t end with these personal attacks either. With every new insult comes a horde of MAGA supporters, ready to pile on more death threats. Through Twitter. Email. Phone calls. Letters. You name it. With multiple people prosecuted for threatening to kill me. That NEVER happened before Trump.
There are days when the fight gets difficult. During the impeachment process. Serving on the January 6 Committee. When House Republicans censured me for doing my constitutional duty.
**But like I said on the House floor, I am honored by their enmity. I am flattered by the falsehoods they level against me. Those who were the authors of the big lie must attack the truth tellers and I am proud to stand accused. I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. Knowing that I have lived by my oath of office.**
My guiding principle has been serving in a way that will bring pride to my children. I believe that right and truth and decency matter now more than ever.
After long nights of consideration, I decided to run for California’s U.S. Senate seat. Because MAGA Republicans aren’t getting the job done and there’s too much that needs fixing. I have a record of getting tough things done, and I’m ready to do the hard work needed for our families, for our economy, for our democracy, and for our planet.
**[It’s clear Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are going to do everything they can to sabotage my campaign — because they know how effective I am at gathering the truth, making a case, and holding them accountable. I need your help to overcome their attacks. clean_body: | This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country. Derek — This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country. The last few years have been grueling for our nation and our democracy, but it hasn’t always been like this. There was a time before Donald Trump. When you could disagree without being disagreeable. When it wasn’t taboo to have friends across the aisle, or at least people you could work with. When you would bring people together — Democrats and Republicans — to get things done. Why? Because it was in the best interest of the American people to have a government that functioned. And that wasn’t in chaos 24/7. Those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the United States. I’ve never been one to back down from the bad guys — so amidst these attacks, I did my duty and called him out. I took on these fights not because they were easy, but because it needed to be done. That vitriol has taken a turn for the worse. Here’s what the other side has had to say about me: “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut.” - Tucker Carlson “Pencil neck. Shifty Schiff.” - Donald Trump “[He] openly lied to the American public.” - Kevin McCarthy Never in my life would I expect to be cast a president’s “favorite” enemy — but here we are. And I’m not going to back down. It doesn’t end with these personal attacks either. With every new insult comes a horde of MAGA supporters, ready to pile on more death threats. Through Twitter. Email. Phone calls. Letters. You name it. With multiple people prosecuted for threatening to kill me. That NEVER happened before Trump. There are days when the fight gets difficult. During the impeachment process. Serving on the January 6 Committee. When House Republicans censured me for doing my constitutional duty. But like I said on the House floor, I am honored by their enmity. I am flattered by the falsehoods they level against me. Those who were the authors of the big lie must attack the truth tellers and I am proud to stand accused. I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. Knowing that I have lived by my oath of office. My guiding principle has been serving in a way that will bring pride to my children. I believe that right and truth and decency matter now more than ever. After long nights of consideration, I decided to run for California’s U.S. Senate seat. Because MAGA Republicans aren’t getting the job done and there’s too much that needs fixing. I have a record of getting tough things done, and I’m ready to do the hard work needed for our families, for our economy, for our democracy, and for our planet. However, his support is still strong among his Republican colleagues. I do not condone any members of Congress, like Jim Jordan, who deny election results and challenge our democratic values. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: Let's celebrate a community win!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
The Dog Parade's Back On! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=e089f89e25&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

I love animals, which is why I have worked on initiatives and legislation to protect them from harm. I cherish the many years I've had in the company of my pets, and the joy they bring to a home is invaluable, which is why I jumped into action when organizers of the Tompkins Square Park Halloween Dog Parade asked for help [to save this year's event](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=9e34568058&e=2de202398d) from being cancelled. My team and parade stewards, along with businesses, community members, and City Hall, banded together to ensure this year's dog parade would be back, bigger than ever!
---
| [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=79f3bbaa93&e=2de202398d)
---
| Please join our neighbors this Saturday, October 21 to celebrate the 33rd Annual Halloween Dog Parade and our community's ability to form partnerships that saved this treasured event. I will definitely be there to watch those adorable pooches strutting in their best outfits. _Don't tell my pet turtle - he gets jealous!_

Carlina
---
| | |
---
| **Latest News**
---
| [**Our Town: Tompkins Square Park Halloween Dog Parade is Back on...**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=5f5d4e13e4&e=2de202398d)
Carlina assisted organizers and advocates in ensuring that 2023 Halloween Dog Parade could be held at Tompkins Square Park.

[**The Villager: Lower East Side Street Corner Named After Housing Activist Frances Goldin**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=22e179bd2f&e=2de202398d)
On October 5, Carlina and the community hosted a ceremony on the corner of East 4th Street and Cooper Square to unveil Frances Goldin Way after she and activists worked to have the Council approve this important memorial.

[WNYC: City Council Eyes the Department of Correction](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=82924a6105&e=2de202398d)
Carlina joined Brian Lehrer to discuss lack of transparency on Rikers Island and why it's important to have ensure people are showing up to court appearances.

name: Peach State Update
subject: Brad Raffensperger purged 189,000 voters ahead of a critical election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
That’s 2% of ALL voters in Georgia

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71802955/433307689/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmJiZjYzYi0xMjZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcYQh33nke5Yt5dHeiDwlATwxWnSwxTZY6giYN0O_mI=&emci=aafda7d0-116e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=26bbf63b-126e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Brad Raffensperger purged 2% of all the voters in Georgia from the voter rolls ahead of the critical Georgia municipal elections. Now, if someone was accidentally on his list, _**they’ll get to the polls to find they can’t vote.**_

To give you context of just how big a deal this is, in 2020, Joe Biden won Georgia by just 11,779. Now there are 189,000 fewer voters registered in Georgia.

Peter, Brad Raffensperger is even moving to purge voters just because they didn’t choose to vote in recent elections, but the reality is, voting is not “use it or lose it” – **_it’s a right!_**

[**_Georgia has always had the strongest voter protection program in the country (because we NEED it). We're in the middle of a big Get Out the Vote push ahead of the 2023 Georgia Municipal Elections, and we need a fully funded voter protection team. Can we count on you to pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to fully rebuild our voter protection team?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71802956/433307690/710125701?refcode=20231018.2_PSU_10W&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmJiZjYzYi0xMjZlLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcYQh33nke5Yt5dHeiDwlATwxWnSwxTZY6giYN0O_mI=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
